sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Bludgeoning, Psychic.
records.appearance: A massive primordial amphibious predator with a long, muscular fishlike body, a broad blunt head, three pale eyes arranged vertically, and four powerful facial tentacles. Its slick skin is ridged and scarred, with low fins running along the spine and a heavy tapering tail built for deep water.
records.silhouette: Long horizontal body with a blunt wedge-shaped head, four trailing tentacles, low dorsal fins, and a broad swimming tail.
records.pose: Swimming toward the viewer in a slow three-quarter turn, tentacles spread to probe the dark water.
records.environment: A lightless submerged cavern with distant stone columns and drifting particulate
records.altText: A huge blue-gray aboleth with three eyes and four tentacles glides through a dark underwater cavern.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A huge mature swamp dragon with a long gaunt four-legged body, skull-like head, great forward-curving horns, one pair of broad tattered-edged wings, and a sinuous swimming tail. Scarred black scales shine with green oil-like reflections, while corrosive acid smokes in channels along the jaw and breast.
records.silhouette: Huge lean quadrupedal dragon with an elongated skeletal face, two great forward horns, high ragged wings, long neck, and whip tail.
records.pose: Standing half-submerged among dead trees with wings spread over the water and a heavy stream of acid pouring from the open jaws.
records.environment: A vast drowned forest of dead cypress trunks and steaming acidic pools
records.altText: A huge adult black dragon stands in a drowned forest, pouring acid from its skull-like jaws.

records.appearance: A huge mature desert dragon with a long four-legged body, one massive forward-pointing nasal horn, ridged brows, fanlike ears, one pair of broad wings, and immense shovel claws. Cobalt scales are abraded by years beneath the sand, and lightning branches across the horn and armored throat.
records.silhouette: Huge quadrupedal dragon with one dominant forward horn, broad ear frills, vast angular wings, powerful digging forelimbs, and long tail.
records.pose: Bursting from a vertical wall of sand with all four claws exposed, wings driving a storm outward, and lightning firing along the horn line.
records.environment: A desert canyon engulfed by a dragon-made sandstorm beneath black thunderclouds
records.altText: A huge adult blue dragon bursts from a wall of sand as lightning fires past its massive nasal horn.

records.appearance: A huge mature desert dragon with a long four-legged body, broad shieldlike head, strong lateral facial plates, paired chin spines, one pair of vast wings, and a sand-scoured tail. Deep brass scales have darkened around the joints and polished bright along exposed ridges, while furnace light gathers behind the teeth.
records.silhouette: Huge quadrupedal dragon with a very broad head, swept lateral horns, massive wings, deep chest, and long tail cutting through sand.
records.pose: Standing astride the crest of a dune with all four feet planted, wings spanning the slope, and fire rolling from the mouth in a controlled first breath.
records.environment: A vast desert sea of dunes beneath late-afternoon light with tiny ruins far below
records.altText: A huge adult brass dragon stands across a dune crest with vast wings spread and fire rolling from its jaws.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Lightning, Slashing, Thunder.
records.appearance: A huge mature coastal dragon with a powerful four-legged body, ridged beaklike snout, long swept-back horns, finlike cheek blades, one pair of enormous wings, and a deep swimming tail. Dark bronze scales carry extensive sea-green patina, while electric light runs in branching channels across the neck and jaw.
records.silhouette: Huge quadrupedal dragon with a ridged beaklike head, two long rearward horns, vast wings, strong chest, and fin-edged aquatic tail.
records.pose: Rising from a cliff-breaking wave with all four limbs spread for landing, wings spanning the spray, and a straight lightning breath firing seaward.
records.environment: A storm-beaten coastal fortress built across black sea cliffs and crashing surf
records.altText: A huge adult bronze dragon rises through crashing surf and fires lightning past a coastal fortress.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A huge mature hill dragon with a supple four-legged frame, long angular head, swept cheek horns, layered brow plates, one pair of broad climbing wings, and a highly expressive tail. Copper scales are richly weathered with broad verdigris patches, and clear acid vapor threads from a knowing half-open mouth.
records.silhouette: Huge agile quadrupedal dragon with a long low head, backward cheek horns, broad wings, climbing claws, and a curling animated tail.
records.pose: Descending headfirst along a near-vertical red-rock wall, three feet engaged, one claw reaching, and wings flared to pivot.
records.environment: A towering red-rock canyon honeycombed with natural arches and narrow ledges
records.altText: A huge verdigris-patched adult copper dragon climbs headfirst down a red canyon wall.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Force, Slashing.
records.appearance: A huge mature dragon with a long serpentine four-legged body, elegant many-ridged horn crown, paired flowing barbels, one pair of vast sail-like wings, and a broad finned swimming tail. Rich gold scales deepen toward amber along the spine, while intense white-orange fire glows through the long throat.
records.silhouette: Huge elongated quadrupedal dragon with a graceful horned head, trailing facial barbels, enormous wings, sinuous neck, and fin-edged tail.
records.pose: Rising from a river in a long ascending curve, all four feet visible beneath the body, wings opening, and fire streaming forward in a controlled arc.
records.environment: A broad river valley between forest and grassland in clear late-afternoon light
records.altText: A huge adult gold dragon rises from a river, long barbels streaming as it breathes white-orange fire.

records.appearance: A huge mature forest dragon with a long four-legged frame, narrow hooked snout, a tall leaflike crest sweeping from brow down the neck, one pair of vast wings, and a flexible swimming tail. Deep green scales carry bark and moss patterns across old scars, while dense yellow poison coils behind the teeth.
records.silhouette: Huge lean quadrupedal dragon with a long low head, high single crest, broad canopy-like wings, sinuous neck, and winding tail.
records.pose: Standing across enormous roots with all four feet spread, wings filling the gaps between trees, and a broad poison cloud rolling from the lowered head.
records.environment: An immense old-growth forest flooded between roots beneath a low canopy of mist
records.altText: A huge adult green dragon stands over ancient roots while a yellow poison cloud pours from its jaws.

records.appearance: A huge mature volcanic dragon with a massive four-legged body, broad wedge-shaped skull, towering swept-back horns, one pair of dark powerful wings, and a heavy tail armored in jagged ridges. Deep crimson scales are blackened along old battle scars, and molten light burns between the throat plates.
records.silhouette: Huge muscular quadrupedal dragon with a broad horned head, immense wings, deep armored shoulders, jagged spine, and heavy tail.
records.pose: Standing over a volcanic ridge with all four feet crushing basalt, wings spanning the crater, and a torrent of fire erupting from the jaws.
records.environment: A volcanic mountain caldera with lava channels and distant ruined masonry for scale
records.altText: A huge adult red dragon stands over a caldera and breathes a torrent of fire across black basalt.

records.appearance: A huge mature mountain dragon with a broad four-legged body, shield-shaped head, long paired horns swept smoothly backward, layered silver cheek blades, one pair of immense pale wings, and a powerful tapering tail. Brushed scales hold cold blue reflections, while frost and a nearly invisible stilling haze mingle around the jaws.
records.silhouette: Huge quadrupedal dragon with a broad shield head, two elegant backward horns, layered cheek plates, enormous wings, and deep chest.
records.pose: Landing across a high stone bridge with all four feet visible, wings arched overhead, and two layered breath effects rolling from the muzzle.
mustInclude: cold breath with subtle stilling effect
records.environment: A mountain city bridge above a cloud-filled chasm with ice feathering the stone
records.altText: A huge adult silver dragon lands across a mountain bridge as frost and stilling mist leave its jaws.

sourceFacts: Movement modes: Burrow, Fly, Swim, Walk.
records.appearance: A huge mature arctic dragon with a low muscular four-legged body, broad wedge head, jagged crown spines, one pair of powerful pale wings, webbed swimming feet with hooked claws, and a thick ice-breaking tail. Scarred white scales deepen to glacier blue along the back, and rime constantly renews around the jaws.
records.silhouette: Huge low quadrupedal dragon with a spiked head crown, broad wings, heavy shoulders, thick tail, and wide ice-gripping feet.
records.pose: Climbing over the edge of a shattered ice floe with wings raised against the gale and a broad cone of cold pouring forward.
records.environment: A frozen sea broken into towering blue pressure ridges beneath a blizzard sky
records.altText: A huge adult white dragon climbs across broken sea ice while breathing a cone of freezing vapor.

records.appearance: A towering sentient vortex whose broad upper body and long arms are shaped from layered currents of translucent air. Dust, leaves, and fine droplets reveal the spiral motion around a hollow calm core, while the lower body narrows into a twisting funnel that never quite touches the ground.
records.silhouette: Tall tapering cyclone with wide cloudlike shoulders, two streaming arms, a featureless wind-carved head, and no solid legs.
records.pose: Banking forward in a corkscrew surge, one sweeping arm gathering into a thunderous striking arc.
mustInclude: entire body formed from moving air
records.environment: A high rocky plateau beneath fast-moving clouds with grasses flattened by the wind
records.altText: A large humanoid vortex of pale air surges across a rocky plateau amid spiraling leaves and dust.

records.appearance: A large bipedal theropod with a deep narrow skull, ridged brows above the eyes, a flexible neck, strong three-fingered forelimbs, and a long balancing tail. Muscular hind legs carry the body horizontally, and pebbled scales are interrupted by sparse filament-like quills along the neck and spine.
records.silhouette: A horizontal predatory dinosaur balanced between a large toothy head and long stiff tail, with two strong hind legs and short arms.
records.pose: Striding into a tight turn with jaws open, inner foot planted and tail sweeping wide for balance.
records.environment: An open fern-dotted grassland with dusty ground and a distant conifer line
records.altText: A dusty olive allosaurus turns across open grassland with jaws spread and its long tail balancing the charge.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient swamp dragon with a famine-lean four-legged body, enormously long skull-like head, monumental forward-curving horns, one pair of ragged colossal wings, and a serpentlike swimming tail. Centuries of acid have pitted the black armor into green-edged channels, and corrosive vapor rolls continuously from the jaws.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan gaunt quadrupedal dragon with an immense skeletal head, two huge forward horns, tattered colossal wings, long neck, and whip tail.
records.pose: Uncoiling from a drowned ruin with all four limbs spread among towers, wings rising through the fog, and a river of acid crossing the water.
records.environment: A drowned swamp city where broken towers and ancient cypress trees barely reach the dragon's shoulders
records.altText: An ancient black dragon rises through a drowned city, its skull-like head pouring acid across the swamp.

records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient desert dragon with a continent-long four-legged frame, one titanic forward-pointing nasal horn, massive ear frills, one pair of colossal angular wings, and foreclaws shaped like excavation blades. Cobalt armor is scoured pale at the ridges and fused to glassy patches by countless lightning discharges.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan quadrupedal dragon with one enormous spear-like nasal horn, great ear frills, colossal wings, shovel foreclaws, and long tail.
records.pose: Rising beneath a whole canyon floor as all four limbs break through stone and sand, wings forming a storm front, and lightning striking along the horn.
records.environment: A vast desert canyon swallowed by a supernatural sandstorm and descending thundercloud
records.altText: An ancient blue dragon erupts beneath a canyon as lightning follows its titanic horn through a sandstorm.

records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient desert dragon with an enormously long four-legged body, weathered shieldlike head, vast lateral facial plates, paired chin spines, one pair of continent-wide wings, and a tail furrowed by ages of burrowing. Brass scales range from bright worn ridges to nearly black recesses, with heat shimmering across every breath.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan quadrupedal dragon with an immense broad head, sweeping side horns, colossal wings, long low body, and dune-carving tail.
records.pose: Rising from beneath an entire dune field, four limbs driving through the sand as the wings unfurl and a vast line of fire brightens the horizon.
records.environment: An immense desert basin where ruined towers appear tiny beneath the dragon and moving dunes
records.altText: An ancient brass dragon rises beneath a dune field, its colossal wings and fire dwarfing distant ruins.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Lightning, Slashing, Thunder.
records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient coastal dragon with an immense four-legged body, monumental beaklike head, sweeping rearward horns, finlike cheek blades, one pair of colossal wings, and a deep ocean-going tail. Ancient bronze scales are almost overtaken by verdigris, barnacle scars, and salt-polished ridges, while lightning maps every contour.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan quadrupedal dragon with a huge ridged head, long backward horns, colossal wings, powerful chest, and broad fin-edged swimming tail.
records.pose: Surging from the sea across a fortress-sized reef, all four legs driving through water, wings unfolding, and a horizon-spanning lightning breath firing forward.
records.environment: A storm ocean breaking across a reef and tiny coastal citadel beneath the dragon
records.altText: An ancient verdigris-covered bronze dragon surges from a storm ocean and breathes lightning over a reef.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient hill dragon with an extraordinarily long flexible four-legged body, angular head, immense swept cheek horns, layered brow plates, one pair of colossal climbing wings, and a tail that curls around entire rock spires. Copper scales form a map of bright worn edges and deep turquoise patina accumulated over centuries.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan agile quadrupedal dragon with a long low head, huge backward cheek horns, colossal wings, spread climbing claws, and looping tail.
records.pose: Wrapped across a chain of sandstone pillars with all four claws engaged, wings bridging the gaps, and acid breath tracing a pale curve below.
records.environment: A vast badland of red rock pillars and arches, each reduced to footholds beneath the dragon
records.altText: An ancient verdigris-covered copper dragon spans red-rock pillars with colossal wings and curling acid breath.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Force, Slashing.
records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient dragon with an immense serpentine four-legged body, elaborate natural horn crown, long paired barbels, one pair of colossal sail-like wings, and a broad finned tail. Gold scales range from sun-bright worn edges to deep amber recesses, and a furnace-white glow fills the entire throat and chest.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan elongated quadrupedal dragon with an elegant crowned head, very long barbels, colossal wings, winding neck, and fin-edged tail.
records.pose: Coiling through the sky above a river valley with all four limbs drawn into the long curve, wings spanning the horizon, and fire descending in a controlled sun-bright stream.
records.environment: A vast river valley of forest and grassland reduced to a living map beneath the dragon
records.altText: An ancient gold dragon coils across the sky above a river valley while breathing a sun-bright stream of fire.

records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient forest dragon with an impossibly long four-legged body, narrow hooked skull, towering leaflike crest, one pair of colossal wings, and a winding tail suited to submerged movement. Layered green scales resemble bark, moss, and old leaves across centuries of scars, while poison fog pours continuously between the teeth.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan lean quadrupedal dragon with a long low head, enormous single crest, canopy-wide wings, serpentine neck, and looping tail.
records.pose: Threaded through an entire grove of ancient trees with all four feet hidden among roots, wings becoming a false canopy, and poison flooding the forest floor.
records.environment: A primordial flooded forest where immense trees appear small against the hidden dragon
records.altText: An ancient green dragon blends into a primordial forest canopy while poison fog floods the roots below.

records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient volcanic dragon with a mountain-heavy four-legged body, enormous wedge skull, forest of long swept-back horns, one pair of scorched colossal wings, and a ridged tail powerful enough to shatter towers. Ancient crimson scales are blackened, cracked, and molten at the deepest seams.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan muscular quadrupedal dragon with a massive horned head, colossal wings, fortress-like shoulders, jagged spine, and crushing tail.
records.pose: Climbing over a volcanic fortress as all four limbs crush masonry, wings fill the ash sky, and a broad torrent of fire turns the foreground white-hot.
records.environment: A volcanic mountain fortress and caldera dwarfed beneath ash clouds and the dragon's body
records.altText: An ancient red dragon crushes a volcanic fortress beneath its colossal body and fills the ash sky with fire.

records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient mountain dragon with a monumental four-legged body, vast shield-shaped head, paired horns sweeping far behind the skull, layered silver cheek blades, one pair of colossal pale wings, and a long stately tail. Centuries of fine scratches soften the mirrorlike scales, while cold and a silent paralyzing haze radiate from every breath.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan quadrupedal dragon with an immense shield head, two sweeping horns, layered cheek plates, colossal wings, and deep mountain-heavy chest.
records.pose: Perched across several mountain towers at once with all four limbs visible, wings opening beyond the frame, and a vast double-layered breath cloud descending.
records.environment: A high mountain city whose tallest towers barely rise beneath the dragon and surrounding clouds
records.altText: An ancient silver dragon spans mountain towers as a vast cloud of frost and stilling mist descends from its jaws.

sourceFacts: Movement modes: Burrow, Fly, Swim, Walk.
records.appearance: A gargantuan ancient arctic dragon with a brutally powerful four-legged frame, massive wedge-shaped head, forest of backward ice-like crown spines, one pair of scarred colossal wings, and a thick tail capable of breaking glaciers. Layered white scales are cracked blue with age, and permanent rime hangs from the jaws and wing joints.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan low quadrupedal dragon with a huge spined head crown, colossal wings, deep shoulders, wide clawed feet, and glacier-heavy tail.
records.pose: Hauling its full bulk over a shattered glacier ridge as both wings blot out the snow and a vast cold breath freezes blowing spray in midair.
records.environment: A polar glacier field fractured into mountain-sized pressure ridges beneath a whiteout sky
records.altText: An ancient white dragon climbs over a shattered glacier while its colossal wings darken the snow and cold floods the air.

records.appearance: An empty suit of full plate armor held upright by invisible force. The helmet visor is black and vacant, every articulated plate is present, and faint arcane light leaks through narrow joints without forming a body inside.
records.silhouette: A broad-shouldered armored humanoid with a closed helm, heavy gauntlets, plated skirt, and firmly planted sabatons.
records.pose: Advancing with both empty gauntlets raised for a crushing slam, torso rigid and unnaturally balanced.
records.environment: A shadowed castle corridor with worn flagstones and restrained blue ambient light
records.altText: An empty dark-steel suit of animated plate armor advances through a castle corridor with raised fists.

records.appearance: A riderless longsword held aloft by invisible magic, with a straight double-edged steel blade, practical crossguard, leather-wrapped grip, and heavy pommel. Cold blue runes pulse faintly along the fuller while dust circles the empty space where a wielder would stand.
records.silhouette: Single upright sword angled forward, clearly separated from the ground and unsupported by any hand.
records.pose: Darting point-first through a tight turn, blade tilted diagonally as the hilt trails its motion.
records.environment: A shadowed armory with weapon racks blurred well behind the flying blade
records.altText: An unsupported steel sword darts through a dark armory with faint blue runes glowing along its blade.

records.appearance: A large, heavy floor rug animated into a predatory sheet, its woven geometric pattern bending across deep unnatural folds. Thick tasseled edges curl like grasping fingers, while the central fabric arches into a wave ready to wrap a victim; it has no face, limbs, or floating aura.
records.silhouette: A broad rectangular textile rising from the floor in a curling vertical wave, with corners and tassels reaching inward.
records.pose: Launching from the floor with both long edges folding together as if closing around an unseen standing figure.
records.environment: A neglected manor gallery with bare flagstones and furniture kept soft and distant
records.altText: A faded crimson animated rug rises from a manor floor, folding its tasseled edges inward to smother prey.

records.appearance: A horse-sized burrowing insect with a low segmented body, six powerful legs, and overlapping plates of earth-stained chitin. Broad digging forelimbs flank a wedge-shaped head armed with hooked mandibles, and a swollen throat sac gleams acidic yellow beneath the jaw.
records.silhouette: A long low six-legged insect with armored segments, oversized shovel forelegs, wide mandibles, and a tapering abdomen.
records.pose: Bursting diagonally from a fresh tunnel with foreclaws throwing soil and mandibles spreading to spray acid.
records.environment: A torn-up grassland field around a dark burrow mouth with airborne soil framing the subject
records.altText: A plated ankheg erupts from a grassland burrow, six legs braced as acid gathers between its mandibles.

records.appearance: A huge low-slung herbivorous dinosaur protected by rows of bony plates and rounded knobs across its broad back. Four columnar legs support the heavy body, a beaked head stays close to the ground, and the long rigid tail ends in a massive paired bone club.
records.silhouette: A very low broad quadruped with armored arched back, small beaked head, short legs, and long club-ended tail.
records.pose: Pivoting on planted forefeet while the armored hips drive the tail club through a wide horizontal swing.
records.environment: A dry fern-dotted grassland with open ground around the full arc of the tail
records.altText: A huge armored ankylosaurus pivots across dusty grassland and swings its massive tail club.

records.appearance: A powerful natural ape with a deep barrel chest, long muscular arms, shorter bowed legs, and a dark expressive face beneath a heavy brow. Dense charcoal-brown fur covers the body except for the hands, feet, ears, and face, and one broad hand closes around a rough throwing stone.
records.silhouette: Broad-shouldered tailless primate with long arms reaching near the ground, compact legs, and high domed torso.
records.pose: Standing in a forward lean with knuckles braced and one arm drawn back holding a fist-sized rock.
records.environment: A humid forest clearing with broken fruit and one mossy boulder
records.altText: A muscular charcoal ape braces in a forest clearing with one long arm drawn back around a stone.

records.appearance: A colossal prehistoric marine turtle with a broad leathery carapace stretched over a visible bony framework, an enormous hooked beak, and four long paddle-shaped flippers. Its mottled shell is scarred by age and carries small barnacles, while a short tail follows the massive hydrodynamic body.
records.silhouette: A huge flattened sea turtle with wide oval shell, four long flippers, large beaked head, and very short tail.
records.pose: Gliding just above the seabed with front flippers in a powerful downstroke and beaked head turning toward the viewer.
records.environment: A sun-dappled coastal seabed with small fish and low reef outcrops establishing immense scale
records.altText: A colossal scarred archelon glides over a coastal seabed on four long flippers beneath a broad leathery shell.

records.appearance: A small-statured elder spellcaster whose simple layered robes and carefully repaired mantle show decades of use rather than rank through ornament. A compact focus hangs at the sternum, several spell diagrams orbit the hands, and a translucent ward bends the background light around the entire figure.
records.silhouette: Compact robed elder with a high mantle, narrow staff secured behind one shoulder, two raised casting hands, and a broad circular ward.
records.pose: Standing calmly inside a curved magical ward while directing several force bolts with small precise movements of both hands.
mustAvoid: elemental fire as the main spell
records.environment: A high circular study with floating diagrams and a night sky visible through tall windows
records.altText: A small elder archmage stands within a clear magical ward while directing bright force bolts.

records.appearance: A small adult infiltration specialist in close-fitted layered armor designed to silence movement, with a hood that leaves peripheral vision clear and no decorative insignia. A narrow shortsword is held in reverse grip, while a compact light crossbow and carefully sealed poison vials sit within immediate reach.
records.silhouette: Compact hooded humanoid with close-fitting armor, short blade held low, light crossbow at the hip, and a narrow forward-leaning stance.
records.pose: Dropping into a quiet landing from a low wall, shortsword ready and the free hand reaching toward the crossbow.
records.environment: A quiet rain-damp courtyard with deep architectural shadows and a low stone wall
records.altText: A compact hooded assassin lands silently in a dark courtyard with shortsword and light crossbow ready.

records.appearance: A waist-high living shrub pulled free of the soil, its tangled root mass divided into several sturdy walking roots and its woody branches flexing like simple arms. Knots and bark folds suggest an alert face without becoming a carved wooden mask.
records.silhouette: Low irregular crown of leafy branches above a narrow trunk, two branch-arms, and a splayed cluster of root-legs.
records.pose: Scuttling forward on spread roots with one thorny branch drawn back to rake.
records.environment: A damp woodland clearing with leaf litter and a small patch of disturbed soil behind it
records.altText: A small awakened shrub scuttles across a woodland floor on tangled roots with thorny branches raised.

records.appearance: A huge living hardwood tree whose trunk has twisted into a slow, powerful torso. Two main boughs articulate as massive arms, split roots lift and plant like many blunt feet, and knots in the bark form a stern suggestion of a face beneath a broad natural crown.
records.silhouette: A towering trunk-bodied figure with a wide leafy crown, two heavy branch arms, and a many-rooted walking base.
records.pose: Taking one ponderous step as a low bough sweeps forward in a broad slam and loose leaves scatter.
records.environment: An old-growth forest clearing with smaller trees providing a clear sense of the creature's height
records.altText: A huge awakened oak strides through an old forest on lifting roots, one massive branch sweeping forward.

records.appearance: A towering flightless bird with powerful running legs, a shaggy feathered body, small useless wings, and a massive laterally flattened beak shaped like a chopping axe. Its long bare neck and keen eyes balance a heavy rust-and-black torso.
records.silhouette: Tall two-legged bird with a long neck, tiny wings, rounded body, and an enormous deep wedge-shaped beak.
records.pose: Charging in a long ground stride with neck thrust forward and axe-shaped beak opened slightly.
records.environment: A cold open grassland with low scrub and wind-blown dust
records.altText: A towering rust-black axe beak charges across grassland on two legs with its huge wedge-shaped bill forward.

records.appearance: A broad elemental smith shaped like a compact humanoid of living bronze, with a disciplined square stance and fire forming both its swept hair and full beard. Geometric scale armor covers the torso and limbs, and both hands grip a heavy forge hammer whose head glows along the striking face.
records.silhouette: A stocky armored humanoid with flame hair and beard, broad shoulders, short powerful limbs, and an oversized square hammer.
records.pose: Standing sentinel with the burning hammer held diagonally across the body and fire rolling outward from the shoulders.
records.environment: A vast planar forge gate of black stone and bronze, lit primarily by the sentinel's own flames
records.altText: A bronze azer sentinel guards a black forge gate with fiery hair and a heat-bright hammer held ready.

records.appearance: A lean, ground-foraging baboon with a doglike muzzle, heavy brow, close gray-brown coat, and a rough mantle of longer hair around the shoulders. Its long limbs end in dexterous dark hands and feet, while the tail arcs behind for balance.
records.silhouette: Low, forward-leaning primate with long arms, high shoulders, a projecting muzzle, and an arched tail.
records.pose: Bounding across a sun-warmed rock on all fours, head turned toward the viewer with teeth briefly exposed.
records.environment: A broken woodland escarpment with scrub and pale afternoon light
records.altText: A lean gray-brown baboon bounds over a rocky woodland ledge with its long tail arched behind it.

records.appearance: A tiny but tenacious badger with a squat body, wedge-shaped head, rounded ears, and short digging legs. Bold pale stripes run from its nose over a grizzled dark coat, and soil clings to the long curved claws of its forefeet.
records.silhouette: Very low barrel-shaped body with a pointed head, short tail, and broad clawed forepaws.
records.pose: Half-emerged from a shallow burrow, shoulders braced and one forepaw throwing loose soil aside.
records.environment: A ferny forest bank with exposed roots and freshly disturbed earth
records.altText: A striped badger braces at the mouth of a forest burrow with soil clinging to its digging claws.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Force, Lightning.
records.appearance: A huge abyssal war-demon with a towering horned humanoid body, one pair of vast batlike wings, cloven armored feet, and a long tail trailing through its fire aura. One hand grips a many-tailed flame whip and the other a broad blade made brilliant by captive lightning, while cracks in the dark hide glow like a furnace.
records.silhouette: Huge upright fiend with two sweeping horns, one enormous wing pair, broad shoulders, a long sword, curling whip, and trailing tail.
records.pose: Striding through fire with wings spread high, lightning blade raised, and the flame whip carving a bright arc across the foreground.
records.environment: A shattered abyssal bridge surrounded by falling embers and distant volcanic light
records.altText: A huge horned balor strides across a shattered bridge with a flame whip, lightning blade, and vast dark wings.

records.appearance: A compact adult humanoid outlaw in layered, travel-worn clothing and light protection chosen for speed. A scarf and low hood partly conceal the face; a curved scimitar is held in one hand and a light crossbow is slung within easy reach.
records.silhouette: Small hooded humanoid with an asymmetrical cloak, curved sword at the side, and compact crossbow across the back.
records.pose: Half-crouched beside the road, scimitar drawn while glancing toward an unseen approaching traveler.
records.environment: A lonely roadside cut with scrub, weathered rocks, and subdued overcast light
records.altText: A small hooded bandit waits beside a lonely road with scimitar drawn and crossbow on their back.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult outlaw commander in layered leather, a reinforced coat, and a weathered sash hung with maps and signal tokens. A curved scimitar is held in the leading hand, while a single early fantasy pistol rides in a sturdy belt holster as an expensive badge of rank.
records.silhouette: A compact commanding figure with a long coat, curved sword extended, pistol at the belt, and scarf trailing behind.
records.pose: Standing atop a roadside wagon step, scimitar pointing an order while the other hand hovers near the holstered pistol.
records.environment: A forest-road ambush beside a stopped wagon, with distant accomplices reduced to soft silhouettes
records.altText: A compact bandit captain commands a roadside ambush with scimitar extended and a pistol holstered at the waist.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A lean infernal hunter covered from crown to heel in backward-pointing barbs, with a narrow horned skull, long clawed arms, powerful climbing feet, and a sinuous spiked tail. Its hide resembles overlapping plates of dark fired clay, and furnace light pulses faintly in the seams around its mouth and chest.
records.silhouette: Angular upright fiend with a thorny outline, long arms, hooked claws, swept horns, digitigrade legs, and a whip-like barbed tail.
records.pose: Crouched against a basalt wall with one claw anchored to stone and the other hand cupping a compact infernal flame.
records.environment: A sheer basalt escarpment in an infernal wasteland with a low red horizon
records.altText: A thorn-covered barbed devil clings to basalt while gathering fire in one clawed hand.

records.appearance: A squat reptilian monstrosity with a broad crocodilian head, eight short clawed legs, and a thick low body armored by pebbled scales. Irregular bony spurs rise along the back, while two pale green eyes burn with a mineral light that seems to dull the color of nearby stone.
records.silhouette: A low elongated reptile on eight splayed legs with broad head, short tail, and jagged dorsal spurs.
records.pose: Crawling over broken rock with all eight feet engaged, head turned so its petrifying gaze meets the viewer.
mustInclude: exactly eight visible legs where composition permits
records.environment: A rocky Underdark shelf scattered with cracked stone fragments and a single weathered statue shape
records.altText: An eight-legged basilisk crawls over cavern rock, bony spurs raised and pale green petrifying eyes fixed forward.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Mountain, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A tiny natural bat with a compact furred body, a short muzzle, large alert ears, small dark eyes, and broad finger-boned wings joined by thin membranes. Its hind feet curl beneath the body and the wing membranes show delicate veins in the light.
records.silhouette: A small central body beneath two broad angular wings, with large pointed ears and tiny hooked feet.
records.pose: Banking in mid-flight with one wing slightly forward, ears raised as if tracking a sound.
mustInclude: two wings with clearly readable finger bones
records.environment: The mouth of a quiet limestone cave at dusk with a soft, uncluttered background
records.altText: A small charcoal-brown bat banks through the moonlit mouth of a limestone cave.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A lean, disciplined devil with rust-red scaled hide, swept horns, clawed feet, and a jaw surrounded by a living beard of short barbed tendrils. It carries a long black infernal glaive in both hands, and angular plates of natural armor overlap the shoulders and shins.
records.silhouette: A tall wiry humanoid with horned head, bristling facial tendrils, long tail, reverse-jointed legs, and a long-bladed glaive.
records.pose: Advancing in a precise low guard with glaive leveled and the barbed beard flaring toward a nearby foe.
records.environment: A regimented infernal causeway of black iron and ash with distant red haze
records.altText: A rust-red bearded devil advances along an infernal causeway with barbed facial tendrils and a black glaive.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Bludgeoning, Lightning, Piercing.
records.appearance: A huge serpentine monstrosity with a long sinuous body, exactly twelve short climbing legs, a narrow crocodilian head, swept horn ridges, and a deep expandable throat. Blue armored scales flash with internal electricity along the spine, while the underside is flexible enough to coil and constrict.
records.silhouette: Very long low serpent body with twelve evenly spaced legs, a horned narrow head, arched neck, and tapering tail but no wings.
records.pose: Coiling down a cavern wall in a tight spiral, all twelve feet gripping stone as a jagged line of lightning gathers in the jaws.
records.environment: A vast vertical Underdark shaft with mineral shelves and distant blue crystal light
records.altText: A twelve-legged blue behir coils down a cavern wall as white lightning gathers in its jaws.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult raider with a dense, athletic build, scarred forearms, and a mane of sweat-dark hair kept clear of the eyes by a leather tie. Patchwork hide and layered wool leave the arms mobile, and both hands carry a broad, nicked greataxe built for repeated heavy swings.
records.silhouette: A compact wide-legged humanoid with wild hair, bare forearms, a two-handed axe raised high, and ragged hide layers.
records.pose: Charging through a full overhead axe swing, shoulders turned and expression fixed in bloodied determination.
records.environment: A cold rocky hillside under low cloud with trampled grass and no other combatants visible
records.altText: A compact hide-clad berserker charges across a rocky hill with a nicked greataxe raised overhead.

records.appearance: A natural black bear with a compact muscular body, straight facial profile, tall rounded ears, and glossy short fur broken by a small tan muzzle. Long curved claws show beneath agile forepaws suited to climbing, and the shoulders remain lower than a brown bear's hump.
records.silhouette: Medium quadrupedal bear with a level back, rounded ears, short tail, and broad clawed paws.
records.pose: Climbing down a broad tree trunk headfirst, foreclaws anchored while one hind foot searches for bark.
records.environment: A temperate forest beside a broad rough-barked tree in diffuse daylight
records.altText: A glossy black bear climbs headfirst down a broad forest tree with curved foreclaws anchored.

records.appearance: A young black dragon with four lean legs, two leathery wings, a long swimming tail, and a narrow skull whose swept horns curve forward beside the cheeks. Glossy black scales carry an oily green sheen, and pale acid etching marks the teeth and throat plates.
records.silhouette: A low quadrupedal dragon with forward-curving cheek horns, high folded wings, long neck, and paddle-strong tail.
records.pose: Crouched on a half-submerged root with wings opened for balance and a strand of smoking acid falling from its jaws.
records.environment: A stagnant cypress swamp with low green mist and dark water reflecting the wyrmling
records.altText: A young black dragon crouches on a swamp root, oily wings spread as smoking acid drips from its jaws.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Lightning, Slashing.
records.appearance: A large pool of glossy black living ooze with the depth and weight of poured tar. Its edges split into slow branching lobes that climb walls and rejoin, while corroded mineral grains and faint blue electrical flickers move beneath an otherwise featureless surface.
records.silhouette: A broad low pool with several irregular rising lobes, a thick central dome, dripping wall contact, and no head.
records.pose: Crawling across floor and wall simultaneously as one dissolving pseudopod reaches over a rusting metal grate.
records.environment: A wet Underdark drainage chamber with a rusted grate visibly dissolving beneath the ooze
records.altText: A glossy black pudding spreads across an Underdark floor and wall while a metal grate corrodes beneath it.

records.appearance: A lean fey hound with a narrow intelligent face, upright ears, long runner's legs, and a smooth golden-tan coat patterned by faint pale whorls. Its outline doubles subtly in cool light as if the animal occupies two nearby positions during a blink.
records.silhouette: Athletic dog with high ears, deep chest, long legs, and a straight tail passing through a faint offset echo.
records.pose: Reappearing in a low running bound, forepaws just touching ground while a fading duplicate trails behind.
records.environment: A bright old-growth forest path with pale motes suspended between trunks
records.altText: A golden blink dog reappears in a running bound on a forest path with a pale afterimage behind it.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Coastal, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A fierce small hawk with a deep rust-red breast, dark slate wings, a hooked black beak, and unusually robust talons. Its forward glare and scarlet feather markings give the natural raptor a predatory identity without turning it into a supernatural beast.
records.silhouette: Compact raptor with sharply angled wings, short hooked beak, fanned tail, and large lowered talons.
records.pose: Diving out of a steep bank with talons extended and wings partially folded for speed.
records.environment: Open mountain air above a dark pine slope with cold side light
records.altText: A rust-breasted blood hawk dives above a pine slope with slate wings tucked and talons extended.

records.appearance: A young blue dragon with four lean legs, two powerful wings, a long tail, and a wedge-shaped head dominated by one tall horn rising from the snout. Cobalt scales fade to sand along the belly, broad ear-like frills sweep backward, and static crawls across the teeth and wing joints.
records.silhouette: A compact quadrupedal dragon with a single high nasal horn, swept head frills, raised wings, and long tapering tail.
records.pose: Emerging from a wind-carved dune with wings angled against blowing sand and lightning gathering in its open jaws.
records.environment: A storm-dark desert dune field with blowing sand and a distant line of lightning
records.altText: A blue dragon wyrmling rises from a storm-dark dune, single nasal horn high as lightning fills its jaws.

records.appearance: A compact wild boar with a bristling dark coat, wedge-shaped head, high shoulders, small fierce eyes, and two curved lower tusks. Mud cakes its cloven hooves and the coarse ridge of mane along its spine lifts as it prepares to charge.
records.silhouette: Low barrel-bodied animal with high shoulders, long head, short legs, raised bristle ridge, and short tail.
records.pose: Launching into a charge with head low, one forehoof tearing loose turf and tusks angled forward.
records.environment: A churned forest clearing with broken fern and wet earth
records.altText: A dark bristled wild boar charges across wet forest earth with curved tusks lowered.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A tall skeletal-looking devil with an insectile ribbed torso, narrow horned skull, very long clawed arms, digitigrade legs, one pair of dry leathery wings, and a segmented tail ending in a large venomous stinger. Pale bone-colored armor plates are part of the body rather than worn equipment.
records.silhouette: Large gaunt fiend with a riblike chest, long limbs, two angular wings, horned head, and an arched scorpionlike stinger tail.
records.pose: Descending in a narrow dive with claws extended, wings folded partway, and the stinger tail driven forward beneath the body.
records.environment: A steep infernal canyon lined with narrow ledges and rising heat haze
records.altText: A gaunt bone devil dives through an infernal canyon with its segmented venomous tail thrust forward.

records.appearance: A young brass dragon with four clawed legs, two broad leathery wings, a long tail, and warm metallic scales polished brighter along the chest. A wide shieldlike brow plate, paired swept-back horns, and layered chin plates distinguish its wedge-shaped head, while heat shimmers faintly at the throat.
records.silhouette: Compact quadrupedal dragon with high folded wings, broad plated head, paired horns, and long tapering tail.
records.pose: Standing alert on a dune ridge with wings half-open and one foreclaw raised as the neck gathers for breath.
records.environment: A wind-carved desert ruin at golden hour with open sand and pale stone
records.altText: A young brass dragon stands on a dune with two wings half-open and its broad plated head raised.

records.appearance: A young bronze dragon with four sturdy legs, two broad wings, a finned tail, and a sculpted head crowned by swept-back ribbed horns. Bronze scales darken toward blue-green at the joints, while faint electrical arcs jump between horn tips and along the throat.
records.silhouette: A compact quadrupedal dragon with backswept horns, broad wings, finned tail, and a high ridged head profile.
records.pose: Climbing from a tide pool onto black rock, one wing raised and head turned toward a gathering lightning charge.
records.environment: A storm-lit coastal shelf with tide pools and distant surf kept behind the subject
records.altText: A bronze dragon wyrmling climbs from a tide pool as white lightning flickers between its swept horns.

records.appearance: A massive brown bear with a pronounced shoulder hump, dish-shaped facial profile, small rounded ears, and dense grizzled fur ranging from dark umber to sunlit gold. Long pale foreclaws curve from broad paws beneath the heavy chest.
records.silhouette: Large quadrupedal bear with high shoulder hump, low head, thick limbs, rounded ears, and short tail.
records.pose: Rising partway from all fours with one forepaw sweeping outward and jaws open in a warning roar.
records.environment: A rocky forest riverbank with broken logs and cold morning light
records.altText: A huge grizzled brown bear rises beside a forest river with one broad clawed paw sweeping outward.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Planar, Underdark.
records.appearance: A tall, long-limbed goblinoid hunter with dense ochre-brown fur, broad pointed ears, heavy shoulders, and arms that reach unnervingly far. Quiet layered leather and a ragged camouflage mantle soften its outline, while a brutal morningstar and several long javelins are carried for ambush and abduction.
records.silhouette: A lanky furred humanoid with long arms, wide ears, hunched shoulders, spiked morningstar, and tall javelins behind the back.
records.pose: Stepping silently from deep shadow with one long arm reaching to grapple and the morningstar held low in the other.
records.environment: The edge of a dim forest trail with layered trunks and a pool of shadow around the stalker
records.altText: A long-armed ochre bugbear stalker steps from forest shadow with morningstar low and javelins on its back.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Planar, Underdark.
records.appearance: A tall broad-shouldered fey goblinoid covered in coarse brown-black hair, with long pointed ears, a flattened nose, heavy brow, and arms disproportionately long enough to reach past the knees. Patched hide armor leaves those limbs free; one hand carries a squat light hammer while the other opens to seize prey.
records.silhouette: Large hairy goblinoid with very long arms, broad torso, pointed ears, one small hammer, and a grasping hand.
records.pose: Lunging from cover with one elongated arm reaching to grab and the hammer drawn back in the other.
records.environment: A dim forest ravine with a fallen trunk providing ambush cover
records.altText: A hairy bugbear warrior lunges from a forest ravine with one long hand grabbing and a hammer raised.

records.appearance: A massive four-legged burrowing predator with a broad wedge-shaped head, an enormous tooth-filled mouth, and a domed back protected by interlocking mineral-hard plates. Short powerful limbs end in wide digging claws, while the low-slung body narrows toward a thick balancing tail.
records.silhouette: Low armored oval body on four stout legs, with a shovel-like head, high plated back, heavy foreclaws, and short thick tail.
records.pose: Exploding halfway from the earth in a forward leap, foreclaws spread and broken turf flying around the open jaws.
records.environment: A rocky grassland slope torn open by a fresh underground passage
records.altText: An armored bulette bursts from a rocky hillside with jaws open and earth scattering from its digging claws.

records.appearance: A tall one-humped camel with long jointed legs, broad padded feet, a narrow expressive head, and a shaggy sand-colored coat thickest along the neck and hump. Its nostrils are narrow against dust and a simple rope halter lies loose around the muzzle.
records.silhouette: Long-legged ungulate with one prominent hump, high neck, small head, and short tufted tail.
records.pose: Striding across wind-rippled sand in profile, long neck raised and one broad forefoot lifting clear.
records.environment: A broad desert track under warm low sunlight with distant rock haze
records.altText: A one-humped sand-colored camel strides across a desert track on broad padded feet.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Urban.
records.appearance: A small, agile domestic cat with a lean torso, fine-boned legs, alert triangular ears, and luminous eyes. Short tabby fur follows the movement of its shoulders, and its long flexible tail curls upward as it judges a jump.
records.silhouette: Slender feline body on light paws with pointed ears, arched back, and a long upright tail.
records.pose: Balanced on a low wall with hindquarters gathered and one forepaw lifted before a spring.
records.environment: A quiet village garden wall at early morning with leaves softly out of focus
records.altText: A lean gray tabby cat pauses on a garden wall with one paw raised and green-gold eyes alert.

records.appearance: A disciplined fey cavalry warrior whose armored humanoid torso joins seamlessly at the waist to the withers of a tall, powerful horse. A long pike is leveled beneath one arm, a longbow and fitted quiver follow the equine flank, and practical segmented armor leaves all four legs free.
records.silhouette: A horse-bodied figure with upright humanoid torso, four equine legs, long horizontal pike, bow, and streaming tail.
records.pose: Trotting into a controlled charge with pike lowered, human shoulders steady above the driving equine body.
records.environment: A broad forest-edge meadow with pale planar light filtering between distant trees
records.altText: A chestnut centaur trooper advances across a meadow with pike lowered and longbow secured along the flank.

records.appearance: A tall infernal jailer with scarred gray-red hide, a severe featureless mask of flesh, and long arms wrapped in animated hooked chains. Additional lengths coil around the torso and trail across the floor under their own power, each link blackened by heat and edged for cutting rather than ornament.
records.silhouette: Lean upright fiend with a narrow smooth head, long arms spread wide, and many looping chains radiating from the body like metal serpents.
records.pose: Standing perfectly still while four animated chain lengths rear and strike around it, two forming grasping loops in the foreground.
records.environment: An infernal prison gallery of basalt cells and iron anchor rings
records.altText: A scarred chain devil stands in an infernal prison as hooked black chains coil and strike around it.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A huge winged predator built around a lionlike body, with a snarling lion head, a horned goat head rising beside it, and a red-scaled dragon head projecting from the opposite shoulder. Powerful leonine legs support the fused torso, one pair of leathery wings spans the back, and a long tail ends in a living serpent head.
records.silhouette: Large four-legged lion body with exactly three distinct front heads, one pair of batlike wings, and a long snake-headed tail.
records.pose: Launching from a mountain ledge with wings opening, lion paws extended, and the dragon head drawing in fire while the other heads track separate threats.
records.environment: A high broken mountain ridge beneath a smoky sunset with distant valleys for scale
records.altText: A three-headed chimera with lion body, goat and dragon heads, wings, and serpent tail leaps from a mountain ledge.

records.appearance: A towering amphibious crustacean aberration with a heavily plated lobsterlike body, many jointed walking legs, and two enormous asymmetrical pincers. A cluster of flexible sensory tentacles surrounds the mouth beneath small dark eyes, and its blue-green shell is layered with scars and mineral growth.
records.silhouette: A high armored crustacean with many low legs, two massive forward pincers, rounded shell, and short mouth tentacles.
records.pose: Wading from black cavern water with one pincer open to seize prey and the mouth tentacles fanned forward.
records.environment: A flooded Underdark vault with knee-deep black water and faint magical reflections
records.altText: A blue-green chuul wades from cavern water with massive pincers open and pale mouth tentacles spread.

records.appearance: A towering roughly sculpted humanoid of dense fired and unfired clay, with a blunt head, immense shoulders, long heavy arms, and simple carved channels for controlling runes. Its surface is cracked and repaired in layers, and faint acidic light seeps from a few deep fissures without revealing flesh or machinery.
records.silhouette: Large bulky humanoid with a featureless block head, sloped shoulders, extremely thick arms, clenched slab hands, and wide planted feet.
records.pose: Lurching into a two-fisted slam as fresh cracks open across the chest and liquid clay draws itself back together.
records.environment: An abandoned ceremonial courtyard with kiln-dark walls and clay dust underfoot
records.altText: A massive terracotta clay golem raises both fists in an abandoned courtyard, acidic light glowing through its cracks.

records.appearance: A broad subterranean aberration shaped like a living black mantle, with vast triangular winglike fins, a pale ribbed underside, a hidden central mouth of hooked teeth, and a long muscular tail ending in a blade-shaped tip. Two small red eyes sit near the front ridge, easily concealed when the creature folds itself shut.
records.silhouette: Wide manta-like body with two sweeping triangular fins, a short horned front, central underside maw, and one long tapering tail.
records.pose: Dropping from a cavern ceiling in a wide enveloping arc, underside exposed and tail whipping behind the spread fins.
records.environment: A lightless vaulted cavern with thin stalactites and a distant reflected glow
records.altText: A black manta-shaped cloaker drops from a cavern ceiling, exposing its ribbed underside and hooked mouth.

records.appearance: A majestic giant of immense height with cool blue-gray skin, flowing silver-white hair, and a powerful but refined build. Layered storm-colored robes and light ornate armor move in an unseen wind, while an enormous mace channels thunder and a compact dark cloud curls obediently around the free hand.
records.silhouette: Huge regal humanoid with flowing hair, high layered shoulders, long robes, an immense mace, and a small floating thundercloud.
records.pose: Hovering one stride above a cloud bridge with the thunderous mace lowered and one hand directing a coiling storm cloud.
records.environment: A lofty palace terrace suspended above a sea of clouds with distant towers for scale
records.altText: A regal blue-gray cloud giant hovers above a cloud bridge with a great mace and storm cloud in hand.

records.appearance: A small grotesque monstrosity combining a roosterlike head and feathered breast with a long reptilian body, two clawed legs, one pair of leathery batlike wings, and a tapering lizard tail. A toothed beak, fleshy comb, and pebbled scales meet in an unsettling but coherent animal form.
records.silhouette: Low two-legged chimera with a crested bird head, two raised bat wings, rounded body, and long reptile tail.
records.pose: Hopping forward from a stone with wings flared for balance and toothed beak snapping toward the viewer.
records.environment: A rough grassland wall with several small weathered stone shapes in the distance
records.altText: A rooster-headed cockatrice flares two leathery wings above its scaled body and long lizard tail.

records.appearance: A compact adult laborer with weathered features, work-roughened hands, and sturdy everyday clothes repaired many times. A plain wooden club is gripped uncertainly in both hands, while a small utility pouch and simple cord belt suggest an ordinary working life.
records.silhouette: Unarmored small-statured adult in a loose tunic and trousers, feet planted behind a short wooden club.
records.pose: Standing defensively with shoulders tense and the club held across the body rather than raised to attack.
records.environment: The edge of a modest farmyard with a fence and stacked tools kept in the background
records.altText: A compact adult commoner in patched work clothes holds a plain wooden club defensively in a farmyard.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Swamp, Underwater.
records.appearance: A large heavy-bodied constrictor with a broad blunt head, heat-dark eyes, muscular coils, and intricate brown saddle markings across olive scales. The thick torso narrows gradually into a powerful tail, with no venom fangs or ornamental hood.
records.silhouette: Long thick serpent arranged in overlapping muscular loops, head raised slightly above the central coil.
records.pose: Flowing around a low tree trunk in a tightening spiral, head tracking forward while the body anchors behind.
records.environment: A humid forest floor with a low mossed trunk and broad shadowed leaves
records.altText: A large olive-and-brown constrictor coils around a mossy trunk with its broad head raised.

records.appearance: A young copper dragon with four nimble clawed legs, two leathery wings, a long balancing tail, and burnished penny-colored scales. Heavy brow ridges sweep into paired backward horns, while layered cheek frills and a narrow mischievous muzzle give the head a distinct angular profile.
records.silhouette: Lean quadrupedal dragon with half-raised wings, horned wedge head, cheek frills, and long flexible tail.
records.pose: Clinging to a sloped rock with wings opening for balance, head cocked and throat tense before a line of acid.
records.environment: A dry hill-country ravine with layered red stone and sparse scrub
records.altText: A young copper dragon clings to a red-rock slope with two wings opening and cheek frills visible.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Urban.
Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A graceful celestial serpent covered in fine jewel-toned feathers rather than scales, with a refined draconic head, calm luminous eyes, and a pair of broad feathered wings. Long iridescent plumes flow from its crown and tail, giving the creature a sacred, ceremonial presence.
records.silhouette: An elegant S-curved serpent framed by two fully spread feathered wings and a long tapering plume-tail.
records.pose: Hovering in a serene ascending coil, wings open symmetrically and head turned in watchful profile.
records.environment: A sunlit forest-temple clearing with soft stone shapes and mist kept well behind the subject
records.altText: An iridescent feathered couatl coils in the air with broad wings spread above a misty temple clearing.

records.appearance: A tiny shore crab with a broad flattened carapace, stalked black eyes, five pairs of jointed limbs, and two modest pincers. Saltwater beads on its mottled shell, whose chipped edges and sandy underside blend naturally with tidal rock.
records.silhouette: Wide low shell flanked by two raised claws and four visible walking legs on each side.
records.pose: Scuttling sideways across a tide pool rim with one claw raised and the other testing the stone.
records.environment: A shallow coastal tide pool with wet stones and a thin wash of foam
records.altText: A mottled shore crab scuttles sideways over a wet tide-pool rock with one pincer raised.

records.appearance: A large river crocodile with a long armored body, broad wedge-shaped snout, ridged back, short powerful legs, and a deep muscular tail. Olive scales darken between raised scutes, while conical teeth remain visible even when the heavy jaws nearly close.
records.silhouette: Very low elongated reptile with four splayed legs, long snout, ridged back, and thick tapering tail.
records.pose: Surging from shallow water with forebody lifted, jaws opening and tail driving a broad sheet of spray.
records.environment: A reed-dark swamp channel with muddy shallows and low morning fog
records.altText: A large olive crocodile surges from a swamp channel with armored back, jaws open, and water spraying.

records.appearance: A compact adult zealot in plain layered robes adapted for concealment and travel, with an angular hood shadowing an intent face. One hand holds a crescent-bladed ritual sickle darkened by repeated ceremonies, while the other gathers a cord of small bone and iron tokens.
records.silhouette: Small hooded humanoid with a narrow robe, hunched shoulders, and a short hooked sickle held forward.
records.pose: Advancing in a guarded half-crouch with the ritual sickle close to the body and hood turned toward the viewer.
records.environment: A ruined cellar shrine lit by a few low candles and kept visually sparse
records.altText: A compact hooded cultist advances through a ruined cellar shrine with an iron ritual sickle.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult zealot in austere layered robes reinforced by a hidden leather harness. A dark pact blade with an asymmetrical edge is held close to the body, and thin strands of necrotic light crawl from ritual marks on the glove toward the weapon.
records.silhouette: A compact robed figure with narrow hood, layered hem, one jagged short blade, and an upraised ritual hand.
records.pose: Leaning into a guarded knife stance while the free hand completes a precise occult sign near the chest.
records.environment: A secluded stone cellar with a restrained chalk circle and low candles behind the subject
records.altText: A hooded cultist fanatic grips a dark pact blade as violet necrotic light threads across a ritual glove.

records.appearance: A cave predator resembling a charcoal-black flying mantle, with a rough conical back that can mimic a stalactite and exactly eight short muscular tentacles webbed around its pale underside. Eight tiny vestigial eyespots and a circular gripping maw hide beneath the folded body, while the scalloped membrane permits silent flight.
records.silhouette: Broad raylike mantle tapering to a central cone, with eight curling tentacles hanging beneath its rim.
records.pose: Dropping from a cavern ceiling with mantle spread, all eight tentacles opening around the hidden underside.
records.environment: A high Underdark ceiling where a pool of magical darkness softens the distant stone
records.altText: A charcoal darkmantle drops from a cavern ceiling with its broad mantle spread and eight tentacles open.

records.appearance: A lean desert monstrosity with one canine body supporting exactly two snarling hound heads on separate muscular necks. Its mangy rust-black coat reveals no wounds, but sickly saliva threads from both dark muzzles and the four long legs move with unnerving coordination.
records.silhouette: Low rangy four-legged hound with two distinct necks and heads above a single chest and one long tail.
records.pose: Stalking forward with the two heads watching opposite directions, shoulders low and one forepaw lifted.
records.environment: A moonlit desert ruin with dry scrub and broken pale stone
records.altText: A two-headed rust-black death dog stalks through a desert ruin with both muzzles snarling.

records.appearance: A healthy adult deer with a fine narrow head, large mobile ears, long graceful legs, and a warm russet-brown coat paling along the throat and belly. A modest branching rack crowns the head, built for a swift woodland animal rather than a fantastical beast.
records.silhouette: Long-legged ungulate with a slender neck, upright ears, short tail, and balanced branching antlers.
records.pose: Pausing mid-step in profile, one foreleg lifted and head turned sharply toward a distant sound.
records.environment: A quiet forest glade at dawn with dew-dark grass and slender trunks
records.altText: A russet deer pauses mid-step in a dawn forest glade, antlered head turned toward a sound.

records.appearance: A tall celestial guardian with a strong humanoid body, serene ageless face, luminous eyes, and one pair of broad feathered wings. Simple fitted armor and flowing pale cloth leave the arms free to wield a heavy radiant mace, while warm light repairs small fractures in both armor and feathers.
records.silhouette: Upright winged humanoid with one broad feathered wing pair, clean armored torso, flowing waist cloth, and a long-headed mace.
records.pose: Hovering just above the ground with wings in a stable downstroke and the holy mace held across the body in protection.
records.environment: A quiet planar threshold of pale stone suspended in a luminous cloudscape
records.altText: A winged deva hovers above pale stone with a radiant mace held protectively across its body.

records.appearance: A pony-sized wolf with a deep chest, long muscular legs, broad skull, and dense silver-gray coat raised along the spine. Heavy paws spread over the ground and a powerful muzzle holds large but natural canines, while pale amber eyes remain fixed with pack-hunter intelligence.
records.silhouette: Huge athletic wolf with broad head, long legs, high ruff, massive paws, and full brush tail.
records.pose: Driving into a low shoulder-first charge with jaws open and one massive forepaw striking forward.
records.environment: A windswept forest ridge with sparse snow and dark pines below
records.altText: A pony-sized silver-gray dire wolf charges along a snowy ridge with jaws open and one broad paw forward.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Lightning, Slashing, Thunder.
records.appearance: A towering air elemental noble in humanoid form, with wind-swept features, cloud-white hair, two strong arms, and layered garments that unravel into a controlled cyclone below the knees. A curved blade is made from compressed storm wind, while small lightning filaments and floating cloth edges reveal constant hovering motion.
records.silhouette: Large upright humanoid with broad shoulders, flowing hair and garments, one curved storm blade, and a tapering whirlwind lower body.
records.pose: Hovering in a sweeping sword stance with the free hand drawing a small whirlwind into a tight spiral.
mustAvoid: solid ordinary human legs as the focus
records.environment: A windswept coastal terrace suspended above bright ocean clouds
records.altText: A cloud-haired djinni hovers above a coastal terrace with a storm blade and whirlwind coiling around one hand.

records.appearance: A hairless, ash-gray humanoid in its true form, with smooth skin, elongated fingers, large dark eyes, and features that are almost human but stripped of age, ancestry, and expression. One side of the body ripples through several borrowed faces and clothing textures as its unsettling disguise collapses.
records.silhouette: A slim unclothed-but-featureless humanoid outline with long hands, narrow shoulders, smooth head, and a second face peeling across one side.
records.pose: Turning sharply toward the viewer with one open hand raised as a false face slides away from the true blank visage.
records.environment: A lamplit urban alley with a rain-dark wall and discarded outer cloak behind the subject
records.altText: An ash-gray doppelganger turns in a narrow alley as a borrowed human face ripples away from its blank true form.

records.appearance: A massive working horse with a broad chest, thick neck, powerful hindquarters, and feathered hair around large dark hooves. A patient dark bay head sits beneath a heavy mane, while a plain padded collar and traces show a life of hauling.
records.silhouette: Large blocky horse with thick neck and legs, rounded hindquarters, full mane, and feathered hooves.
records.pose: Leaning steadily into the harness with one broad forehoof forward and traces drawn taut behind.
records.environment: A muddy village lane with the suggestion of a loaded cart cropped well behind
records.altText: A powerful dark bay draft horse leans into a plain work harness on a muddy village lane.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Piercing.
records.appearance: A gargantuan marine dragon with a vast domed turtle shell, broad horned reptilian head, four powerful paddlelike legs ending in claws, and a thick rudder tail. Dark green-blue scales overlap the neck and limbs, barnacles crust the ridged shell, and superheated steam condenses around the jaws.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan low sea creature with a massive high shell, long dragon neck and head, four paddling legs, and thick tapering tail but no wings.
records.pose: Rising half out of rough water beside a sea cliff, forelegs spread, shell breaking the surface, and a broad cone of steam blasting forward.
records.environment: A stormy coastal channel between black cliffs with tiny ships far in the background
records.altText: A gargantuan dragon turtle rises between sea cliffs and blasts white steam over the waves.

records.appearance: A squat, potbellied demon with rubbery gray-green hide, long apelike arms, bowed legs, and a loose jowled face beneath small flattened ears. Hooked claws tip its hands and feet, while damp folds and a faint yellow haze suggest the fetid cloud held inside it.
records.silhouette: Short broad demon with hunched shoulders, long hanging arms, swollen belly, bowed legs, and small head.
records.pose: Hunched forward on bent legs with both claws spread as a low foul cloud rolls from around its body.
records.environment: A dim abyssal hollow with cracked stone and low stagnant haze
records.altText: A squat gray-green dretch hunches over cracked stone as yellowish fetid vapor gathers around it.

records.appearance: A large underworld hunter whose armored humanoid torso rises seamlessly from the front of a vast spider abdomen. Two sinewy arms and a severe, pale-eyed face sit above eight long jointed legs, while glossy plates, sparse sensory hairs, and venom-bright seams reinforce the predatory fusion.
records.silhouette: Upright humanoid torso with two arms mounted over a low broad spider body, eight radiating legs, and a rounded abdomen trailing behind.
records.pose: Clinging diagonally to a cavern wall with four legs anchored, four reaching forward, and both humanoid hands shaping a burst of poison.
mustInclude: humanoid upper torso with two arms
records.environment: A vertical Underdark chasm crossed by sparse web strands and cold mineral light
records.altText: A pale drider clings to an Underdark wall on eight black spider legs while gathering violet poison.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Poison, Radiant.
records.appearance: A small-statured adult nature keeper in layered bark-brown cloth, soft leather, and a mantle of living leaves. A crooked staff wrapped in a flowering vine serves as both focus and weapon, while a compact green-gold wisp hovers over the free palm.
records.silhouette: A compact cloaked humanoid with leafy shoulders, tall crooked staff, pouch-lined belt, and a small floating light.
records.pose: Braced behind the vine staff while guiding a verdant wisp forward with an open hand.
records.environment: A rain-fresh forest glade with mossy stones and a clear open space around the full figure
records.altText: A compact forest druid guides a green-gold wisp beside a vine-wrapped staff in a rain-fresh glade.

records.appearance: An adult fey whose graceful humanoid form appears grown from living woodland matter: warm bark plates follow the limbs, moss softens the joints, and a crown of leafy twigs blends into long vine-like hair. Clear green eyes and a recognizably expressive face emerge naturally from wood grain rather than a carved mask.
records.silhouette: Slender humanoid with branch-crown hair, long arms trailing vines, and bare rootlike feet beneath a leaf mantle.
records.pose: Turning out of a tree trunk with one arm extended as a thorned vine lashes in a protective arc.
records.environment: An ancient forest grove beside the trunk from which the dryad is emerging
records.altText: A bark-skinned dryad emerges from an ancient tree while sweeping a thorned vine through the green-lit grove.

records.appearance: A small angular elemental with a wiry humanoid torso, one pair of ragged membranous wings, clawed limbs, and a pointed face eroded as if carved from compacted dust. Fine sand leaks from its joints and gathers into a blinding spiral around its open jaws.
records.silhouette: Small winged humanoid with hunched shoulders, long clawed arms, pointed head, and a fraying dusty outline.
records.pose: Hovering backward with wings spread and both claws raised as a narrow cone of dust bursts from its mouth.
records.environment: A dry planar ruin with worn stone and low drifts of pale powder
records.altText: A small gray dust mephit hovers in a ruined hall while blasting a cone of blinding grit.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Grassland, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A powerful natural eagle with a dark brown body, broad layered flight feathers, a pale crown and tail, and a heavy hooked beak. Its yellow talons are spread beneath the body, every toe and primary feather readable against the sky.
records.silhouette: Broad straight wings with fingered primaries, compact body, wedge tail, and lowered clawed feet.
records.pose: Descending in a controlled bank toward a rocky perch with wings cupped and talons extended.
records.environment: A high coastal cliff with open air and distant muted water
records.altText: A brown-and-cream eagle banks toward a coastal cliff with its broad wings cupped and talons extended.

records.appearance: A broad, towering figure assembled from compacted stone, broken strata, and dense soil, with shoulders like cliff ledges and immense hammer-shaped hands. No separate clothing or armor interrupts the geology; a dim mineral glow marks deep-set eyes as loose gravel continually falls and rejoins the body.
records.silhouette: Massive top-heavy humanoid with a small craglike head, shelf-wide shoulders, long boulder arms, thick legs, and oversized fists.
records.pose: Rising directly through solid rock with one fist planted and the other drawing back to hurl a jagged boulder.
mustInclude: body entirely made of earth and stone
records.environment: A deep mountain fault chamber with fractured stone walls and drifting rock dust
records.altText: A hulking earth elemental rises through fractured granite with a boulder raised in one massive hand.

records.appearance: A towering fire elemental noble in a powerful humanoid form, with coal-dark skin, ember-bright eyes, two arms, and hair rising as controlled flame. Layered heat-resistant robes and dark metal plates frame the body, while a long curved blade glows red-hot and the lower garments trail into smoke and sparks during flight.
records.silhouette: Large upright humanoid with high flame hair, broad plated shoulders, one long heated blade, flowing robes, and a smoky ember trail.
records.pose: Hovering over heated stone with the glowing blade angled downward and a compact sphere of flame balanced in the free palm.
records.environment: A monumental brass-and-basalt hall above a desert of glowing cinders
records.altText: A coal-dark efreeti hovers in a furnace hall with flaming hair, a red-hot blade, and fire in one palm.

records.appearance: A huge adult elephant with broad fanlike ears, thick wrinkled gray skin, a long muscular trunk, and two gently curved ivory tusks. Columnar legs support the high shoulders and barrel body, while dust gathers in the folds and a sparse tail tuft flicks behind.
records.silhouette: A massive four-legged animal with broad ears, domed head, long trunk, two tusks, arched back, and thin tufted tail.
records.pose: Striding forward with ears spread and trunk curled aside, one tusk angled into a forceful gore.
records.environment: Open sunlit grassland with low acacia silhouettes and dust around the feet
records.altText: A huge gray elephant strides through dusty grassland with ears spread, trunk curled, and two ivory tusks forward.

records.appearance: A towering elk with long dark legs, a deep russet-brown body, heavy neck mane, and an expansive symmetrical rack of branching antlers. Its pale rump patch and dark face remain naturalistic, built around the weight and speed of a large wild ungulate.
records.silhouette: Tall long-legged deer with a thick neck and very broad branching antler crown.
records.pose: Driving forward from a three-quarter stance with head lowered enough to present the antlers and one foreleg extended.
records.environment: An open conifer meadow under cool early light with distant mountains softened
records.altText: A large russet elk drives through a mountain meadow with its broad antler rack lowered.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Force, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Slashing.
