records.appearance: A severe infernal warrior with an athletic humanoid body, one pair of broad black-feathered wings, fitted dark armor, and an unflinching expression. A withering longsword burns with muted necrotic light, while a living crimson rope coils from the free hand in precise loops ready to entangle.
records.silhouette: Armored upright humanoid framed by one wide feathered wing pair, with a long sword in one hand and looping rope in the other.
records.pose: Hovering in a disciplined fencing stance with wings held steady and the magic rope describing a wide capturing circle.
mustInclude: one pair of black feathered wings
records.environment: A severe infernal tribunal platform of black stone and red banners
records.altText: A black-winged erinyes hovers over an infernal tribunal with sword drawn and enchanted rope circling.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Piercing, Poison, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A gaunt spiderlike humanoid with a swollen abdomen, two long arms ending in claws, two powerful legs, and smaller sensory limbs clustered near a fanged face. Sparse dark bristles cover gray-violet hide, and thick webbing clings to hooked joints without disguising the bipedal frame.
records.silhouette: A hunched biped with long clawed arms, high rounded abdomen, small fanged head, and threadlike web strands between limbs.
records.pose: Clinging sideways to a tree trunk with one arm while the other casts a taut web strand toward the viewer.
mustInclude: two main arms and two main legs
records.environment: A dim old forest choked by layered webs, with tree trunks forming a simple vertical frame
records.altText: A bristled ettercap clings sideways to a webbed tree and casts a thick strand from one clawed arm.

records.appearance: A huge two-headed giant with a thick asymmetrical torso, two powerful arms, and mismatched heads rising from separate necks above the same shoulders. One rough face is shaggy and suspicious while the other is bald and snarling; a battleaxe and iron morningstar are carried independently in either hand.
records.silhouette: A broad giant body with exactly two heads and two necks, two arms carrying different weapons, bowed legs, and ragged hide layers.
records.pose: Striding forward as one head sights along the axe and the other looks backward, morningstar already swinging wide.
records.environment: A stony hill pass with broken trees and a low cave mouth behind the giant
records.altText: A huge two-headed ettin strides through a hill pass with a battleaxe in one hand and morningstar in the other.

records.appearance: A towering living conflagration whose torso, head, and long arms are suggested by layered sheets of flame rather than solid anatomy. A white-hot core shows through the chest, while the lower body narrows into a turbulent column of fire and airborne embers.
records.silhouette: Tall tapering flame-form with a narrow crown-like head, two elongated arms, broad shoulders, and no legs or solid feet.
records.pose: Surging forward in a sweeping arc, one flame-arm extended as the whole figure streams with its motion.
records.environment: A scorched planar expanse with black glassy ground and subdued smoke
records.altText: A towering humanoid-shaped fire elemental surges across blackened ground in a shower of embers.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Slashing.
records.appearance: A towering, massively built giant with charcoal-dark skin, ember-red hair, and a squared, disciplined bearing. Heavy blackened plate armor protects the torso and limbs; one hand grips an immense flame-edged sword while a brutal throwing hammer hangs ready at the belt.
records.silhouette: Huge broad humanoid with a high armored chest, thick limbs, a long heavy sword, and a blocky hammer at the hip.
records.pose: Standing in a grounded martial stance with the flame sword angled down and the hammer hand ready.
records.environment: A vast volcanic forge hall with distant furnaces and architecture scaled for giants
records.altText: A colossal charcoal-skinned fire giant in black plate stands in a volcanic forge with a flaming sword.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Lightning.
records.appearance: A tall, heavy humanoid construct assembled from carefully joined sections of preserved flesh, with an uneven skull, broad hands, and thick limbs reinforced by dark metal staples and leather braces. The expression is blank rather than suffering, and faint blue-white electricity traces across conductive rods at the shoulders.
records.silhouette: Blocky upright humanoid with a flat heavy head, mismatched shoulders, very long arms, broad hands, and rigid booted feet.
records.pose: Advancing with a stiff, heavy gait as both hands lower into a crushing slam and lightning crawls over the shoulders.
mustAvoid: neck bolts as the only detail
records.environment: A ruined stone workshop lit by intermittent lightning through a high window
records.altText: A massive stitched flesh golem advances through a ruined workshop as electricity arcs over its shoulders.

records.appearance: A tiny brilliantly patterned serpent with a narrow head, smooth overlapping scales, and a pair of broad feathered wings growing just behind the neck. Its long body remains fully serpentine, tapering to a fine tail as iridescent flight feathers shift from emerald to copper.
records.silhouette: Long sinuous snake body suspended beneath one pair of spread feathered wings, with no legs.
records.pose: Banking through an S curve with wings fully extended and head angled toward an unseen target.
mustInclude: exactly one pair of feathered wings
records.environment: A sunlit jungle gap with soft foliage and humid haze behind the subject
records.altText: A tiny emerald-and-copper flying snake banks through a jungle gap on two feathered wings.

records.appearance: A tiny green-brown frog with a compact head, smooth damp skin, prominent coppery eyes, and long folded hind legs made for sudden leaps. Webbing spreads between its rear toes, while the front feet rest lightly on a wet leaf.
records.silhouette: Low triangular body with bulging eyes, short forelegs, and two long folded jumping legs.
records.pose: Crouched at the edge of a leaf with hind legs compressed and throat slightly expanded before a jump.
records.environment: A damp forest pool margin with moss, broad leaves, and soft rain
records.altText: A tiny moss-green frog crouches on a rain-wet leaf beside a forest pool, ready to leap.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Cold, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A colossal cold-weather warrior with pale blue skin, ice-white braided hair, and a broad disciplined build. Thick furs and layered hide sit beneath practical metal armor, while an enormous frost-rimed axe fills both hands and a giant bow with spear-sized arrows rides across the back.
records.silhouette: Huge broad humanoid with braided hair, fur-heavy shoulders, a two-handed axe, giant bow, and long arrow shapes rising above one shoulder.
records.pose: Advancing across deep snow with the frost axe held diagonally and the bow secured for a rapid switch of weapons.
records.environment: A windswept mountain glacier with dark cliffs and a distant fortress wall scaled for giants
records.altText: A pale-blue frost giant crosses a glacier carrying a huge rimed axe and giant bow.

records.appearance: A lean winged elemental carved in the likeness of a horned humanoid predator, its body made from weathered dark stone rather than flesh. Broad batlike wings, hooked claws, and a short heavy tail grow seamlessly from the masonry form, with rain channels and lichen disguising it as architecture at rest.
records.silhouette: A crouched humanoid stone figure with two horns, broad bat wings, clawed hands and feet, and a short tail.
records.pose: Springing from a cathedral ledge with wings snapping open and stone claws reaching into the air.
records.environment: A rain-soaked gothic roofline above a dim city, with the ledge clearly visible beneath the creature
records.altText: A dark basalt gargoyle launches from a rain-soaked cathedral ledge with broad stone wings opening.

records.appearance: A nearly transparent cube of dense living gel large enough to fill a dungeon corridor. Its edges sag slightly under their own weight, faint ripples travel through the clear body, and a few corroded scraps and pale mineral fragments hang suspended inside.
records.silhouette: A large upright cube with softly rounded edges, a broad contact surface, and subtle internal distortions.
records.pose: Advancing as one lower edge bulges forward, leaving a thin acidic sheen across the stones.
records.environment: A narrow torchlit stone dungeon corridor that clearly shows the creature filling the passage
records.altText: A transparent gelatinous cube fills a stone corridor, with bubbles and corroded scraps suspended inside.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A tall, corpse-thin undead scavenger with gray-green skin drawn tightly across bones, a distended jaw of broken teeth, and long black claws. Shreds of burial cloth cling to the torso, greasy hair hangs in cords, and a faint greasy haze suggests its overwhelming stench without graphic decay.
records.silhouette: A hunched humanoid with long forearms, splayed claws, narrow rib cage, low head, and ragged cloth strips.
records.pose: Loping forward on bent legs with one claw scraping the floor and jaws opening toward a scent.
records.environment: A damp crypt passage with dark alcoves and a low yellow-green haze close to the floor
records.altText: A gaunt gray-green ghast lopes through a damp crypt with long black claws and broken teeth bared.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Force, Necrotic, Psychic.
records.appearance: A translucent humanoid apparition whose gaunt face and hands retain the memory of a former person. Tattered period-neutral garments dissolve into vapor at the edges, and the lower body fades completely into a drifting incorporeal trail rather than legs.
records.silhouette: Upright floating humanoid with a readable head and reaching hands, ragged shoulders, and a long tapering vapor trail.
records.pose: Hovering forward with one hand reaching out, garments and vapor streaming as though through an unseen current.
mustInclude: clearly readable sorrowful face and hands
records.environment: An abandoned stone interior with distant moonlight and restrained ground mist
records.altText: A pale translucent ghost in tattered garments reaches forward while drifting through a moonlit ruin.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A gaunt undead humanoid with taut ash-gray skin, sunken milky eyes, long blackened nails, and a wide jaw lined with broken predatory teeth. Torn burial cloth hangs from a body held in a low animal crouch, conveying hunger without exposed organs or graphic decay.
records.silhouette: Lean hunched humanoid on bent legs with long clawed hands, lowered head, and ragged cloth trailing behind.
records.pose: Springing forward from all fours into a two-handed clawing lunge, mouth open and shoulders twisted.
records.environment: A moonlit cemetery passage with low stones and dead grass blurred behind
records.altText: A gaunt ash-gray ghoul lunges through a cemetery passage with black claws spread and broken teeth bared.

records.appearance: An immense natural ape with a massive barrel chest, long muscular arms, a low domed head, dark expressive eyes, and thick black-brown hair over weathered skin. Broad grasping hands, powerful climbing feet, and small scars from forest life emphasize believable primate anatomy at extraordinary scale.
records.silhouette: Huge forward-leaning primate with extremely broad shoulders, long arms reaching near the ground, compact bent legs, and no tail.
records.pose: Balanced on three limbs atop a forest outcrop while the free hand draws back a huge stone for a throw.
records.environment: A dense tropical forest canopy broken by a high granite outcrop and distant trees for scale
records.altText: A colossal dark-furred ape crouches on a forest outcrop with a huge boulder drawn back to throw.

records.appearance: A boar-sized badger with a broad low torso, massive digging shoulders, bold black-and-cream facial stripes, and long soil-darkened foreclaws. Coarse grizzled fur forms a protective mantle above short, immensely sturdy legs.
records.silhouette: Large low barrel body with wedge head, short tail, compact legs, and oversized clawed forepaws.
records.pose: Bursting from a bank in a spray of earth with shoulders forward and one great forepaw raised to strike.
records.environment: A torn forest bank beneath exposed roots with fresh soil airborne
records.altText: A boar-sized striped giant badger bursts from a forest bank with one massive digging paw raised.

records.appearance: A horse-sized cave bat with a compact furred body, huge leaf-thin ears, a short wrinkled muzzle, and broad wings supported by elongated finger bones. Its dark membranes show branching veins and old tears, while hooked hind feet trail beneath the body.
records.silhouette: Small central body beneath an enormous angular wingspan, framed by huge ears and trailing hooked feet.
records.pose: Sweeping through a cavern turn with one wing foreshortened, ears flared and hind claws tucked for landing.
mustInclude: two broad bat wings with finger bones
records.environment: A vast limestone cavern with distant columns and a pale shaft of reflected light
records.altText: A horse-sized charcoal giant bat sweeps through a cavern on broad veined wings with huge ears raised.

records.appearance: A massive wild boar with a barrel-shaped body, high armored shoulders, coarse bristling hair, and a wedge-shaped head carried low. Two long curved tusks rise outside the mouth, smaller whetters sit beneath them, and mud cakes the thick legs and split hooves.
records.silhouette: A low heavy quadruped with high shoulders, sloping back, blunt snout, paired tusks, and short tail.
records.pose: Charging directly across torn turf with head lowered, shoulders rolling and clods of earth thrown behind.
records.environment: A churned woodland meadow bordered by low brush, with open ground showing the full charge
records.altText: A huge dark-bristled boar charges across torn meadow turf with paired tusks and head lowered.

records.appearance: A man-long centipede with a flattened segmented body, one pair of sharp-jointed legs on every trunk segment, long searching antennae, and hooked venom claws beneath the head. Its rust-black chitin flexes in a precise wave over stone.
records.silhouette: Long low many-segmented body edged by dozens of legs, with two long antennae and rear feelers.
records.pose: Curving around a cavern pillar with successive legs gripping the vertical stone and antennae reaching forward.
mustInclude: one leg pair per body segment
records.environment: A wet subterranean wall with mineral streaks and scattered old timbers
records.altText: A man-long rust-black giant centipede curves across a wet cave wall on dozens of jointed legs.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Swamp, Underwater.
records.appearance: A truly immense constricting snake with a trunk-thick body, broad muscular head, heat-sensing pits along the upper lip, and overlapping scales polished by water and vegetation. Dark saddle markings break up its olive length, while the lower body coils with enough mass to pin a large animal.
records.silhouette: A huge serpentine S-curve with a raised blunt head, thick central coils, tapering tail, and no limbs.
records.pose: Rising from a broad tightening coil with neck drawn back to bite and the tail disappearing into shallow water.
records.environment: A humid swamp channel beneath low branches with reeds and water providing scale
records.altText: A trunk-thick giant constrictor snake rises from olive coils beside a dark swamp channel.

records.appearance: A broad man-sized crab protected by a thick ridged carapace, with stalked eyes, eight jointed walking legs, and two massive asymmetrical pincers capable of locking around prey. Barnacle scars and green algae mark the reddish shell without obscuring its clean crustacean anatomy.
records.silhouette: Very wide low shell on eight legs, bracketed by two large claws raised above the front edge.
records.pose: Braced sideways in shallow surf with both claws open, one larger pincer reaching toward the viewer.
records.environment: A rocky tidal shelf in knee-deep clear water with restrained white foam
records.altText: A giant red-brown crab braces in shallow surf with two massive pincers spread wide.

records.appearance: An immense mature crocodilian with a broad armored skull, thick jaw muscles, a low ridged body, and a tail powerful enough to churn an entire channel. Heavy osteoderms rise along its back, old scars cross the snout, and mud hangs from the short splayed legs and hooked claws.
records.silhouette: Very long low quadruped with a huge wedge-shaped head, ridged back, four short legs, and a deep muscular tail.
records.pose: Surging from shallow water in a three-quarter turn, jaws open while the tail sweeps a wall of muddy spray behind it.
records.environment: A reed-choked swamp channel with cypress roots and dark shallow water
records.altText: A gigantic scarred crocodile surges from a reed-filled swamp channel with its jaws spread wide.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Grassland, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A horse-sized celestial eagle with a deep dark-brown body, pale gold crown and tail, immense layered wings, and a powerful hooked beak. Sunlike radiance traces the edges of its primary feathers and talons, adding celestial presence while preserving natural raptor anatomy.
records.silhouette: Huge eagle with broad level wings, compact head, fanned tail, and two large taloned feet lowered beneath.
records.pose: Descending through a sweeping bank with one taloned foot extended and radiant feather edges cutting the air.
records.environment: A high mountain valley with open sky and sunlit cloud far below
records.altText: A horse-sized celestial eagle banks over a mountain valley with gold-edged wings and talons extended.

records.appearance: A towering celestial elk larger than a draft horse, with long clean limbs, a deep chest, and a many-tined rack spanning wider than its body. Its russet coat pales toward silver at the neck and legs, and fine points of warm radiance trace the antlers without making the animal translucent.
records.silhouette: A huge long-legged deer with high shoulders, narrow head, short tail, and an exceptionally broad symmetrical antler rack.
records.pose: Stepping onto a grassy rise with head lowered enough to present the antlers for a powerful ram.
mustAvoid: glowing fantasy body patterns over the entire coat
records.environment: A misty forest meadow at sunrise with ordinary trees emphasizing the elk's immense height
records.altText: A huge russet celestial elk lowers its radiant many-tined antlers on a misty forest rise.

records.appearance: A dog-sized beetle with a low armored body, six sturdy legs, and overlapping dark carapace plates. Exactly two luminous orange glands sit above its eyes, casting a steady warm light across the mandibles and cave floor.
records.silhouette: Broad oval beetle shell on six angular legs, with a low hornless head and compact mandibles.
records.pose: Climbing over a cavern ledge with antennae searching ahead and both light glands clearly visible above the eyes.
mustInclude: exactly two glowing glands above the eyes
warm light cast by the glands
records.environment: A dark Underdark passage where its own warm glow reveals rough stone
records.altText: A large dark fire beetle climbs through a cavern, two orange glands above its eyes lighting the shell.

records.appearance: A wolf-sized frog with a broad flat head, slick mottled green skin, bulging gold eyes, and enormous folded hind legs. Wide webbed feet spread against the mud, and the pale throat and elastic jaws hint at its ability to seize and swallow prey.
records.silhouette: Broad low amphibian with huge eyes, short forelegs, and two massive folded jumping legs.
records.pose: Launching from a marsh bank with hind legs extending and mouth opening toward an unseen target.
records.environment: A reed-fringed swamp pool with muddy water splashing beneath the leap
records.altText: A wolf-sized mottled giant frog leaps from a swamp bank with webbed feet spread and mouth open.

records.appearance: A horse-sized mountain goat with a deep muscular chest, thick pale coat, short beard, and two enormous ridged horns sweeping backward in smooth arcs. Broad split hooves grip stone and powerful shoulders align behind the lowered head for a devastating charge.
records.silhouette: Large stocky ungulate with high shoulders, beard, heavy backward horns, and four compact climbing legs.
records.pose: Charging down a steep ledge with head lowered, forelegs gathered and loose gravel breaking under its hooves.
records.environment: A high mountain slope of broken pale rock under cold clear light
records.altText: A horse-sized pale giant goat charges down a mountain ledge with huge ridged horns lowered.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill.
records.appearance: A horse-sized spotted hyena with towering forequarters, a sloping back, massive neck, rounded ears, and a broad bone-crushing muzzle. Coarse tawny fur rises into a dark mane along the shoulders, and thick paws support the rangy but immensely powerful scavenger.
records.silhouette: Huge high-shouldered quadruped tapering to lower hindquarters, with oversized head and short brush tail.
records.pose: Bounding across open scrub with forequarters lifted, jaws wide and short tail held rigid for balance.
records.environment: A dry grassland wash beneath hard evening light with dust kicked up
records.altText: A horse-sized spotted giant hyena bounds through dry scrub with massive jaws open.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Swamp, Underdark.
records.appearance: A massive low-slung lizard with a broad blunt head, muscular shoulders, pebbled olive hide, and a thick tail longer than its torso. Four splayed climbing feet end in strongly curved claws, allowing the heavy reptile to cling to improbable stone surfaces.
records.silhouette: Long heavy reptile close to the ground with four splayed legs, broad head, and thick tapering tail.
records.pose: Clinging diagonally across a steep ruin wall with body flattened and one forefoot reaching for a higher seam.
records.environment: A damp overgrown ruin wall with deep mortar seams and hanging roots
records.altText: A massive olive giant lizard clings diagonally to an overgrown ruin wall on four clawed feet.

records.appearance: A huge natural octopus with a broad muscular mantle, horizontal gold eyes, and exactly eight long arms lined by paired cream suckers. Its skin shifts through deep red, violet, and rock-gray patches, while each independent arm grips reef stone or curls through open water.

records.pose: Rising from behind a reef ledge with all eight arms readable, two reaching forward and six anchoring or coiling.
records.environment: A deep rocky reef with blue-green shafts of light and drifting silt
records.altText: A huge red-violet giant octopus rises over a reef ledge with all eight sucker-lined arms spread.

records.appearance: A great celestial owl with a broad feathered body, immense silent wings, and a perfectly round facial disk surrounding clear silver eyes. Cream and tawny plumage carries a faint pearlescent sheen, while powerful feathered legs end in dark curved talons.
records.silhouette: Large round-headed owl framed by two vast rounded wings, a short fan tail, and two lowered clawed feet.
records.pose: Gliding low in a bank with one wing lifted, face held level and talons opening for a precise strike.
records.environment: A quiet snow-dusted forest clearing beneath cool moonlight
records.altText: A great cream-and-tawny celestial owl glides over a snowy forest clearing with silver eyes forward.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A terrier-sized rat with a powerful low body, coarse greasy brown fur, rounded scarred ears, and a long thick tail bare except for fine scales. Yellow incisors show beneath a twitching whiskered muzzle, while nimble claws grip broken masonry.
records.silhouette: Large hunched rodent with a blunt head, rounded ears, arched spine, and long rope-like tail.
records.pose: Creeping over a fallen stone with belly low, nose forward, and tail curving around the rubble.

records.altText: A terrier-sized brown giant rat creeps over sewer rubble with its thick naked tail curved behind it.

records.appearance: A horse-sized desert scorpion encased in overlapping amber-brown chitin, with eight jointed walking legs, two enormous grasping pincers, and a segmented tail arched high over the back. The final bulb carries one dark curved stinger wet with venom.
records.silhouette: A low eight-legged arthropod with broad paired pincers in front and a tall segmented tail ending in one hooked sting.
records.pose: Braced sideways on all eight legs with both pincers open and the tail curled forward for a downward strike.
records.environment: A wind-carved desert ravine with pale sand and dark rock providing clear scale
records.altText: A giant amber scorpion braces in a desert ravine with pincers spread and one venomous stinger arched overhead.

records.appearance: A horse-sized seahorse with an upright armored torso, long tubular snout, bony crown, small rippling fins, and a muscular prehensile tail curled beneath it. Blue-green plates overlap like natural armor while a ridged chest and strong neck make its forward ram believable.
records.silhouette: Large upright S-curved sea creature with horse-shaped head, rounded plated belly, tiny fins, and coiled tail.
records.pose: Driving forward through open water with head and chest aligned, tail uncoiling to propel the charge.
records.environment: A clear underwater canyon with tall sea grass bending in the current
records.altText: A horse-sized blue-green giant seahorse charges upright through a clear underwater canyon.

records.appearance: A colossal open-ocean shark with a torpedo-shaped body, blunt conical snout, high triangular dorsal fin, broad pectoral fins, and a crescent tail built for relentless speed. Rows of pale serrated teeth line the wide mouth, while old scars and small hitchhiking fish emphasize its immense scale.
records.silhouette: Huge streamlined fish with pointed fins, a thick central body, open crescent mouth, and strongly forked vertical tail.
records.pose: Turning sharply toward the viewer from below, mouth opening as the tail drives a powerful burst through dark water.
records.environment: A deep offshore water column with distant schooling fish and faint light far above
records.altText: A colossal blue-gray shark turns through deep water, rows of teeth visible in its opening jaws.

records.appearance: A horse-sized web-spinning spider with a high mottled abdomen, compact cephalothorax, eight long jointed legs, clustered black eyes, and thick downward fangs. Coarse sensory hairs cover its dark body, and pale silk feeds visibly from spinnerets beneath the rear abdomen.
records.silhouette: Large two-part spider body suspended between eight angular legs, with raised abdomen and forward fangs.
records.pose: Hanging sideways in a broad web with exactly eight legs spread, one foreleg testing a newly trapped strand.
records.environment: A vast Underdark web anchored between rough columns with open negative space around the body
records.altText: A horse-sized dark giant spider hangs sideways in a cavern web on eight long legs.

records.silhouette: Huge squat amphibian with broad flat body, prominent eye ridges, short forelegs, and massive folded rear legs.
records.pose: Landing from a heavy leap with forefeet striking mud, mouth opening wide and hind legs still extended behind.

records.environment: A dark swamp pool beneath hanging moss with a broad splash around the landing
records.altText: A bear-sized olive giant toad lands in swamp mud with its warty body low and vast mouth opening.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Swamp.
records.appearance: A man-long viper with a thick muscular body, sharply triangular head, vertical pupils, and keeled emerald scales broken by dark diamond markings. Two long folding fangs frame the dark mouth, and the neck gathers into a powerful S curve before a strike.
records.silhouette: Heavy coiled serpent with a narrow neck rising to a broad triangular head and no limbs.
records.pose: Striking out of a tight ground coil, head forward and jaws open while the rear body remains anchored.

records.altText: A man-long emerald giant viper strikes from a jungle-floor coil with two long fangs exposed.

records.appearance: An enormous, ill-tempered vulture with a deep rib cage, long pinioned wings, and a bald, wrinkled head on a corded neck. Ragged black-brown feathers overlap like worn shingles, while the hooked beak and heavy talons are stained by a life of scavenging.
records.silhouette: A broad soaring bird with long fingered wingtips, a hunched feather mantle, bare neck, hooked beak, and dangling talons.
records.pose: Dropping from a low circle with wings canted forward, feet opening and beak aimed at the ground.
records.environment: A sun-bleached rocky badland above a distant carcass trail, with the background kept low and hazy
records.altText: A ragged giant vulture dives over a sunlit badland with its hooked beak and talons ready to gouge.

records.appearance: A man-sized wasp with a narrow jointed waist, hard yellow-and-black abdomen, six hooked legs, two long antennae, and two pairs of transparent wings. Heavy mandibles frame the head while a single needlelike stinger extends from the tapered abdomen.
records.silhouette: Narrow-waisted insect with four clear wings, six dangling legs, long antennae, and pointed abdomen.
records.pose: Banking in a fast aerial pass with four wings blurred at their tips, legs tucked and stinger angled down.
records.environment: A sunlit forest clearing near a distant papery nest shape kept out of focus
records.altText: A man-sized yellow-and-black giant wasp banks through a clearing on four clear wings with stinger lowered.

records.appearance: A wolf-long weasel with an extraordinarily flexible torso, low muscular shoulders, short legs, and a small wedge-shaped head. Dense chestnut fur pales along the throat, and its dark eyes and long whiskers remain sharply focused as it slips through cover.
records.silhouette: Long serpentine mammal body on four very short legs with a narrow head and trailing furry tail.
records.pose: Flowing over a fallen log in a stretched running bound, forefeet landing as the hindquarters coil forward.
records.environment: A tangled forest understory with one moss-covered log and filtered daylight
records.altText: A wolf-long chestnut giant weasel flows over a mossy log in a stretched running bound.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill.
records.appearance: A man-sized wolf spider with a low robust body, eight powerful running legs, two prominent forward eyes above a cluster of smaller ones, and thick downward-pointing chelicerae. Dense brown sensory hairs stripe its abdomen and legs, but no webbing clings to the active hunter.
records.silhouette: Low two-part spider body surrounded by eight stout legs, with enlarged front eyes and raised forelegs.
records.pose: Stalking over a rocky ledge with body low, front pair of legs testing ahead and fangs held ready.

records.environment: A dry rocky grassland crevice with sparse roots and warm sidelight
records.altText: A man-sized hairy wolf spider stalks across a rocky crevice on eight stout legs.

records.appearance: An amorphous mound of pallid flesh that continually folds into itself, studded with blinking eyes and mouths of many sizes. Its lower edge liquefies the stone into a rippling slurry, while several jaws chatter independently and a swollen cavity gathers luminous spittle.
records.silhouette: A low asymmetrical mound with many small eye-and-mouth interruptions, several reaching lobes, and a broad flowing base.
records.pose: Rolling forward across softened rock as mouths open in different directions and one upper orifice spits a blinding glob.
records.environment: A claustrophobic Underdark chamber whose floor buckles into wet stone around the creature
records.altText: A pallid gibbering mouther rolls across liquefying cavern stone, crowded with chattering mouths and blinking eyes.

records.appearance: A massive four-armed demon with a broad bestial head, heavy horn ridges, digitigrade legs, and a thick armored torso. Its upper pair of arms end in enormous crablike pincers built to seize prey, while the smaller lower pair retain knuckled clawed hands for brutal close strikes.
records.silhouette: Large top-heavy fiend with exactly four arms, two elevated crushing pincers, two lower fists, a hunched horned head, and powerful bent legs.
records.pose: Advancing in a low grapple stance with both pincers spread wide and the two lower fists drawn back to pummel.
records.environment: A shattered abyssal causeway suspended over slow-moving red mist
records.altText: A four-armed glabrezu advances across a shattered causeway with two great pincers spread and two fists raised.

records.appearance: A compact professional arena fighter wearing a fitted breastplate, reinforced skirt, greaves, and a crested but practical helmet. A long spear and broad shield show heavy use, while scars, balanced footing, and tightly wrapped hands suggest disciplined training rather than theatrical showmanship.
records.silhouette: Short athletic humanoid with a crested helmet, tall spear, broad shield, armored torso, and firmly spaced legs.
records.pose: Set behind the shield with spear angled over its rim, weight forward and ready to follow with a shield bash.
records.environment: A quiet stone arena floor after the crowd has fallen into shadow
records.altText: A compact armored gladiator braces behind a scarred shield with a long spear ready.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill.
records.appearance: A tall lean fiend with a hyena-like head, rounded ears, spotted tawny hide, digitigrade legs, and long clawed arms. Scraps of dark hide armor leave its rangy frame free to move, while a recurved bow built from pale bone rests ready beside a quiver of black-fletched arrows.
records.silhouette: Hunched hyena-headed humanoid with high shoulders, long arms, bent canine legs, and a broad curved bow.
records.pose: Turning from a low predatory run to draw the bone bow, muzzle open and one clawed foot braced.
records.environment: A dry scrubland ridge under harsh side light with dead grass moving in wind
records.altText: A spotted hyena-headed gnoll warrior braces on a scrubland ridge while drawing a pale bone bow.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Grassland, Hill, Mountain, Urban.
records.appearance: A sure-footed domestic goat with a compact frame, coarse cream-and-brown coat, rectangular pupils, a short beard, and two backward-curving horns. Its split hooves grip uneven stone and the shoulders lower naturally before a charge.
records.silhouette: Compact horned ungulate with a straight back, short raised tail, beard, and narrow cloven hooves.
records.pose: Stepping down a steep rock with head lowered and one forehoof searching for purchase.
records.environment: A sunny hill path broken by pale stone and sparse mountain grass
records.altText: A cream-and-brown goat picks its way down a rocky hill with curved horns and cloven hooves.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Hill, Planar, Underdark.
records.appearance: A small but commanding goblinoid with sharp fey features, large swept ears, watchful yellow eyes, and a compact, quick-footed build. Well-maintained mail and layered leather mark higher status than the surrounding rabble, and a curved scimitar, shortbow, and crowded quiver remain immediately usable.
records.silhouette: A small armored figure with wide pointed ears, a high asymmetrical shoulder guard, curved sword, and bow rising behind one shoulder.
records.pose: Standing on a low stone with scimitar leveled in command while the free hand signals an unseen war band.
records.environment: A torchlit cavern outpost with crude barricades and subdued figures far behind the subject
records.altText: A small olive-skinned goblin boss directs troops from a stone, scimitar drawn and shortbow on its back.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Hill, Planar, Underdark.
records.appearance: A small, wiry fey goblinoid with angular green features, oversized pointed ears, keen yellow-brown eyes, and quick narrow limbs. It wears patched cloth and a few scavenged leather pieces, gripping a plain dagger that looks large beside its slight frame.
records.silhouette: Small crouched humanoid with very large ears, narrow limbs, short ragged tunic, and a dagger held close.
records.pose: Darting from behind a stone with knees bent, dagger reversed along the forearm and free hand extended for balance.
records.environment: A rough hill-country ruin with waist-high stones and scrub
records.altText: A wiry green goblin minion darts from behind a ruined stone with a dagger held close.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Hill, Planar, Underdark.
records.appearance: A small, wiry fey goblinoid warrior with angular features, large pointed ears, keen eyes, and quick, balanced limbs. It wears practical mismatched armor over travel-stained clothing and carries a curved scimitar with a shortbow and compact quiver close to the body.
records.silhouette: Small crouched humanoid with oversized pointed ears, a curved blade held low, and a shortbow crossing the back.
records.pose: In a low mobile fighting stance, scimitar forward and free hand ready to dart away.
records.environment: A dim forest path beside weathered stones with enough open ground to read the full stance
records.altText: A small green-skinned goblin warrior crouches on a forest path with scimitar drawn and shortbow ready.

records.appearance: A young gold dragon with four graceful legs, two broad wings, a long finned tail, and an elegant head framed by smooth swept horns and fine whisker-like barbels. Layered gold scales brighten toward the face and chest, while a small heat shimmer gathers behind the teeth.
records.silhouette: A long-bodied quadrupedal dragon with swept horns, trailing facial barbels, high wings, and a finned serpentine tail.
records.pose: Standing on a grassy river stone with one forefoot raised, wings opening as a controlled glow builds in the throat.
records.environment: A broad green river meadow at sunrise with water and low stones behind the wyrmling
records.altText: A gold dragon wyrmling opens its wings beside a meadow river as warm firelight gathers in its throat.

records.appearance: A hulking bull-shaped construct clad in overlapping iron plates, with a low armored head, two heavy horns, pistonlike legs, and a thick metal tail. Riveted seams vent pale mineral vapor from within, and the muzzle is built like a furnace grate designed to expel petrifying breath.
records.silhouette: Massive low metal bull on four stout legs with two horns, a plated shoulder hump, broad muzzle, and thick tail.
records.pose: Pawing the earth before a charge, head lowered and a cloud of pale petrifying vapor rolling from the grated nostrils.
records.environment: A windswept ruined pasture scattered with weathered stone figures and broken walls
records.altText: An iron-plated bull gorgon lowers its horns as pale petrifying vapor pours from its muzzle.

records.appearance: A low spreading mass of wet gray protoplasm whose edges flatten into hair-thin exploratory sheets across stone. Its semi-translucent body contains cloudy mineral flecks and slow internal currents, while one blunt pseudopod rises without forming a face or permanent anatomy.
records.silhouette: Irregular ground-hugging puddle with one thick arched pseudopod and several thin flowing lobes.
records.pose: Creeping down a vertical cave wall as a single pseudopod reaches toward a corroded metal object below.
records.environment: A damp Underdark wall beside a rust-stained iron fitting and shallow pooled water
records.altText: A translucent gray ooze creeps down a cavern wall, extending one pseudopod toward rusted metal.

records.appearance: A young green dragon with four slender legs, two leathery wings, a long swimming tail, and a narrow cunning head crowned by a rippling leaflike crest. Deep green scales fade to moss at the joints, and yellow-green vapor leaks between the teeth as the throat expands for poison breath.
records.silhouette: A lithe quadrupedal dragon with high leaflike head crest, narrow muzzle, folded wings, long neck, and sinuous tail.
records.pose: Balanced along a mossy fallen trunk with wings half-open, head lowered through foliage as poison mist curls forward.
records.environment: A dense ancient forest with moss, filtered green light, and a shallow dark stream beneath the trunk
records.altText: A young green dragon stalks along a mossy forest trunk as poisonous yellow-green vapor curls from its jaws.

records.appearance: A lean old fey with moss-green skin, iron-gray hair, long hooked nails, and sharp features arranged into an expression of patient malice. Ragged wool, bark strips, and marsh reeds form layered clothing, while subtle webbing at the fingers and feet hints at an amphibious nature.
records.silhouette: A stooped humanoid with long tangled hair, narrow limbs, hooked claws, layered ragged shawl, and one hand extended.
records.pose: Standing ankle-deep at a swamp edge with one claw tracing the air as the mouth imitates a voice from elsewhere.
records.environment: A peat-dark forest swamp with reeds, cypress roots, and mist held behind the full figure
records.altText: A moss-green hag stands in shallow swamp water with hooked claws raised beneath tangled iron-gray hair.

records.appearance: A human-sized pallid worm-creature with a thick limbless body, muscular crawling underside, and four fleshy tentacles opening around a hard hooked beak. Its damp hide is mottled like cave stone, with shallow folds rather than scales and no visible eyes.
records.silhouette: An upright wormlike body curved into an S, topped by four spreading tentacles around a central beak.
records.pose: Clinging to a vertical cavern face with its lower body while the four facial tentacles flare toward prey.
records.environment: A fractured limestone cavern wall with the creature partly matched to the rock
records.altText: A pale eyeless grick clings to a limestone wall, four tentacles spread around its hooked beak.

records.appearance: A formidable hybrid with the head, feathered chest, wings, and taloned forelegs of a giant eagle joined to the tawny hindquarters of a lion. A dense feather mantle conceals the transition, while a long tufted tail and powerful feline back legs complete the predatory build.
records.silhouette: A winged quadruped with eagle head and fore-talons, lion hindquarters, tufted tail, and broad high-arched wings.
records.pose: Launching from a mountain nest with fore-talons lifted, hind paws driving off stone and wings at the first downstroke.

records.altText: A golden-brown griffon launches from a mountain nest, eagle talons raised above powerful lion hindquarters.

records.appearance: A muscular subterranean humanoid with chalk-gray hide, a heavy brow of unbroken skin where eyes would be, broad nostrils, and large ridged ears tuned to cavern echoes. Ragged hides wrap its torso, and both rough hands grip a brutal cudgel assembled from dense bone.
records.silhouette: Hunched broad humanoid with an eyeless head, large ears, long arms, and a heavy club held across the body.
records.pose: Turning toward a sound in a low fighting stance, eyeless face raised and bone cudgel drawn back.
records.environment: A narrow Underdark chamber with wet stone and faint mineral reflections
records.altText: An eyeless gray grimlock turns toward a cavern sound with a heavy bone cudgel raised.

records.appearance: A compact adult watch guard in a practical quilted coat reinforced with mail at the shoulders, a simple open helmet, and a sturdy round shield. A plain spear is held with trained economy; every item is maintained but marked by daily service rather than ceremony.
records.silhouette: Small armored adult behind a round shield, with an upright spear and open helmet forming a clear watchman profile.
records.pose: Holding a narrow gateway with shield forward and spear angled past its rim in a stable defensive stance.
records.environment: A worn town gate at dusk with masonry and a lantern softly behind the figure
records.altText: A compact town guard holds a gateway with a round shield forward and a plain spear ready.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult watch officer in polished but field-ready plate over mail, distinguished by a plain command sash and a fictional city badge. A longsword is held in the leading hand, while two balanced javelins remain clipped behind the shield-side shoulder for rapid use.
records.silhouette: A compact armored humanoid with crested practical helm, straight sword, short command mantle, and paired javelins rising behind.
records.pose: Holding a guarded street-fighting stance with longsword forward and free hand raised to halt unseen troops.
records.environment: A fortified city gate at dawn with simple masonry and a lowered barrier in soft focus
records.altText: A compact guard captain holds a longsword at a city gate with paired javelins and a muted command sash.

records.appearance: A great celestial serpent with a heavy golden-scaled body, an intelligent near-humanoid face, a crown of pale finlike spines, and calm luminous eyes. The long neck rises from protective coils, while pearl-colored fangs carry venom and a controlled spray of shining poison gathers at the lips.
records.silhouette: Large coiled serpent with no limbs, a high upright neck, refined face, swept crown spines, and broad protective coils.
records.pose: Coiled around the entrance to a sanctuary with head raised, body blocking the threshold, and a precise arc of venomous spittle forming.
records.environment: A vine-covered sandstone sanctuary where forest and desert meet beneath clear starlight
records.altText: A golden guardian naga coils across a sanctuary entrance with its crowned head raised and venom shining on its fangs.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A disciplined humanoid warrior transformed by draconic blood, with close-fitting scales across the face and limbs, a strong jaw, small swept horns, clawed hands, and a long balancing tail. Layered scale armor follows the natural plating without hiding it, while a neutral pearlescent glow gathers behind the teeth without fixing the figure to one ancestry.
records.silhouette: Armored upright humanoid with a horned draconic head, clawed hands, broad shoulders, digitigrade stance, and long tail but no wings.
records.pose: Turning into a defensive claw strike with tail counterbalancing and luminous breath beginning to gather in the open jaws.
records.environment: A scorched training courtyard with neutral stone and windblown ash
records.altText: An armored half-dragon with dark iridescent scales turns to strike as light gathers in its jaws.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Forest, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A lean avian monstrosity with a humanoid head, torso, and two long arms rising above the feathered lower body and powerful birdlike legs of a vulture. A separate pair of broad wings roots behind the shoulders; wind-tangled dark hair, hooked talons, and storm-gray plumage make the creature dangerous without relying on exposed anatomy.
records.silhouette: An upright figure with humanoid head, torso, and two arms framed by two vast feathered wings, windblown hair, and long taloned legs.
records.pose: Perched on a cliff edge with wings half-raised, head lifted in song and one taloned foot gripping the rock.

records.environment: A wind-cut coastal cliff above slate water with distant mist and no competing figures
records.altText: A storm-gray harpy sings from a coastal cliff with broad feathered wings raised and talons gripping stone.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Coastal, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A tiny, swift hawk with a streamlined chest, short rounded head, hooked bill, and narrow barred wings built for rapid turns. Its keen dark eyes face forward as yellow feet tuck beneath a rust-and-cream feathered body.
records.silhouette: Small raptor with narrow swept wings, a fan-shaped barred tail, and compact tucked legs.
records.pose: Cutting through a tight aerial turn with one wing lifted and the tail fanned for control.
records.environment: Open air above a windswept grassland with the ground softly distant
records.altText: A small rust-and-cream hawk turns sharply above a grassland with its barred tail fanned.

records.appearance: A powerful fiendish hound with the anatomy of a large mastiff, charcoal-black hide, heavy jaws, and plates of ember-cracked skin along the shoulders and spine. Fire glows through the throat and between the teeth, while smoke streams from the nostrils and heat curls the air around its paws.
records.silhouette: A broad four-legged hound with low head, thick neck, long tail, pointed ears, and a ridge of flame along the back.
records.pose: Driving forward in a low charge with jaws open and a widening cone of flame just beginning to leave the mouth.
records.environment: A black volcanic causeway with ash underfoot and distant infernal glow
records.altText: A charcoal hell hound charges over black rock as furnace light and flame build inside its open jaws.

records.appearance: A hulking demonic brute with a broad toadlike head, squat neck, immense hunched shoulders, long clawed arms, and thick splayed legs. Warty black-green hide folds around the joints, the wide mouth is lined with crushing teeth, and a visible haze of foul vapor clings close to the body.
records.silhouette: Large top-heavy fiend with a wide flat head, no visible neck, long arms, bowed legs, splayed claws, and a low crouched center of gravity.
records.pose: Lurching forward in a two-clawed rend with the mouth open and dense foul air rolling from the shoulders.
records.environment: A fetid planar marsh of black water and sulfurous stone vents
records.altText: A hulking toad-faced hezrou lurches through a black planar marsh surrounded by foul greenish vapor.

records.appearance: A towering, thick-bodied giant with a sloping brow, heavy jaw, weathered skin, and tangled hair hanging around immense shoulders. Crude hide layers and scavenged cloth are tied with rope, while a whole uprooted tree serves as a club and a filthy sack of broken debris hangs at the hip.
records.silhouette: Huge pear-shaped humanoid with a small head, very broad belly and shoulders, long arms, an uprooted-tree club, and heavy bare feet.
records.pose: Lumbering downhill with the tree club over one shoulder and the free hand digging through a sack for something to throw.

records.altText: A huge rough-clad hill giant lumbers downhill carrying an uprooted tree as a club.

records.silhouette: A winged quadruped with an eagle head and taloned forelegs, horse hindquarters, long equine tail, and high arched wings.
records.pose: Landing on a mountain shelf with wings braking overhead, fore-talons extended and hind hooves reaching for stone.
records.environment: A high grassy mountain shelf under open sky, with distant ridges softened by atmosphere
records.altText: A tawny hippogriff lands on a mountain shelf, eagle talons forward and horse hind legs braced beneath wide wings.

records.appearance: A massive natural hippopotamus with a barrel-shaped hairless body, short pillar legs, small high-set ears and eyes, and a broad square muzzle. Its mouth opens extraordinarily wide to reveal thick ivory canines and blunt incisors, while wet gray-brown skin shines above the waterline.
records.silhouette: A very heavy low quadruped with round back, short legs, tiny ears, broad blunt head, and huge open jaws.
records.pose: Surging from a river shallows with mouth fully open, front feet driving a wall of water aside.
records.environment: A broad green river margin with muddy shallows and low reeds behind the animal
records.altText: A huge gray-brown hippopotamus surges from a green river with its broad mouth and ivory teeth fully open.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Mountain, Planar, Underdark.
Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A disciplined, medium-sized goblinoid officer with rust-red skin, swept pointed ears, squared features, and a tall martial posture. Carefully fitted mail and reinforced lamellar armor bear restrained geometric insignia; a two-handed greatsword is ready in front, with a longbow and ordered quiver across the back.
records.silhouette: An upright armored humanoid with pointed ears, broad shoulder plates, long greatsword, and bow rising behind one shoulder.
records.pose: Holding the greatsword in a measured forward guard while the free edge of a command sash moves in the wind.
records.environment: A fortified hill camp with ordered stakes and muted troop silhouettes far behind the captain
records.altText: A rust-red hobgoblin captain stands in ordered dark armor with greatsword ready and longbow on the back.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Mountain, Planar, Underdark.
Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A tall disciplined fey goblinoid with rust-red skin, long pointed ears, a square jaw, and dark hair tied tightly behind the head. Layered iron lamellar over mail gives the warrior a severe geometric profile; a longsword is ready in one hand while a longbow and poison-dark arrows ride across the back.
records.silhouette: Upright armored goblinoid with long ears, broad square shoulders, straight sword, and tall bow rising behind.
records.pose: Advancing in a measured guard with longsword angled forward and the bow secured close for a quick transition.
records.environment: A fortified hill pass with disciplined stonework and muted banners far behind
records.altText: A rust-red hobgoblin warrior in dark lamellar advances with longsword ready and longbow on its back.

records.appearance: A palm-sized artificial creature shaped from fired clay and ash, with a narrow humanoid torso, oversized batlike wings, long delicate fingers, and a small angular head. Fine maker marks cross its surface, and dim violet light shows through hairline seams around the eyes and chest.
records.silhouette: Tiny winged humanoid with a large triangular wing span, thin limbs, clawed feet, and a tapering tail.
records.pose: Hovering close to a worktable with wings raised, one clawed hand extended as if awaiting a silent command.
records.environment: A dim arcane workshop with blurred glassware and parchment behind the subject
records.altText: A tiny clay homunculus hovers over an arcane worktable on broad leathery wings.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Necrotic, Piercing.
records.appearance: A large disciplined devil with a muscular red-brown body, a crown of two long horns, one pair of broad leathery wings, clawed digitigrade feet, and a heavy tail ending in a hooked infernal blade. It carries a long two-pronged searing fork, and heat glows beneath the chest scales without consuming the weapon or body.
records.silhouette: Tall winged fiend with two sweeping horns, broad shoulders, a long forked polearm, digitigrade legs, and a bladed tail curling behind.
records.pose: Descending into a spear-like thrust with wings braking, searing fork extended, and the infernal tail arcing around the flank.
records.environment: A fortified infernal rampart under a smoke-filled red sky
records.altText: A horned devil dives over an infernal rampart with a blazing two-pronged fork and hooked tail.

records.appearance: A large oceanic hunting shark with a streamlined spindle body, pointed snout, tall triangular dorsal fin, crescent tail, and rows of replaceable teeth behind the lips. Countershading shifts from blue-gray above to pale beneath, and old bite scars cross one flank.
records.silhouette: A broad torpedo-shaped fish with triangular dorsal and pectoral fins, pointed snout, and strong crescent tail.
records.pose: Banking through open water toward the viewer, mouth slightly open and tail flexed through a strong stroke.
records.environment: Open blue coastal water above a subdued rocky shelf with suspended particles
records.altText: A scarred blue-gray hunter shark banks through open coastal water with rows of teeth visible.

records.appearance: A huge amphibious reptilian predator with a low powerful body, four thick legs, a long balancing tail, and exactly five serpentine necks rising from a massively reinforced shoulder girdle. Each head has a narrow crocodilian jaw and its own alert posture, while overlapping marsh-green scales protect the shared body.
records.silhouette: Huge four-legged reptile with one heavy torso, long tail, and five distinct snake-like necks fanning above the shoulders.
records.pose: Wading forward through chest-deep water as all five heads attack in different arcs and the tail churns the swamp behind.
mustAvoid: different animal species for each head
records.environment: A broad coastal marsh channel with reeds flattened by the creature and low fog over dark water
records.altText: A five-headed hydra wades through a coastal marsh, its long necks striking in separate directions.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill.
records.appearance: A rangy spotted hyena with a sloping back, massive neck and forequarters, rounded ears, and a blunt dark muzzle. Coarse sandy fur stands in a short mane along the spine, while powerful jaws and worn paws suggest an efficient pack hunter.
records.silhouette: High-shouldered canine shape tapering to lower hindquarters, with a heavy head and short brush tail.
records.pose: Trotting diagonally toward the viewer with head low, ears forward, and one forepaw planted heavily.
records.environment: A dry grassland margin under low evening light
records.altText: A spotted hyena with heavy shoulders trots through dry grass with its blunt muzzle held low.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Cold, Piercing.
records.appearance: A tall insectile devil with a ridged mantislike head, heavy mandibles, segmented white-blue armor plates, two long clawed arms, digitigrade legs, and a thick jointed tail. It carries a long spear grown over with supernatural ice, while rime gathers across the body despite the infernal surroundings.
records.silhouette: Large upright insectoid with a narrow crested head, two long arms, high angular shoulders, bent legs, long spear, and segmented tail but no wings.
records.pose: Planting the ice spear into the ground in a forward guard while the segmented tail curls around to strike from the side.
records.environment: A frozen infernal canyon where black basalt is sealed beneath unnatural blue ice
records.altText: A blue-white insectile ice devil braces behind a frozen spear with its segmented tail curled to strike.

records.appearance: A small angular elemental with a wiry humanoid body sculpted from blue-white ice, one pair of thin crystalline wings, clawed limbs, and a sharp mischievous face. Frost feathers every joint and cold mist escapes between translucent ribs as it gathers a cone of freezing breath.
records.silhouette: Small winged humanoid with pointed head, narrow shoulders, long claws, and jagged ice-fragment edges.
records.pose: Hovering just above frozen ground with wings spread and head thrust forward to exhale a plume of frost.
records.environment: A wind-carved planar ice shelf with dark fissures and drifting powder
records.altText: A small blue-white ice mephit hovers above a frozen shelf while exhaling a plume of frost.

records.appearance: A tiny lean devil with leathery wings, narrow shoulders, long clawed fingers, short curved horns, and a flexible tail ending in a sharp venomous barb. Its angular face carries an alert, calculating expression rather than brute ferocity.
records.silhouette: Small airborne humanoid framed by two pointed batlike wings, with horns above and a long barbed tail curling below.
records.pose: Hovering in a tight turn with claws tucked and the barbed tail poised to strike from below.
mustInclude: long tail with a single stinger barb
records.environment: A shadowed infernal stone alcove lit by a low ember glow
records.altText: A tiny red imp hovers in a dark stone alcove with leathery wings spread and barbed tail raised.

records.appearance: An elegant adult fiend with a masculine humanoid frame, subtle swept horns, dark featherless wings, and a narrow tail, dressed in layered midnight cloth that leaves no unnecessary skin exposed. The handsome face is calm but sleepless eyes hold a predatory gleam, and violet psychic distortion gathers around an outstretched hand.
records.silhouette: A tall humanoid with one pair of broad batlike wings, short horns, long coat-like layers, narrow tail, and reaching hand.
records.pose: Descending in a controlled hover with wings cupped, one hand reaching in a restless touch while the other stays relaxed.
mustInclude: exactly one pair of leathery wings
records.environment: A dim aristocratic chamber opening onto a moonlit balcony, with furnishings subdued behind the figure
records.altText: A dark-winged incubus descends inside a moonlit chamber with violet psychic haze around one reaching hand.

records.appearance: An unseen large air elemental revealed only by a humanoid-shaped pressure hollow, curling dust, bent rain, and thin contours of refracted light. No solid body occupies the outline; currents wrap around an empty core and tighten into two powerful arm-shaped vortices.
records.silhouette: Barely readable tall humanoid absence defined by a rippling head-and-shoulders contour, two wind arms, and a trailing airborne wake.
records.pose: Striding weightlessly through a sharp turn as one invisible arm scythes forward and a tight vortex coils around the empty torso.
records.environment: A rain-swept urban rooftop where loose papers and droplets reveal the passing current
records.altText: A nearly invisible stalker crosses a rainy rooftop, outlined only by warped air, droplets, and spiraling papers.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A towering humanoid war construct made from interlocking iron plates, with a narrow furnace-slit helm, immense shoulders, and thick jointed legs. One forearm terminates in a heavy integrated blade while the other remains a crushing hand; a chest vent glows with contained fire and the mouth grille holds dense poisonous vapor.
records.silhouette: Large armored humanoid with a small slit-faced helm, blocky shoulders, one swordlike forearm, one heavy fist, and pillar legs.
records.pose: Marching through a measured bladed-arm sweep while a fiery bolt leaves the chest and poison smoke begins to vent from the helm.
mustAvoid: held sword replacing the blade arm
records.environment: A fortress foundry hall with stone floor plates cracked beneath each step
records.altText: A towering iron golem sweeps its bladed arm as fire flashes from its chest and poison smoke vents from its helm.

records.appearance: A small, fine-boned jackal with tall pointed ears, a narrow foxlike muzzle, amber eyes, and a black saddle over tawny fur. Its long legs and light paws give it a quick, wary stance, with a modest brush tail held low.
records.silhouette: Slender small canid with very tall ears, long legs, pointed muzzle, and low bushy tail.
records.pose: Pausing on a dune crest in three-quarter profile, one front paw raised and ears turning independently.
records.environment: A scrubby desert edge with low dunes and long morning shadows
records.altText: A tawny jackal pauses on a dune crest with one paw lifted and tall ears alert.

records.appearance: A huge adult orca with a muscular streamlined body, tall dorsal fin, broad pectoral flippers, and powerful horizontal tail flukes. Glossy black skin is broken by a white belly, white eye patches, and a gray saddle mark, with a few pale scars along the flank.
records.silhouette: A robust marine mammal with blunt rounded head, tall dorsal fin, paired flippers, and broad horizontal tail flukes.
records.pose: Rolling through a rising underwater turn with one white eye patch toward the viewer and tail flukes driving upward.
mustAvoid: exposed teeth in a constant snarl
records.environment: Cold open ocean below a broken silver surface with a loose school of fish for scale
records.altText: A huge black-and-white killer whale rolls through cold ocean water beneath the silver surface.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Radiant, Slashing.
records.appearance: A small-statured adult professional warrior enclosed in well-fitted plate and mail with restrained, fictional heraldry. A long two-handed greatsword is held across the armored body, while a heavy crossbow rides securely on the back beneath a short weatherproof cloak.
records.silhouette: A compact fully armored humanoid with closed helm, broad pauldrons, long greatsword, short cloak, and crossbow behind one shoulder.
records.pose: Standing in a grounded half-sword guard with one plated foot advanced and visor fixed on an approaching threat.
records.environment: A castle approach under overcast light with simple stonework and open ground around the stance
records.altText: A compact knight in brushed plate guards a castle approach with greatsword ready and heavy crossbow on the back.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Coastal, Desert, Forest, Hill, Mountain, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A small draconic humanoid with russet scales, a narrow wedge-shaped snout, swept-back horn nubs, and a long counterbalancing tail. A patched leather jerkin and small metal plates protect its torso, while one clawed hand carries a practical dagger.
records.silhouette: Short upright reptilian figure with a pointed snout, long tail, digitigrade legs, and dagger held low.
records.pose: Crouched in a pack-fighter stance with tail extended for balance and dagger poised for a quick thrust.
records.environment: A low-ceilinged mine passage with timber braces and dim reflected torchlight
records.altText: A small russet-scaled kobold warrior crouches in a mine passage with dagger poised and tail extended.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Bludgeoning, Lightning, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A gargantuan deep-sea monstrosity with a vast mantle, two glaring lateral eyes, a hard central beak, eight heavy muscular arms, and two much longer grasping tentacles. Dark ridged skin carries scars, barnacles, and bioluminescent lines, while electricity flashes across the wet surface and poisonous fluid gathers near the beak.
records.silhouette: Enormous squidlike mantle above a central beaked head, with eight thick arms spreading below and two longer tentacles reaching far outward.
records.pose: Rising vertically from black water with all ten appendages readable, two long tentacles seizing ruined stone while lightning strikes between the shorter arms.
records.environment: A storm-black ocean above a drowned city with broken towers held in the creature's grasp
records.altText: A gargantuan kraken rises over a drowned city with eight arms, two long tentacles, and lightning across its dark hide.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Poison, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A large fiend with the tawny four-legged body of a lion joined seamlessly at the shoulders to an imposing humanoid torso. Long dark hair frames a refined but cruel face, both humanoid hands end in heavy claws, and fine jewelry and desert cloth accent the form without hiding its predatory anatomy.
records.silhouette: A lion-bodied quadruped with upright humanoid torso and head, two clawed arms, four feline legs, long tail, and flowing hair.
records.pose: Leaping from a broken terrace with feline forepaws extended below and one humanoid claw reaching in a corrupting touch.
mustInclude: lion lower body with four legs
records.environment: A ruined desert palace terrace with windblown sand and low carved stone behind the leap
records.altText: A tawny lion-bodied lamia leaps from a desert terrace with its humanoid claw extended in violet corrupting magic.

records.appearance: A wretched devil formed as a sagging mound of pale, overheated flesh with a vaguely humanoid head and two short dragging arms. Its features appear half-melted and witless, with a slack mouth, tiny ember-dark eyes, and tarry slime gathering beneath its shapeless lower body.
records.silhouette: Bottom-heavy upright blob with a slumped head, two thick arm stubs, and no distinct legs.
records.pose: Lurching forward by dragging its heavy base, one malformed arm reaching without coordination.
records.environment: A lightless infernal waste of cracked black stone and low sulfur haze
records.altText: A sagging pale lemure drags its shapeless body across cracked infernal stone, leaving oily slime.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Cold, Force, Necrotic.
records.appearance: An ancient undead arcanist whose desiccated frame and exposed bone are held upright inside severe, many-layered robes. Cold points of light burn in deep eye sockets, arcane force diagrams orbit one skeletal hand, and the other carries paralyzing frost; a small sealed spirit jar hangs protected within a cage of runes at the chest.
records.silhouette: Tall narrow robed skeleton with a high collar, crowned hood, two long bony hands, and a small rune-caged vessel at the sternum.
records.pose: Floating a handspan above the floor with one hand directing eldritch bolts and the other extended in a precise paralyzing touch.
records.environment: A silent arcane vault lined with sealed doors and concentric floor runes
records.altText: A robed skeletal lich hovers in an arcane vault with a rune-caged spirit jar and cold magic in both hands.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Grassland, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A large adult male lion with a dense, weather-roughened mane, tawny muscular body, pale muzzle, and a black tuft at the end of its tail. The shoulders and forelimbs are powerfully developed for grappling, while old scars cross the nose without making the animal unnatural.
records.silhouette: A low powerful cat with a round mane, heavy shoulders, long back, tufted tail, and four grounded paws.
records.pose: Advancing in a low stride with one forepaw forward, mouth open in a full-throated roar.
records.environment: Dry open grassland with a low rocky rise and heat-softened vegetation behind the animal
records.altText: A scarred tawny lion strides through dry grass and roars, its dark mane framing a powerful head.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Swamp, Underdark.
records.appearance: A tiny rock lizard with a flattened alert head, beadlike eyes, pebbled scales, splayed climbing toes, and a long tapering tail. Subtle mottling breaks up its outline against stone, and the belly rests close to the surface.
records.silhouette: Low narrow reptile with four splayed legs and a tail longer than the body.
records.pose: Clinging head-down to a rough wall with toes spread and tail curling slightly away from the stone.
records.environment: A sunlit ruin wall with small cracks and sparse trailing moss
records.altText: A mottled olive lizard clings head-down to a sunlit stone wall on widely spread toes.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult spellcaster in layered travel robes reinforced at the shoulders and forearms, with a slim component satchel and a short practical staff carried at the back. Fine arcane diagrams orbit both hands as condensed bolts of force, illuminating a focused, experienced face.
records.silhouette: Compact robed humanoid with a high collar, asymmetrical cloak, component satchel, and two outstretched hands surrounded by angular magic.
records.pose: Pivoting into a spellcasting stance with one foot back and both hands directing several compact arcane bursts.
records.environment: A quiet ruined observatory with broken star charts and open sky behind the figure
records.altText: A compact robed mage casts blue-white bolts of force in a ruined observatory.

records.appearance: A small hunched elemental with a cracked basalt hide, glowing molten seams, clawed limbs, and one pair of ragged wings whose membranes resemble cooling lava. Its narrow head opens around a furnace-bright mouth, and viscous sparks drip briefly before hardening into black crust.
records.silhouette: Small winged humanoid with angular shoulders, long claws, pointed head, and jagged molten-edged wings.
records.pose: Rising from a low lava vent with wings lifted and jaws open to cast a short cone of fire.
records.environment: A black volcanic shelf above a narrow glowing fissure with restrained smoke
records.altText: A cracked basalt magma mephit rises over a lava fissure with molten wings spread and fire at its jaws.

records.appearance: A small compact elemental shaped like a stocky humanoid child of living magma, with no clothing, broad hands, short legs, and a rounded head split by furnace-bright eyes and mouth. A thin black crust forms and breaks across the orange molten body as heat ripples around it.
records.silhouette: Short broad humanoid flame-rock figure with large hands, sturdy legs, rounded head, and no wings.
records.pose: Striding eagerly across scorched stone with one glowing hand reaching forward to ignite what it touches.
records.environment: A scorched planar cavern floor with tiny flames catching along nearby cracks
records.altText: A small wingless magmin of living orange magma strides across black stone with one burning hand extended.

records.appearance: A gigantic woolly elephant with a high shoulder hump, domed head, small furred ears, long flexible trunk, and two immense tusks sweeping outward and upward. Dense shaggy hair hangs over the powerful legs, with frost clinging to the outer coat and snow packed around broad round feet.
records.silhouette: Huge high-shouldered quadruped with a sloping back, long hanging trunk, two curved tusks, small ears, and thick columnar legs.
records.pose: Charging across windblown snow with trunk curled up, tusks leveled, and the front feet throwing powder aside.
records.environment: An open arctic steppe beneath low clouds with distant dark pines for scale
records.altText: A shaggy mammoth charges across an arctic steppe with huge curved tusks and snow flying from its feet.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Coastal, Grassland, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A large monstrosity with the muscular body and four paws of a lion, a broad unsettling humanlike face framed by a coarse mane, and one pair of leathery dragonlike wings. Its long flexible tail ends in a dense fan of removable black spikes aimed like natural darts.
records.silhouette: A winged lion body with humanlike head and mane, four feline legs, broad bat wings, and a long spike-bristled tail.
records.pose: Crouching on a ridge with wings spread for balance while the tail curls over one shoulder to launch spikes.
mustInclude: long tail with many launchable spikes
records.environment: A barren highland ridge with open sky and distant scrub far below the creature
records.altText: A russet manticore crouches on a ridge, leathery wings spread and its spike-filled tail curled to fire.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Necrotic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A towering demon with a powerful humanoid upper body, exactly six arms arranged in three balanced pairs, a stern horned face, and a long armored serpent tail instead of legs. Each clawed hand wields a distinct dark pact blade, while the muscular lower coil is thick enough to crush and restrain.
records.silhouette: Upright fiendish torso with six radiating sword arms above a long coiled snake body, small swept horns, and no wings or legs.
records.pose: Coiled into a stable spiral while all six arms form a layered wheel of blades and the outer tail loop closes to constrict.
mustAvoid: identical arm overlap hiding the count
records.environment: A circular abyssal dueling floor of black stone with enough open space to read every arm
records.altText: A six-armed marilith coils on black stone with six pact blades forming a deadly wheel around her.

records.appearance: A broad-chested working mastiff with a square wrinkled muzzle, small folded ears, heavy jowls, and a short brindled coat. Its thick neck and powerful legs support a grounded stance, while a plain leather collar identifies a trained guardian rather than a wild beast.
records.silhouette: Heavy muscular dog with a broad head, deep chest, straight sturdy legs, and a long low tail.
records.pose: Surging one step forward with shoulders low, jaws open in a warning bark and forepaws planted wide.
records.environment: A lamplit stable courtyard with rough flagstones and a wooden gate
records.altText: A powerful brindled mastiff steps forward barking in a lamplit stable courtyard.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
records.appearance: A solitary monstrous humanoid with a stern weathered face framed by dozens of living venomous snakes instead of hair. Scaled patches cover the shoulders and clawed forearms, layered desert garments protect the torso, and pale green light gathers in the eyes and open palm as a focused poison ray.
records.silhouette: Upright humanoid with a writhing crown of snake necks, narrow shoulders, long clawed hands, and layered trailing garments.
records.pose: Turning from three-quarter profile so the snake crown fans clearly, one claw raised while the other projects a thin venomous ray.
mustInclude: living snakes in place of hair
records.environment: A sun-bleached desert sanctuary filled with cracked columns and weathered stone screens
records.altText: A snake-haired medusa turns in a ruined desert sanctuary while projecting a pale green poison ray.

records.appearance: A lithe aquatic warrior with a humanoid upper body, webbed hands, fin-edged forearms, and a powerful fish tail replacing both legs. Sea-green scales deepen along the tail, gill slits mark the neck, and a barbed ocean spear carries a cold blue sheen.
records.silhouette: Upright swimmer with a narrow humanoid torso, two arms, long tapering fish tail, and spear angled across the body.
records.pose: Twisting through the water in a fast lateral turn, tail sweeping behind as the returning spear reaches one hand.
mustInclude: single fish tail instead of legs
records.environment: A clear coastal kelp channel with rock shelves and shafts of filtered light
records.altText: A sea-green merfolk skirmisher turns through a kelp channel with a cold-glowing ocean spear.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Slashing.
