records.appearance: A hulking aquatic monstrosity built like a long-limbed ogre, with slick blue-green hide, a blunt fishlike head, webbed clawed hands, finned legs, and a muscular tail for steering. A barbed harpoon and rope coil are carried across its broad torso, and ragged fins fringe its jaw and spine.
records.silhouette: A large hunched aquatic humanoid with broad shoulders, long clawed arms, webbed feet, trailing fins, tail, and long harpoon.
records.pose: Driving upward from the seabed with harpoon drawn back to throw and the rope streaming in a loose coil.
mustAvoid: single serpent tail instead of legs
records.environment: A dim coastal seabed among broken pilings and waving kelp, with bubbles trailing upward
records.altText: A hulking blue-green merrow rises from the seabed with a barbed harpoon drawn back and rope streaming behind.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Bludgeoning, Piercing.
records.appearance: A dungeon chest caught midway through revealing its true amorphous form: warped planks and iron bands split around a broad fleshy seam, while one heavy pseudopod anchors it to the floor. The transformation is wet and muscular, but no decorative eyes or tidy humanlike teeth impose a face on it.
records.silhouette: A squat rectangular chest with a raised lid-like upper mass, one spreading adhesive base, and two irregular grasping lobes.
records.pose: Surging forward from a half-open chest shape as its base sticks to the flagstones and a pseudopod lashes outward.
records.environment: A torchlit dungeon store room with sparse crates and clear flagstones around the creature
records.altText: A battered dungeon chest twists into a mimic, slick flesh and an adhesive pseudopod breaking through warped boards.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A towering bull-headed monstrosity with a massively muscled humanoid torso, coarse black fur, cloven hooves, and huge outward-curving horns carved with abyssal maze marks. Both hands wield a long dark glaive whose blade leaks necrotic violet haze, while scarred leather and iron protect only vital areas.
records.silhouette: A large broad humanoid with bull head, wide horns, digitigrade hooved legs, long tail, and a two-handed glaive.
records.pose: Beginning a forward charge with horns lowered beside the glaive, one cloven hoof tearing stone from the floor.
records.environment: A vast Underdark labyrinth intersection with angular black stone and faint abyssal markings
records.altText: A black-furred minotaur of Baphomet charges through a labyrinth with carved horns and a violet-smoking glaive.

records.appearance: The reanimated skeleton of a towering bull-headed humanoid, with a long bovine skull, broad horn cores, massive rib cage, and digitigrade leg bones ending in split hooves. Dark binding force occupies the joints where tendons should be, and old iron fragments hang from the pelvis and shoulders.
records.silhouette: A large upright skeleton with wide bull horns, heavy chest, long arms, reverse-jointed legs, hooves, and no weapon.
records.pose: Lowering its horned skull into a forward gore while one bony fist pulls back for a crushing slam.
records.environment: A ruined labyrinth corridor with broken columns and dust lifting around its charge
records.altText: A towering minotaur skeleton lowers its horned bull skull to charge through a ruined labyrinth.

records.appearance: A sturdy mule with long donkey ears, a short upright mane, strong compact legs, and a deep barrel chest. Its dun coat darkens along the spine and lower limbs, while a simple pack saddle carries balanced canvas bundles without hiding the animal.
records.silhouette: Compact equine with very long ears, short mane, straight back beneath packs, and thin tufted tail.
records.pose: Climbing a stony incline with head lowered, one hind hoof driving forward under a balanced load.
records.environment: A narrow hill trail with pale stones and sparse grass under overcast light
records.altText: A dun pack mule climbs a rocky hill trail with long ears forward and balanced canvas bundles.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult corpse preserved beneath layered linen wrappings, dried skin visible only around the eyes, mouth, and one clenched hand. Faded funerary cloth and a few tarnished amulets hang close to the body, while dark rot-like magic concentrates around the striking fist.
records.silhouette: A compact upright humanoid wrapped from head to foot, with narrow shoulders, trailing bandage ends, and one heavy fist extended.
records.pose: Advancing stiffly with one rotting fist raised and the other arm drawing back, eyes fixed in a dreadful glare.
records.environment: A sealed desert tomb chamber with low carved stone and dust suspended in one shaft of light
records.altText: A compact linen-wrapped mummy advances through a dusty tomb with one darkened fist raised and glare fixed forward.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Necrotic, Psychic.
records.appearance: A small but commanding undead sovereign wrapped in countless layers of darkened linen, with a dry angular face, emberlike eyes, and a rigid ceremonial posture. A restrained collar, broken seal tablets, and bands of once-fine metal mark ancient rank, while one wrapped fist leaks necrotic dust and the other directs a sphere of consuming darkness.
records.silhouette: Compact upright wrapped figure with a tall layered collar, narrow crowned head, one heavy fist, trailing bandages, and a hovering dark energy sphere.
records.pose: Standing squarely on a burial dais with one rotting fist raised and the other channeling a wave of negative energy outward.
records.environment: A sealed desert burial hall with cracked ritual stones and windblown dust crossing the floor
records.altText: A compact mummy lord stands on a burial dais, wrapped fist raised as black-violet energy spreads outward.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Force, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A huge, grotesquely powerful demon combining a boarlike tusked head, heavy ape-shaped torso, long clawed arms, bowed legs, and one pair of comparatively small ragged wings. Coarse dark fur gives way to warty gray flesh across the belly, while a pulsing halo of warped force and fear distorts the air.
records.silhouette: Large pear-shaped fiend with a tusked boar head, massive long arms, hunched shoulders, bowed legs, and undersized wings high on the back.
records.pose: Hovering improbably just above broken ground with both claws spread and a circular wave of frightening distortion expanding from the body.
records.environment: A broken abyssal terrace surrounded by floating rubble and sickly planar haze
records.altText: A tusked, ape-bodied nalfeshnee hovers above shattered stone as a ring of fearful distortion spreads outward.

records.appearance: A gaunt fiendish crone with long iron-gray hair, deeply lined indigo skin, hooked nails, and eyes like banked coals. Layered robes are hung with keys, bone charms, and small dream-catch vessels, while a carefully guarded black soul bag rides close against the ribs.
records.silhouette: Bent but tall robed humanoid with a sharp hooked profile, long hair, clawlike fingers, layered skirts, and a small heavy pouch at the side.
records.pose: Leaning forward from the edge of darkness with one claw raised to part a ribbon of nightmare mist and the other protecting the soul bag.
records.environment: A bleak borderland between a moonlit ruin and a smoky nightmare plane
records.altText: A gaunt indigo night hag parts nightmare mist while clutching a dark soul bag in a moonlit ruin.

records.appearance: A large fiendish warhorse with a glossy coal-black coat, powerful equine anatomy, luminous ember eyes, and fire replacing much of its mane and tail. Each iron-dark hoof burns without being consumed and leaves a brief print of flame, while smoke rolls from the nostrils.
records.silhouette: A full horse on four long legs with arched neck, streaming flame mane and tail, raised forelegs, and no wings or horn.
records.pose: Rearing in midair during an ethereal stride, forehooves burning and the hindquarters already dissolving into smoke.
records.environment: A dark planar causeway suspended over red cloud, with smoke defining the horse's fading hind legs
records.altText: A coal-black nightmare rears over a dark planar causeway with flaming mane, tail, and all four hooves.

records.appearance: A compact adult aristocrat in a fitted travel coat over a discreet steel breastplate, with carefully arranged hair, fine gloves, and a narrow rapier. The clothing is costly but practical, marked by restrained embroidery and one small signet rather than extravagant regalia.
records.silhouette: Small upright adult in a tailored long coat, one hand behind a slim rapier and the other near the chest.
records.pose: Standing in poised three-quarter profile with rapier extended in a measured defensive line.
records.environment: A restrained manor courtyard with pale stone and clipped greenery behind the subject
records.altText: A compact noble in a navy travel coat holds a slender rapier in a poised manor courtyard stance.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Lightning, Slashing.
records.appearance: A large mustard-ochre mass of translucent living slime that spreads in thick lobes and clings to vertical stone. Darker granules swirl slowly beneath its glossy skin, and a rope-like pseudopod extends from the leading edge without suggesting a head or face.
records.silhouette: An irregular flattened ooze with a heavy hanging lobe, broad creeping base, and one long rounded pseudopod.
records.pose: Flowing down a cavern pillar while its lower mass pools outward and one pseudopod swings across the passage.
records.environment: A wet Underdark passage around a single stone pillar with dim reflected torchlight
records.altText: A glossy ochre jelly pours down a cavern pillar and reaches across the passage with one thick pseudopod.

records.appearance: A small natural octopus with a soft rounded mantle, horizontal amber eyes, and exactly eight flexible arms lined with paired pale suckers. Its skin shifts from rust red to stony gray in irregular patches as it flows over the seabed.
records.silhouette: Rounded mantle above a low radial spread of eight curling arms, with no fins or shell.
records.pose: Crawling over a reef stone with two arms reaching forward while the others grip and coil beneath it.
records.environment: A shallow rocky reef with filtered blue light and sparse sea grass
records.altText: A rust-and-gray octopus crawls over a reef stone on eight sucker-lined arms.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Mountain, Swamp, Underdark.
records.appearance: A hulking giant with a heavy belly, sloped shoulders, long powerful arms, and a broad coarse-featured head. Thick hide garments and scavenged leather straps cover the torso, one fist grips a tree-trunk greatclub, and several rough javelins ride in a bundle across the back.
records.silhouette: A huge top-heavy humanoid with long arms, bowed legs, oversized club, small head, and javelins above one shoulder.
records.pose: Taking a wide lumbering step with the greatclub resting low in both hands and shoulders turning into a swing.
records.environment: A muddy hill-country track with low scrub and a broken cart wheel for scale
records.altText: A hulking hide-clad ogre lumbers down a muddy track with a tree-trunk club and javelins on its back.

records.appearance: A reanimated ogre corpse whose huge frame remains brutally strong despite gray slack skin, stiff joints, and a collapsed posture. Tattered hide wrappings cling to the belly and shoulders, one eye is clouded, and dark necrotic stitching holds major wounds closed without exposed organs.
records.silhouette: A huge hunched humanoid with uneven shoulders, dragging long arms, bowed legs, and one oversized fist raised to slam.
records.pose: Staggering through a heavy one-handed slam, torso lagging behind the swinging arm with unnatural momentum.
records.environment: A foggy ruined courtyard with broken masonry giving scale to the enormous figure
records.altText: A massive gray ogre zombie staggers through a ruined courtyard with one heavy fist swinging down.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A tall blue-skinned fiend with an ogre-like frame, two short ivory horns, black hair, sharp teeth, and clawed hands. Layered dark robes hang over practical lamellar armor, while the figure floats slightly above the ground and gathers a wavering indigo nightmare ray between its fingers.
records.silhouette: Large broad-shouldered robed humanoid with two horns, long sleeves, clawed hands, heavy boots hovering clear of the ground, and no wings.
records.pose: Hovering in a calm forward lean with one claw extended to cast and the other drawing the robe aside as if preparing to change shape.
mustAvoid: club or glaive not in the local actions
records.environment: A moonlit forest shrine path fading into the distant lights of a sleeping town
records.altText: A horned blue oni hovers above a moonlit path with indigo nightmare energy curling from one claw.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A broad three-legged scavenger with a low knotted body, a vertical tooth-filled mouth, two long muscular tentacles ending in rough sensory pads, and a shorter eyestalk rising between them. Its hide is thick, folded, and mottled from life among refuse, with no recognizable humanoid anatomy.
records.silhouette: Low tripod body with a central gaping mouth, two long lateral tentacles, one shorter eyestalk, and three splayed elephantine legs.
records.pose: Rearing on its rear legs as both long tentacles sweep outward to seize prey and the central mouth opens.
records.environment: A vast subterranean refuse chamber with broken masonry and shallow polluted water
records.altText: A three-legged otyugh opens its central jaws while two long tentacles sweep across a subterranean refuse pit.

records.appearance: A tiny woodland owl with a round facial disk, large dark eyes, short hooked beak, and soft mottled plumage specialized for silent flight. Broad wings curve around the body as feathered legs lower two compact taloned feet.
records.silhouette: Round-headed bird with broad rounded wings, short tail, and two small lowered feet.
records.pose: Gliding just above a branch with wings fully spread and face held level toward the viewer.
records.environment: A moonlit woodland opening with a single lichen-covered branch
records.altText: A small mottled owl glides silently above a branch with broad wings spread and dark eyes forward.

records.appearance: A massive quadrupedal predator combining the barrel-chested body and powerful limbs of a bear with a great owl-like head. A hooked beak, forward-facing amber eyes, and a facial disk of stiff feathers blend into a thick feathered mantle before giving way to coarse fur.
records.silhouette: Heavy bear body on four clawed legs with a round feathered head, hooked beak, high shoulder mantle, and no wings.
records.pose: Lunging forward from a low four-legged stance, one forepaw lifted and the beak open in a warning cry.
mustAvoid: separate owl perched on a bear
records.environment: A shadowed temperate forest floor with broken branches and soft shafts of daylight
records.altText: A huge brown owlbear lunges through a forest, its owl face and feathered mantle rising from a bear body.

records.appearance: A sleek black panther with a long flexible torso, low shoulders, rounded ears, and powerful hindquarters. Rosette markings appear only where cool light crosses the glossy coat, while pale whiskers and yellow-green eyes sharpen the otherwise shadow-dark face.
records.silhouette: Long low big cat with rounded head, deep shoulders, large paws, and a long gently curved tail.
records.pose: Descending from a mossy branch in a controlled crouch with one forepaw extended and tail balancing behind.
records.environment: A humid forest understory with a low mossed branch and filtered green light
records.altText: A sleek black panther climbs down a mossy branch, faint rosettes visible around its yellow-green eyes.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Hill, Planar.
records.appearance: A magnificent celestial horse with clean athletic proportions, bright intelligent eyes, and one pair of enormous feathered wings rooted behind the shoulders. A pale mane and tail stream like fine silk, while the white coat carries a faint warm sheen rather than an artificial glow.
records.silhouette: A full horse body on four legs with long neck, flowing mane and tail, and two high feathered wings.
records.pose: Lifting into flight from a meadow with forelegs tucked, hind hooves just leaving the grass, and wings driving downward.
records.environment: A high green meadow opening onto a luminous sky with soft distant hills
records.altText: A white pegasus lifts from a high meadow with four hooves leaving the grass and broad feathered wings descending.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Planar, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A large predatory spider with eight long segmented legs, a low armored cephalothorax, rounded abdomen, clustered black eyes, and paired fangs wet with venom. Half the body is slipping into the Ethereal Plane, turning translucent and doubled by a cool violet afterimage.
records.silhouette: A broad low spider on eight radial legs with raised front pair, rounded abdomen, and a partially doubled fading outline.
records.pose: Stepping through a stone wall at an angle, four legs solid on the floor while the rear half phases through masonry.
records.environment: A shadowed dungeon junction with one plain stone wall visibly intersecting the phased body
records.altText: A blue-black phase spider steps through a dungeon wall, its eight-legged rear half fading into violet translucence.

records.appearance: A tiny deep-bodied river fish with a blunt forehead, bright watchful eye, silver-gold scales, and a powerful jaw lined with interlocking triangular teeth. Red washes the lower jaw and belly while translucent fins hold it steady in dark water.
records.silhouette: Compact oval fish with a blunt head, triangular dorsal fin, forked tail, and slightly open jaw.
records.pose: Turning sharply toward the viewer with tail flexed, mouth just open enough to reveal the fitted teeth.
records.environment: A dim freshwater channel with submerged roots and suspended silt
records.altText: A silver piranha with a red belly turns through dark river water, triangular teeth visible.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult deck fighter dressed in practical layers suited to salt, rain, and climbing rigging. A weathered coat hangs over a fitted vest and sash, a single dagger is held in reverse grip, and an animated, self-assured expression supports the pirate's distracting panache.
records.silhouette: A compact swaggering figure in a short sea coat, broad sash, soft boots, and one raised dagger, with loose fabric tugged by wind.
records.pose: Balanced on a wet deck with dagger held low, free hand extended in a theatrical challenge.
records.environment: The rain-dark deck of a wooden sailing vessel with blurred rigging and gray sea beyond
records.altText: A small deck pirate flourishes a dagger on a rain-dark ship while loose coat tails whip in the sea wind.

records.appearance: A compact adult ship commander in a fitted salt-stained coat over light armor, with sturdy sea boots, a practical sash, and a weathered hat kept low against the glare. A slender rapier is balanced in one hand and a single flintlock-style pistol in the other, both maintained with professional care.
records.silhouette: Short confident humanoid with a long coat, low maritime hat, narrow sword extended, and compact pistol held close.
records.pose: Braced on a rolling deck with rapier forward and pistol held back near the shoulder, coat tails snapping in the wind.
records.environment: The rain-dark deck of a wooden sailing ship with rigging blurred behind the subject
records.altText: A compact pirate captain braces on a stormy deck with rapier drawn and a flintlock pistol ready.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Fire, Force, Necrotic, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A large but overwhelmingly powerful devil with a heavily muscled red-scaled body, crown of backward horns, one pair of broad leathery wings, clawed digitigrade legs, and a long barbed tail. One fist grips a brutal fiery mace while the jaws expose venomous fangs and a dense fear haze distorts the air around the head.
records.silhouette: Large broad winged fiend with horn crown, thick shoulders, one heavy mace, digitigrade legs, and long barbed tail.
records.pose: Advancing with wings arched forward, fiery mace held low for an upward strike, claw extended, and tail poised behind the legs.
records.environment: An infernal citadel gate of black iron and basalt under a low ember-red sky
records.altText: A horned pit fiend advances before an infernal gate with dark wings, fiery mace, claws, and barbed tail ready.

records.appearance: A towering celestial warrior with a powerful jade-toned humanoid body, an ageless focused face, and one pair of enormous white feathered wings. Minimal celestial armor protects the torso and forearms without obscuring the physique, while a great two-handed sword burns with concentrated radiant light and a holy burst gathers behind the shoulders.
records.silhouette: Large tall humanoid framed by one enormous feathered wing pair, with a long radiant sword held across the body and no additional limbs.
records.pose: Hovering in a powerful descending stance with wings lifted and the radiant sword drawn back for one decisive sweep.
records.environment: A luminous planar battlefield of pale fractured stone above rolling clouds
records.altText: A jade-toned planetar descends with enormous white wings and a great sword blazing with radiant light.

records.appearance: A large marine reptile with a broad barrel-shaped torso, four powerful tapered flippers, a remarkably long flexible neck, and a small wedge-shaped head lined with narrow conical teeth. Smooth dark skin is mottled above and pale below, with no shell, fins, or serpentine body coils.
records.silhouette: A broad aquatic body with four winglike flippers, short tail, very long neck, and small head.
records.pose: Sweeping through a submerged turn with front flippers angled down and the long neck curving toward a school of fish.
records.environment: Cold clear seawater above a rocky shelf with small fish establishing scale
records.altText: A slate-blue plesiosaurus banks above a rocky seabed, four flippers driving its long neck toward a school of fish.

records.appearance: A massive adult polar bear with a long neck, narrow head, small rounded ears, and broad paws spread for traction. Dense off-white fur clumps slightly with frost and seawater, revealing powerful shoulders beneath rather than a perfectly clean plush coat.
records.silhouette: A huge low-shouldered bear on four broad paws with long neck, small ears, short tail, and gently sloping back.
records.pose: Climbing from broken sea ice with one forepaw planted high, head raised to test the wind.
records.environment: Broken coastal sea ice under a low arctic sky with dark water behind the bear
records.altText: A huge frost-clumped polar bear climbs from broken sea ice and raises its narrow head into the wind.

records.appearance: A compact sturdy pony with a thick neck, shaggy mane, short strong legs, and a broad intelligent face. Its chestnut coat carries a pale blaze and feathering around dark hooves, with a simple halter resting loosely on the head.
records.silhouette: Short-backed small equine with a deep body, thick mane, short legs, and full tail.
records.pose: Trotting across a grassy paddock with one foreleg high and the shaggy mane lifted by motion.
records.environment: An open grass paddock bordered by a low weathered fence
records.altText: A sturdy chestnut pony trots across a green paddock with its thick cream mane lifting.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult cleric in practical ceremonial layers over light protective leather, with a plain travel cloak and a clearly fictional sunburst emblem. A sturdy mace is held near the body while warm radiant flame gathers above the open free hand.
records.silhouette: A compact robed humanoid with mantle and stole, mace held low, open casting hand, and a small halo-like flame above the palm.
records.pose: Standing squarely with the mace guarding the torso and the other hand presenting a focused tongue of radiant flame.
records.environment: A quiet stone sanctuary with simple arches and enough floor visible to read the full stance
records.altText: A compact blue-robed priest guards with a steel mace while holding a white-gold radiant flame aloft.

records.appearance: A compact adult temple acolyte in simple layered vestments over practical traveling clothes, carrying a plain mace and a small undecorated devotional focus. Warm radiant light gathers around the open free hand, illuminating an earnest face without tying the figure to any real-world faith.
records.silhouette: Small robed adult with a short mace held low and one raised hand cupping a compact flame-like glow.
records.pose: Standing with one foot forward, mace guarding the body as the other hand releases a focused radiant flame.
records.environment: A modest stone sanctuary with neutral geometric carvings and soft window light
records.altText: A compact priest acolyte in simple vestments holds an iron mace while golden radiance gathers in one hand.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Hill, Mountain, Urban.
records.appearance: A cat-sized miniature dragon with four slender clawed legs, two leathery wings, a narrow horned head, and a long flexible tail ending in a dark venomous stinger. Fine red-brown scales cover its agile body, and large amber eyes lend alert intelligence without becoming human.
records.silhouette: Tiny quadrupedal dragon beneath one pair of raised wings, with a horned head and very long stinger-tipped tail.
records.pose: Perched on a stone rail with wings half-open, forebody low and stinging tail arched above its back.
records.environment: A quiet tower balcony with weathered stone and distant sunset haze
records.altText: A cat-sized russet pseudodragon perches on a stone rail with two wings open and stinger tail arched.

records.appearance: A broad puddle of semitranslucent gray protoplasm that creeps by rolling its own edge forward. Dark mineral flecks and half-dissolved metal drift inside, while concentric violet pulses travel through the gel without forming eyes, a brain, or any other organ.
records.silhouette: A low irregular pool with one rising pseudopod and thin exploratory lobes spreading over the stone.
records.pose: Flowing down a cavern wall and gathering into a reaching pseudopod as a pressure ripple bends the air around it.
records.environment: A damp Underdark passage with wet stone and a restrained violet distortion around the creature
records.altText: A smoky gray ooze crawls down an Underdark wall as violet psychic ripples pulse through its shapeless body.

records.appearance: A large flying reptile with a long backward-pointing cranial crest, toothless spear-shaped beak, narrow furred torso, and immense leathery wings stretched across elongated fourth fingers. Two compact clawed feet trail beneath a short tail, preserving a natural pterosaur build.
records.silhouette: Wide angular wing plane centered on a small body, with a long beak and matching rear skull crest.
records.pose: Soaring past a cliff in a shallow bank with wings nearly rigid and long crest cutting the wind.
records.environment: A high coastal cliff above distant surf under clear wind-bright sky
records.altText: A tawny pteranodon banks beside a sea cliff on immense leathery wings, long crest streaming behind.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A gargantuan burrowing worm with a mountain-thick segmented body, a circular jaw lined by several inward-curving plates of teeth, no limbs, and a long armored tail ending in a single venomous stinger. Overlapping violet plates are worn pale along the ridges, while acidic saliva steams in the cavern air.
records.silhouette: Enormous limbless segmented cylinder with a wide circular maw at one end and a long curved tail terminating in one stinger.
records.pose: Erupting vertically through a cavern floor in a vast coil, maw open above and the stinger tail curling into view behind.
records.environment: A colossal Underdark vault split by a fresh tunnel with tiny crystal formations for scale
records.altText: A gargantuan purple worm erupts through a cavern floor with its circular jaws open and stinger tail raised.

records.appearance: A tiny, wingless demon with a wiry crouched body, long grasping arms, narrow horned head, and clawed feet. Mottled swamp-green hide stretches over sharp joints, a thin tail counterbalances its movements, and its oversized eyes gleam with spiteful intelligence.
records.silhouette: A tiny hunched humanoid with two short horns, long forearms, hooked claws, bent legs, and a thin curling tail.
records.pose: Crouching on all fours atop a cracked stone, one claw lifted as its body begins to blur toward another animal shape.
records.environment: A sulfur-stained planar crevice with low smoky light and enough empty stone to show its tiny size
records.altText: A tiny wingless green quasit crouches on cracked stone, horned head raised and claws beginning to blur with magic.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Psychic, Slashing.
records.appearance: A composed fiend with the upright body of a well-dressed humanoid, the head and striped fur of a tiger, and hands whose palms turn unnaturally backward. Tailored layered garments and restrained jewelry suggest immense patience and wealth, while the eyes remain cold and a thread of necrotic curse-light winds from one reversed hand.
records.silhouette: Medium upright tiger-headed humanoid with broad robed shoulders, long tail, and two conspicuously reversed hands held in formal gestures.
records.pose: Standing at ease with one backward hand extended in command and the other concealed partly within layered garments.
records.environment: A secluded urban audience chamber with carved screens and neutral cosmopolitan furnishings
records.altText: A tiger-headed rakshasa stands in a quiet audience chamber with both unnatural backward hands visible.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A tiny brown rat with a low flexible body, blunt whiskered muzzle, rounded pink ears, bright black eyes, and a long naked tail marked by fine scales. Its quick paws grip the stone while coarse guard hairs shine along the back.
records.silhouette: Low compact rodent with rounded ears, pointed nose, arched back, and a very long thin tail.
records.pose: Pausing beside a crack with forepaws lifted, nose raised to test the air and tail trailing in an S curve.
records.environment: A shadowed cellar corner with rough stone, straw, and a narrow shaft of light
records.altText: A small brown rat sniffs the air beside a cellar crack with its long tail curved behind it.

records.appearance: A glossy black raven with a heavy straight bill, shaggy throat feathers, intelligent dark eyes, and broad wings whose blue-violet sheen appears in the light. Its wedge-shaped tail spreads as strong black feet approach a perch.
records.silhouette: Large-billed black bird with broad wings, fingered primaries, shaggy throat, and wedge tail.
records.pose: Landing on a weathered signpost with wings braking and beak parted as though imitating a voice.
records.environment: A misty roadside with a single old wooden signpost and distant marsh grass
records.altText: A glossy black raven lands on a weathered signpost with its broad wings open and beak parted.

records.appearance: A young but powerfully built red dragon with four clawed legs, two leathery wings, a long counterbalancing tail, and a wedge-shaped head crowned by swept-back horns. Overlapping crimson scales darken along the spine, while ember light glows between a few throat scales.
records.silhouette: Compact quadrupedal dragon with high folded wings, a horned angular head, low shoulders, and a long whip-like tail.
records.pose: Crouched on volcanic rock with wings half-open, head thrust forward as smoke curls from its jaws.
records.environment: A rocky mountainside vent with dim smoke and a restrained lava glow in the distance
records.altText: A juvenile red dragon crouches on volcanic rock, wings spread and smoke curling from its jaws.

records.appearance: A sleek reef shark with a streamlined gray body, pale underside, pointed snout, five visible gill slits, and tall triangular dorsal fin. Broad pectoral fins steer between coral while rows of small sharp teeth show inside a natural crescent mouth.
records.silhouette: Streamlined fish with pointed nose, tall dorsal fin, paired pectoral fins, and strong crescent tail.
records.pose: Turning quickly around a reef outcrop with body flexed and near pectoral fin lowered into the curve.
records.environment: A clear tropical reef channel with subdued coral and shafts of turquoise light
records.altText: A sleek gray reef shark turns through a clear coral channel with its tall dorsal fin upright.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Fire, Piercing.
records.appearance: A gigantic arctic burrower with a long segmented body, dozens of sharp insectlike legs, a broad armored head, and crushing mandibles. White-blue dorsal plates are rimed with frost, but the flexible seams underneath glow furnace red, turning nearby snow to steam as the creature moves.
records.silhouette: Huge low centipede-like body with many paired legs, a wide mandibled head, high overlapping back plates, and tapering segmented tail.
records.pose: Bursting in a curved arc from beneath a snowfield, front legs spread and mandibles open as heat flashes along the exposed underside.
records.environment: A shattered arctic snowfield with a steaming trench cut through blue ice
records.altText: A huge blue-armored remorhaz erupts from snow, its many legs spread and furnace-red underside steaming.

records.appearance: A large natural rhinoceros with thick folded gray hide, barrel chest, short powerful legs, and a broad head carrying one long nasal horn with a smaller horn behind it. Mud and grass cling to the lower flanks, and the small ears turn independently above watchful eyes.
records.silhouette: A massive low quadruped with arched back, heavy head, two aligned nasal horns, short tail, and stout legs.
records.pose: Breaking into a forward charge with head lowered, front foot striking dust and both horns aligned at chest height.
mustInclude: one large and one small nasal horn
records.environment: Open dry grassland with low dust and sparse thorn scrub kept behind the animal
records.altText: A large gray rhinoceros charges across dry grass with its two nasal horns lowered through rising dust.

records.appearance: A fit riding horse with a balanced athletic frame, deep chest, clean long legs, and an attentive refined head. Its bay coat shines beneath a practical leather saddle and bridle, with a rolled blanket and small saddlebag kept close for travel.
records.silhouette: Tall proportionate horse with arched neck, long legs, full tail, and a compact riding saddle.
records.pose: Moving in a collected canter across open ground, one foreleg reaching as mane and reins lift.
records.environment: A broad grassland trail under clear morning light with low hills distant
records.altText: A saddled bay riding horse canters along a grassland trail with black mane and reins lifted.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Coastal, Desert, Hill, Mountain.
records.appearance: A truly colossal raptor with the anatomy of a powerful eagle, including a deep feathered chest, hooked beak, one pair of immense wings, long feathered tail, and two taloned legs capable of carrying enormous prey. Individual weathered flight feathers are the size of trees, and scars mark a long life above mountain storms.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan eagle profile with two vast outstretched wings, small hooked head, broad tail fan, and two heavy taloned legs.
records.pose: Banking between mountain peaks with one taloned foot reaching forward and the far wing cutting into cloud.
records.environment: A chain of snow-capped mountain peaks with clouds far below and tiny pines for scale
records.altText: A gargantuan dark-feathered roc banks between snowy peaks with one enormous talon extended.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Psychic.
records.appearance: A stalagmite-shaped cave predator whose ridged stone-colored body conceals a vertical maw, a single glaring eye, and six long cordlike tendrils. Its hide mimics layered limestone and mineral drips so closely that only the wet teeth and slowly flexing strands reveal living tissue.
records.silhouette: Tall tapering stone column with a broad rooted base, one central eye and mouth, and six thin tendrils radiating outward.
records.pose: Anchored to a cavern wall while all six tendrils snap outward at different depths and the maw opens to reel prey inward.
records.environment: A deep limestone cavern dense with natural stalagmites and thin shafts of reflected blue light
records.altText: A stone-colored roper reveals one eye and a vertical maw as six tendrils lash across a limestone cave.

records.appearance: A low pony-sized monstrosity with four clawed legs, a humped armored carapace, small deep-set eyes, and two very long feathery antennae sweeping from its blunt head. A segmented tail ends in a distinctive paddle-like fan, while rust-colored dust stains the mouthparts and forelimbs.
records.silhouette: Low quadrupedal insectoid with arched armored back, twin long antennae forward, and a fan-tipped tail behind.
records.pose: Trotting eagerly toward a discarded iron helm with both antennae extended to make contact.
records.environment: A damp Underdark storeroom with corroded iron scraps and rough stone
records.altText: A rust-brown rust monster reaches two feathery antennae toward an iron helm in a cavern store.

records.appearance: A large prehistoric cat with immensely developed shoulders, thick forelimbs, a short powerful back, and two long flattened upper canines extending below the lower jaw. Its tawny coat is mottled with faint broken stripes, and the mouth can open unusually wide without becoming reptilian.
records.silhouette: A heavy-fronted big cat with low hindquarters, short tail, broad head, two long saber canines, and four paws.
records.pose: Leaping from a rocky shelf with forepaws spread, jaw open and short tail extended for balance.
records.environment: A cold rocky upland with dry grass patches and a pale distant mountain slope
records.altText: A heavy-shouldered saber-toothed tiger leaps from a rocky shelf with long ivory canines exposed.

records.appearance: A lean sea-fiend with a sharklike humanoid head, lidless black eyes, gill slits along the neck, and a finned muscular body covered in dark green scales. Webbed clawed hands, digitigrade feet, and a strong dorsal fin suit both swimming and violent movement ashore.
records.silhouette: Upright fish-humanoid with finned head and spine, long clawed arms, webbed feet, and no fish tail.
records.pose: Rising from waist-deep surf in a low predatory stance with both clawed hands spread to rend.
mustInclude: two legs rather than fish tail
records.environment: A moonlit rocky shoreline with dark surf and kelp-wrapped stones
records.altText: A dark green sahuagin warrior rises from moonlit surf with sharklike head and webbed claws spread.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Fire, Piercing.
records.appearance: A large elemental warrior with a powerful humanoid torso rising from a long serpentine lower body, all clad in overlapping copper-red scales that glow between the seams. A crown of swept spines frames the angular face, and both hands wield a long spear whose head burns without consuming the metal.
records.silhouette: Broad humanoid upper body with two arms and a crested head flowing into a long coiling snake tail, with a tall spear crossing the form.
records.pose: Coiled around a black rock outcrop with the flaming spear leveled forward and the free length of tail tightening to constrict.
records.environment: A furnace-bright cavern of black volcanic rock with sparse drifting embers
records.altText: A copper-scaled salamander coils on volcanic rock and levels a burning spear through waves of heat.

records.appearance: A lithe adult fey with a humanlike upper body, pointed ears, curling ram horns, and shaggy goat legs ending in cloven hooves. Chestnut curls and a short beard frame a sharp amused face, while a set of reed pipes hangs at the belt of loose woodland cloth.
records.silhouette: Upright humanoid torso above two backward-jointed goat legs, framed by curled horns and cloven hooves.
records.pose: Springing sideways on cloven hooves with one hand raised in mocking invitation and horns turned in profile.
mustInclude: two goat legs with cloven hooves
records.environment: A bright forest glade with mossed stones and late-afternoon motes
records.altText: A horned satyr springs sideways in a forest glade on two shaggy goat legs and cloven hooves.

records.appearance: A tiny desert scorpion with a segmented armored body, two grasping pincers, eight walking legs, and a jointed tail arched over its back to a single dark stinger. Fine sensory hairs catch the light along its sand-colored limbs.
records.silhouette: Low many-legged body between two pincers, dominated by a high curved tail and terminal sting.
records.pose: Braced atop a flat stone with pincers spread and tail coiled tightly above the body.
records.environment: A moonlit desert floor with a flat warm stone and wind-rippled sand
records.altText: A sand-colored scorpion raises its segmented tail and spreads two pincers on a desert stone.

records.appearance: A compact adult wilderness scout in fitted leather protection beneath a weather-stained hooded cloak. A longbow is held ready with a practical quiver high on the back, while a plain shortsword, rope coil, and small field pouch stay tight against the body for quiet travel.
records.silhouette: Small hooded adult with longbow held diagonally, quiver above one shoulder, and short sword at the hip.
records.pose: Kneeling behind a low stone with one arrow half-drawn, head turned to track movement through the trees.
records.environment: A wooded ridge overlooking a misty path with open sight lines around the figure
records.altText: A compact hooded scout kneels on a wooded ridge with longbow half-drawn and shortsword at the hip.

records.appearance: A gaunt amphibious fey with long seaweed-dark hair, mottled kelp-green skin, webbed clawed hands, and large pale eyes set in a deeply lined face. Ragged wrappings of net and waterlogged cloth cling to the narrow body, while small fin ridges and barnacle-like growths break the silhouette.
records.silhouette: A stooped humanoid with long hanging hair, narrow shoulders, extremely long clawed fingers, webbed feet, and ragged trailing nets.
records.pose: Rising waist-deep from black tidal water with one claw extended and both pale eyes fixed in a dreadful glare.
records.environment: A moonless tidal cave with black water, hanging weed, and dim reflected coastal light
records.altText: A gaunt green sea hag rises from black tidal water, webbed claws spread beneath long seaweed-dark hair.

records.appearance: A tiny natural seahorse with a coronet-like bony crest, long tubular snout, upright armored body, small fluttering fins, and a tightly curled prehensile tail. Fine pale rings and speckles break across its ochre plates.
records.silhouette: Upright S-curved fish with a horse-shaped head, rounded belly, small dorsal fin, and coiled tail.
records.pose: Hovering beside sea grass with its curled tail lightly anchored and head angled into the current.
records.environment: A quiet sea-grass meadow in clear shallow water with drifting bubbles
records.altText: A tiny ochre seahorse anchors its curled tail to sea grass while hovering upright in clear water.

records.appearance: An unnatural humanoid absence made from layered black vapor, with elongated arms, clawlike hands, and a hollow suggestion of a face where two dim voids interrupt the darkness. Its edges unravel into smoke and the lower body spreads flat against nearby surfaces instead of forming solid feet.
records.silhouette: Tall thin humanoid shadow with long reaching arms, clawed fingers, narrow head, and dissolving lower edge.
records.pose: Peeling upright from a wall behind the viewer, one long hand extending as the torso remains partly flat against stone.
mustInclude: partly merged with a cast shadow
records.environment: A dim underground corridor with one distant lantern casting long hard-edged shadows
records.altText: A tall spectral shadow peels away from a dungeon wall and reaches forward with an elongated dark hand.

records.appearance: A massive ambulatory heap of waterlogged vines, roots, peat, and broad swamp leaves, with two long tendril arms and a low headlike rise suggested only by shadowed hollows. The plant mass is dense and asymmetrical, and occasional blue sparks travel through rain-wet stems without forming a solid humanoid body.
records.silhouette: Broad hunched plant mass with no neck, two trailing vine arms, thick rootlike legs, a ragged leafy crown, and an irregular base.
records.pose: Heaving forward through shallow water as both tendril arms spread to engulf and the central mass crackles with absorbed lightning.
records.environment: A flooded forest hollow beneath heavy rain, with cypress roots and hanging moss
records.altText: A towering mound of soaked vines and peat shambles through swamp water with tendrils spread wide.

records.appearance: A towering humanoid construct built from interlocked steel, stone, and dark wood plates, with broad protective shoulders, long pistonlike arms, and a featureless helm. A single arcane sigil glows in the chest where a bound amulet would direct it, and repaired seams knit themselves with restrained golden magic.
records.silhouette: Large blocky automaton with a small helmeted head, shield-wide shoulders, very long arms, heavy fists, and pillar legs.
records.pose: Stepping across an unseen warded companion with both forearms crossed into a living shield and one fist beginning to swing.
records.environment: A high-ceilinged arcane archive with protective circles glowing faintly on the floor
records.altText: A towering shield guardian crosses its massive arms protectively in an arcane archive.

records.appearance: A waist-high subterranean fungus with a thick pale stalk and a broad cupped cap split into vibrating gill-lined folds. Several smaller lobes cluster at its base, and the central opening flexes like a resonating chamber without forming an animal mouth.
records.silhouette: Tall mushroom column under a flared irregular cap, surrounded by a low cluster of rounded lobes.
records.pose: Rooted in place with its cap thrown open, concentric ripples visible through the quivering flesh as it shrieks.
records.environment: A damp Underdark shelf with mineral drips and sparse patches of pale lichen
records.altText: A pale shrieker fungus opens its quivering purple-gray cap in a damp subterranean cavern.

records.appearance: A young silver dragon with four graceful legs, two long wings, a tapering tail, and an elegant wedge-shaped head framed by swept horns and a narrow neck frill. Bright silver scales shift toward cool blue in shadow, while frost gathers between the throat plates before a breath attack.
records.silhouette: A slender quadrupedal dragon with backswept horns, narrow neck frill, tall folded wings, and a long tapering tail.
records.pose: Perched on a mountain parapet with one wing lifted into the wind and head lowered as cold mist spills from its jaws.
records.environment: A high stone parapet above cloud and snowy peaks under cold diffuse light
records.altText: A silver dragon wyrmling perches above mountain clouds as frost gathers along its elegant jaws.

records.appearance: An animated humanoid skeleton held together by dim necromantic force, every major bone readable beneath remnants of decayed leather equipment. Empty eye sockets face forward as one bony hand grips a shortsword and a shortbow with small quiver rides across the back.
records.silhouette: Bare-boned upright humanoid with a sword held low, rib cage exposed, and a curved bow crossing the shoulders.
records.pose: Advancing in a stiff balanced step with shortsword raised and empty skull turned directly toward the viewer.
records.environment: A crumbling underground passage with dust and restrained blue ambient light
records.altText: An animated humanoid skeleton advances through a ruin with shortsword raised and shortbow on its back.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Radiant, Slashing.
records.appearance: A towering celestial champion with a powerful luminous humanoid form, serene uncompromising face, and one pair of immense gold-white feathered wings. One hand holds a tall slaying bow drawn with a radiant arrow, while a great sword flies independently beside the body under precise divine control.
records.silhouette: Large upright winged humanoid framed by one colossal feathered wing pair, with a tall bow in two-handed aim and one separate hovering sword.
records.pose: Hovering high with wings in a steady spread, bow drawn toward a distant target, and the flying sword guarding the open flank.
mustInclude: one pair of immense feathered wings
mustAvoid: sword held in a third hand
records.environment: A vast celestial horizon above luminous cloud terraces and distant star fields
records.altText: A gold-winged solar hovers above celestial clouds with a radiant bow drawn and a great sword flying beside it.

records.appearance: A malevolent remnant of a humanoid stretched into an incorporeal column of darkness. A hollow face and two elongated hands emerge from wind-torn bands of vapor, with a cold blue-white core barely visible inside the chest and no solid clothing, legs, or bones.
records.silhouette: A floating tapered wraith-form with a ragged crown of vapor, long reaching arms, and a lower body dissolving into smoke.
records.pose: Diving forward through a wall at an angle, one spectral hand extended to drain life from an unseen target.
records.environment: A ruined underground chamber where the specter passes through cracked masonry in dim blue light
records.altText: A blue-black specter dives through a ruined wall, its hollow face and reaching hand emerging from torn vapor.

records.appearance: A great celestial with the tawny body and four paws of a lion, a dignified humanlike head, and one pair of broad eagle wings. Fine geometric inscriptions mark the feather shafts and a simple brow circlet, while luminous eyes and a restrained ring of psychic script gather around the open mouth.
records.silhouette: Large winged lion body on four paws with a humanlike head, calm high neck, one feathered wing pair, and long tufted tail.
records.pose: Seated upright on a low archive plinth with wings half-open, one paw lifted, and a measured mind-rending roar forming as concentric symbols.
records.environment: A quiet desert archive of stone tablets beneath an open star-filled dome
records.altText: A human-headed Sphinx of Lore sits in a desert archive as golden symbols gather around its measured roar.

records.appearance: A massive celestial guardian with the deep-chested body and four paws of a lion, a stern humanlike warrior face framed by a heavy mane, and one pair of enormous eagle wings. Natural bronze-toned plates reinforce the shoulders without becoming worn humanoid armor, while thunder gathers in the chest for a battlefield-shaking roar.
records.silhouette: Large powerful winged lion with four paws, humanlike maned head, high chest, one vast feathered wing pair, and long tufted tail.
records.pose: Standing squarely atop a fortress approach with wings fully spread, forepaws braced, and concentric thunder rings expanding from a valorous roar.
records.environment: A monumental desert fortress causeway beneath a turbulent dawn sky
records.altText: A maned Sphinx of Valor guards a desert causeway with wings spread and thunder rippling from its roar.

records.appearance: A cat-sized celestial sphinx with the compact body and paws of a young lion, a thoughtful humanlike face framed by a small golden ruff, and one pair of feathered wings. Fine geometric markings shimmer across its cream fur, and bright eyes convey intense curiosity rather than childishness.
records.silhouette: A tiny seated lion body with a humanlike head, small ruff, raised feathered wings, and a long curling tail.
records.pose: Hovering just above an open stone tablet, one forepaw lifted as a small burst of insight glows around its head.
records.environment: A quiet desert archive with low carved tablets and a broad field of soft sunlight
records.altText: A tiny cream-and-gold sphinx of wonder hovers over a stone tablet with feathered wings spread in discovery.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A tiny hunting spider with a compact two-part body, eight slender legs, clustered glossy eyes, and short articulated fangs. Fine hairs stripe its brown abdomen, while delicate silk catches between two rear legs.
records.silhouette: Small oval abdomen and lower head joined between eight evenly spread angular legs.
records.pose: Suspended beneath a diagonal web strand with front legs extended toward a vibration.
records.environment: A sheltered woodland web between dark twigs with a softly blurred forest beyond
records.altText: A tiny brown spider hangs beneath a silver web strand with eight legs spread toward a vibration.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A large malevolent serpent with a long heavy coil, dark iridescent scales, a refined almost humanoid face, and a crown of swept-back spines rather than hair. Venom shines on the fangs, and dim violet-black energy gathers between floating motes near the raised head for a necrotic ray.
records.silhouette: Long coiled snake body rising into an upright neck with a humanlike face, swept spine crown, and no limbs or wings.
records.pose: Reared high above tight coils with jaws open, head tilted toward the viewer, and a narrow ray forming beside the face.
records.environment: A buried underworld shrine with cracked reliefs and a ring of dim violet braziers
records.altText: A dark-scaled spirit naga rises from its coils in a buried shrine as violet necrotic light gathers near its face.

records.appearance: A hand-high fey warrior with delicate humanoid features, leaf-fine clothing, and a single pair of translucent insect wings veined like a dragonfly. A needle-thin sword rests in one hand and a tiny recurved bow in the other, both proportioned to the sprite rather than full-size tools.
records.silhouette: Tiny upright fey body centered between two long transparent wings, with a needle blade and miniature bow.
records.pose: Hovering beside a flower with wings beating vertically, needle sword extended while the tiny bow hangs ready.
mustInclude: exactly one pair of insect wings
records.environment: A moonlit forest hollow with one oversized fern frond establishing scale
records.altText: A hand-high sprite hovers beside a fern on transparent wings with a needle sword and tiny bow.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult infiltrator in muted civilian layers tailored to conceal light armor and climbing tools. A narrow shortsword hangs close to the hip, a compact hand crossbow is held beneath the cloak, and an observant, forgettable face is partly shaded by a practical hood.
records.silhouette: A slim hooded figure with a close cloak, short blade at one hip, compact crossbow held low, and rope coil at the waist.
records.pose: Pausing midway over a parapet, one boot on the wall and hand crossbow trained into the courtyard below.
records.environment: A moonlit urban rooftop above a quiet courtyard with uncluttered masonry shapes
records.altText: A compact hooded spy climbs a moonlit parapet with a hand crossbow ready and shortsword concealed at the hip.

records.appearance: A small wiry elemental with an impish humanoid frame, broad membranous wings, clawed hands and feet, and a narrow face constantly blurred by curling vapor. Its pale wet hide appears half-condensed from steam, with beads of water gathering and evaporating along every edge.
records.silhouette: Small winged humanoid with pointed head, two long arms, clawed legs, and a vapor-softened outline.
records.pose: Hovering forward with wings swept back and jaws open to release a concentrated cone of scalding mist.
mustInclude: body partly obscured by self-generated steam
records.environment: A wet planar grotto with dark stone and warm vapor drifting behind
records.altText: A small pale steam mephit hovers in a wet grotto with two wings spread and scalding mist at its jaws.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Mountain, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: A repulsive bat-sized flying monstrosity with one pair of membranous wings, a compact furry body, four many-jointed gripping legs, and a long needlelike proboscis projecting from a small head. Its abdomen swells slightly behind the wings, and pincerlike feet curl inward for attachment.
records.silhouette: Tiny body beneath two broad pointed wings, with four curled legs and one long straight feeding beak.
records.pose: Hovering in a steep approach with both wings spread, four gripping feet opening and proboscis aimed forward.
mustInclude: exactly four many-jointed legs with pincer feet
records.environment: A damp cavern mouth at twilight with subdued rock and hanging moss
records.altText: A bat-sized stirge approaches on two veined wings with four pincer-tipped legs open and a long proboscis forward.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Bludgeoning, Force, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A tremendously tall, lean giant with smooth slate-gray skin, long sculptural limbs, deep-set eyes, and close-cropped dark hair. Simple fitted hides and woven belts leave the athletic frame clear, while a stone club shaped from a natural column and several carefully selected boulders show a practiced thrower.
records.silhouette: Huge tall humanoid with narrow waist, very long limbs, small head, long stone club, and a balanced boulder held near one shoulder.
records.pose: Twisting gracefully through a throwing stance with one boulder drawn back and the long club planted for balance.
records.environment: A monumental mountain cavern with smooth carved ledges and tiny distant openings for scale
records.altText: A lean slate-skinned stone giant draws back a boulder in a vast mountain cavern.

records.appearance: A towering humanoid construct assembled from enormous fitted blocks of dark stone, its blank head and broad torso carved with shallow geometric control channels. The arms end in crushing slab fists, and a concentrated knot of pale force light shines behind a single chest aperture without making the figure mechanical.
records.silhouette: Large rectangular humanoid with a small block head, monumental shoulders, column arms, square fists, and thick pillar legs.
records.pose: Planting both feet as one fist swings forward and a compact force bolt launches from the chest aperture.
records.environment: A weathered fortress courtyard with paving stones fractured beneath the construct
records.altText: A massive dark stone golem launches a pale force bolt while swinging one slab fist in a ruined courtyard.

sourceFacts: Movement modes: Fly, Hover, Swim, Walk.
Attack damage types: Lightning, Slashing, Thunder.
records.appearance: A colossal giant with smooth violet-gray skin, flowing white hair, and a tall athletic frame that moves with the calm weight of deep water. Streamlined scale armor and storm-dark cloth suit both sea and sky, while an immense sword carries thunder along its edge and lightning coils around the free hand.
records.silhouette: Huge tall humanoid with windblown white hair, long scale-armored torso, a gigantic sword, and a raised hand wreathed in lightning but no wings.
records.pose: Hovering just above a wave-battered sea cliff with the storm sword held low and a thunderbolt drawn back in the free hand.
records.environment: A towering coastal cliff during a lightning storm with waves and architecture far below for scale
records.altText: A colossal violet-gray storm giant hovers above a sea cliff with a thunderous sword and lightning in hand.

records.appearance: A poised fiend in an alluring humanoid guise whose predatory nature shows through swept-back horns, dark featherless wings, fine claws, and watchful eyes. Elegant garments frame rather than conceal a lean, strong build, while a narrow tail and a faint psychic shimmer betray the supernatural disguise.
records.silhouette: Graceful upright humanoid framed by one pair of high arched batlike wings, small horns, tapered claws, and a trailing tail.
records.pose: Standing in a relaxed three-quarter turn with one hand extended invitingly while the wings remain half-open and ready.
records.environment: An elegant but shadowed planar salon with distant ember light and uncluttered architecture
records.altText: A poised horned succubus with dark wings extends one hand in a shadowed infernal salon.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Mountain, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: Dozens of ordinary small bats wheel together as one dense, coordinated cloud, each with a furred body, large ears, and two finger-boned membrane wings. The nearest animals remain anatomically crisp while the farther members form a broad turbulent mass without merging into one creature.
records.silhouette: A large irregular vortex composed of many separate angular bat silhouettes around a hollow center.
records.pose: Spiraling out of a cavern opening toward the viewer, nearest bats banking around the swarm core.
records.environment: The broad mouth of a limestone cave at dusk with open air around the swarm
records.altText: Dozens of small brown bats spiral from a cave in a broad coordinated swarm.

records.appearance: Dozens of severed humanoid hands animated as a coordinated undead swarm, each desiccated cleanly at the wrist and moving on hooked fingers. They vary in size, age, gloves, jewelry, and decay, but none has an attached arm; cold necrotic shadow binds the crowded mass without graphic blood.
records.silhouette: A low advancing wave of many splayed hands, raised wrists, hooked fingers, and several claws climbing over the rest.
records.pose: Pouring down a stone stair in a many-fingered wave while the front hands reach and the rear claws scramble over them.
records.environment: A narrow crypt stair with enough bare stone around the edges to read the swarm shape
records.altText: Dozens of desiccated crawling claws spill down a crypt stair in a coordinated wave of hooked fingers.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: Thousands of small beetles, biting flies, and crawling insects move as one dense ground-skimming cloud, with a few crisp six-legged individuals readable along the leading edge. The swarm thickens into a dark shifting core without combining into a single body or hiding the varied natural forms.
records.silhouette: A broad irregular cloud close to the ground, fringed by many tiny wings, legs, and separate insect bodies.
records.pose: Rolling over a low wall in a coordinated wave, airborne insects rising above the mass as crawlers spill down stone.
records.environment: An overgrown ruin edge with dry stone and low weeds under dim overcast light
records.altText: A dense mixed swarm of beetles and flies rolls over a low ruin wall in a dark shifting wave.

records.appearance: A dense, coordinated school of palm-length predatory fish with deep compressed bodies, blunt heads, red-orange bellies, and triangular silver scales. Their short jaws open to show interlocking teeth as the swarm turns around a dark central void rather than forming one giant creature.
records.silhouette: A turbulent spindle-shaped cloud made of dozens of small fish, broad at the center and tapering at both ends.
records.pose: Whirling in a sudden feeding turn, the nearest fish sharply detailed while the outer school curves through the water.
records.environment: A murky tropical river channel with submerged roots and shafts of green light
records.altText: A dense swarm of silver and red piranhas wheels through a murky river beneath submerged roots.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
records.appearance: Scores of ordinary brown and gray rats surge together in a tightly packed ground-level mass. Rounded ears, whiskered muzzles, nimble paws, and long naked tails remain individually readable at the front, while overlapping bodies create the swarm's restless wave-like shape.
records.silhouette: A low wide carpet of many separate rodents, broken by arched backs and looping thin tails.
records.pose: Pouring around a dungeon corner in a compact wave, front animals climbing over rubble while the mass follows.
records.environment: A damp stone undercroft with scattered rubble and a narrow floor-level light
records.altText: Scores of brown and gray rats pour around a damp dungeon corner in a low packed swarm.

records.appearance: A churning flock of glossy black ravens, each with a heavy bill, broad feathered wings, and wedge-shaped tail. The birds overlap into a cohesive airborne mass, but the nearest individuals remain distinct as open beaks and beating wings create a visible cacophony.
records.silhouette: A medium-sized ragged cloud of many separate black birds, with wing tips and beaks breaking its edges.
records.pose: Cycling in a loud descending spiral, several foreground ravens banking outward with beaks open.
records.environment: A windy marsh ruin beneath a low gray sky with broken stone far below
records.altText: A loud swarm of glossy black ravens spirals above a marsh ruin with many beaks open.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Swamp.
records.appearance: A dense moving knot of dozens of small venomous snakes in varied natural patterns, their slender bodies weaving over and beneath one another. Several triangular heads rise independently with forked tongues tasting the air, but the swarm remains a collection of distinct animals rather than one many-headed monster.
records.silhouette: A broad low tangle of looping snake bodies punctuated by numerous raised heads and tapering tails.
records.pose: Pouring over a fallen log in a coordinated wave while the foremost heads rear defensively.
records.environment: A warm scrubland edge around a fallen log with dry leaves and low grass
records.altText: Dozens of olive, tan, and rust venomous snakes pour over a fallen log with several heads raised.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Bludgeoning, Piercing, Slashing, Thunder.
records.appearance: A gargantuan terrestrial apex monstrosity with an immense horned reptilian skull, armor-plated torso, two huge clawed hind legs, two shorter but powerful forearms, and a long crushing tail. Its back rises into a crown of jagged reflective carapace plates that catch magic like mirrors, while the deep chest expands for a thunderous bellow.
records.silhouette: Gargantuan forward-leaning biped with massive horned head, two shorter clawed arms, two pillar hind legs, high spiked carapace, and enormous tail.
records.pose: Hauling itself through a city-edge escarpment with one hind foot planted, foreclaws gripping masonry, tail sweeping low, and concentric shock waves erupting from its roar.
mustAvoid: four-legged stance as the primary silhouette
records.environment: The edge of an evacuated fortified city where towers and walls establish impossible scale without showing casualties
records.altText: The gargantuan tarrasque climbs through a fortified city edge, reflective carapace raised as its roar sends out shock waves.

records.appearance: A large natural tiger with a long muscular torso, heavy forequarters, round ears, and a thick counterbalancing tail. Black stripes break across rich orange fur and pale underparts in individually varied bands, while whiskers and amber eyes remain sharply alert.
records.silhouette: A low elongated big cat on four paws with rounded head, high shoulders, long tail, and no exaggerated teeth.
records.pose: Stepping silently from broad leaves with shoulders lowered, one forepaw suspended just above the ground.
records.environment: A humid forest edge with broad leaves and soft broken sunlight behind the animal
records.altText: A large orange-and-black tiger stalks silently from dense green leaves with one paw raised.

records.appearance: A compact adult street enforcer with a thick neck, scarred knuckles, and layered leather clothing reinforced at the shoulders. A heavy iron mace rests in one hand, while a plain heavy crossbow and short bolt case sit across the back beneath a weathered half-cloak.
records.silhouette: Small broad adult with mace hanging at one side, compact crossbow across the back, and squared shoulders.
records.pose: Standing in a low confrontational stance with mace lifted near one shoulder and free hand signaling companions forward.
records.environment: A narrow stone alley with crates and a shuttered doorway kept in soft focus
records.altText: A compact street tough braces in a stone alley with an iron mace raised and heavy crossbow on the back.

records.appearance: A compact, battle-tested humanoid gang leader in practical reinforced armor, with a battered round shield strapped behind one shoulder and numerous old repairs visible across the kit. A heavy warhammer rests in one hand while a well-maintained crossbow and bolt case show the discipline behind the rough exterior.
records.silhouette: Short broad humanoid with squared shoulders, a blocky hammer held low, and a heavy crossbow forming a diagonal across the back.
records.pose: Braced in a commanding forward stance, warhammer lifted just clear of the ground while signaling unseen allies with the free hand.
records.environment: A fortified alley checkpoint built from crates, rough barricades, and rain-dark stone
records.altText: A compact armored tough boss commands a barricaded alley with warhammer and heavy crossbow ready.

records.appearance: An ancient living tree of immense height whose thick trunk divides into two branchlike arms and two root-bound walking legs. Deep bark folds suggest a long solemn face beneath a crown of asymmetrical boughs, while moss, small ferns, and old lightning scars make the creature part of the forest rather than a carved statue.
records.silhouette: Huge upright trunk with a broad irregular crown, two long branch arms, two root-flared legs, and hanging secondary twigs.
records.pose: Striding from the tree line with one root foot lifting free of the soil, one branch arm raised to slam, and bark fragments whipping forward like hail.
records.environment: An old-growth forest clearing where neighboring trees seem poised to awaken
records.altText: An ancient treant strides from an old forest, raising one vast branch arm as bark shards fly.

records.appearance: A gigantic mature ceratopsian with a barrel-shaped body, sturdy columnar legs, a parrotlike beak, two long brow horns, one shorter nasal horn, and a broad shield-shaped neck frill. Pebbled hide and old horn wear keep the animal naturalistic, powerful, and grounded.
records.silhouette: Huge low quadruped with a broad frill, three forward horns, deep torso, thick legs, and short counterbalancing tail.
records.pose: Driving into a defensive charge with head lowered, brow horns level, and dust rolling from all four planted feet.
records.environment: An open prehistoric grassland with low cycads and a distant tree line for scale
records.altText: A huge three-horned triceratops lowers its broad frill and charges across a dusty grassland.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Forest, Hill, Mountain, Swamp, Underdark.
Attack damage types: Acid, Fire, Slashing.
records.appearance: A towering, long-limbed giant with ropey muscle, a hunched spine, rough moss-toned skin, an elongated nose, and stringy dark hair. Its arms hang nearly to the knees and end in broad hooked claws; fresh seams of paler tissue mark places where severed flesh has unnaturally regrown.
records.silhouette: Tall narrow giant with hunched shoulders, small forward head, extremely long arms, splayed claws, bent knees, and large bare feet.
records.pose: Twisting into a two-handed rending attack while one freshly restored forearm flexes with visible but non-graphic regeneration.
records.environment: A damp rocky ravine beneath dense forest with broken branches caught around the creature
records.altText: A long-armed moss-colored troll twists to rend in a damp ravine, pale regrowth visible along one forearm.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Arctic, Forest, Hill, Mountain, Swamp, Underdark.
Attack damage types: Acid, Fire, Slashing.
records.appearance: An independently animated severed troll forearm and clawed hand, green-gray and corded with unnatural muscle. The non-graphic cut end has already sealed beneath knotted pale regeneration tissue, while thick black nails bite into the ground and new sinew threads slowly weave across the stump.
records.silhouette: A single oversized forearm crawling horizontally on five long clawed fingers, with a blunt sealed stump raised behind.
records.pose: Scuttling across stone on its spread fingers, wrist flexed high as two claws rake forward independently.
mustInclude: one severed troll forearm and hand only
records.environment: A damp cavern floor beside a cracked stone and a faint trail of disturbed grit
records.altText: A severed green-gray troll forearm crawls across a cavern floor on five claws, its stump sealed by new tissue.

records.appearance: A gigantic terrestrial predator with a deep muscular skull, heavy serrated teeth, powerful neck, barrel-like torso, two-fingered forelimbs, long counterbalancing tail, and immense birdlike hind legs. Pebbled hide and restrained sparse filamenting along the spine keep the animal naturalistic and physically plausible.
records.silhouette: Huge horizontal biped with an enormous head, tiny two-fingered arms, deep torso, tall hind legs, and long straight tail.
records.pose: Driving into a running turn with jaws open, one foot planted hard and the tail sweeping level behind for balance.
records.environment: An open fern-dotted grassland with broken conifers and a muddy riverbank
records.altText: A huge olive-brown tyrannosaurus turns at a run with jaws open and long tail held for balance.

records.appearance: A tall, powerfully graceful horse with a single long spiraled horn rising from the brow, luminous intelligent eyes, cloven-looking but equine hooves, and a flowing mane and tail touched by subtle celestial light. Its coat is natural and finely textured rather than metallic, with faint radiant markings around the face and chest.
records.silhouette: Elegant horse profile on four long legs with one straight forehead horn, arched neck, full mane, and streaming tail.
records.pose: Rearing slightly in a protective turn, horn angled toward danger while its forelegs gather above a pool of light.
records.environment: An ancient forest glade with a clear spring and shafts of early morning light
records.altText: A radiant white unicorn rears protectively beside a forest spring, its single spiraled horn aglow.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Bludgeoning, Necrotic, Piercing, Radiant.
records.appearance: A small, ageless undead noble with wax-pale skin, controlled predatory features, sharp canine teeth, and dark eyes catching a restrained crimson glint. Precisely fitted old-fashioned garments permit climbing and combat, while one hand carries grave-cold force and the lower coat edge begins to unravel into escape mist.
records.silhouette: Compact elegant humanoid with a high-collared coat, long clawed fingers, narrow stance, and trailing mist but no wings.
records.pose: Stepping down a vertical wall as if it were level ground, one hand ready to strike and the other dissolving into mist at the fingertips.
records.environment: A moonlit upper gallery in an abandoned city manor with tall windows and deep stone shadows
records.altText: A pale vampire walks down a moonlit manor wall as one hand gathers grave force and the other turns to mist.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Necrotic, Piercing, Poison.
records.appearance: A small-statured living humanoid servant in discreet dark traveling clothes, with an athletic climber's build, sleep-starved pallor, and two faint healed punctures at the neck. Narrow dagger sheaths line a hidden bandolier, and a matched blade in each hand carries a thin umbral haze supplied by the distant vampire master.
records.silhouette: A compact cloaked humanoid with two short daggers, close-fitting layers, climbing boots, and a blade-filled belt beneath the coat.
records.pose: Springing sideways from a wall in a deathlessly agile turn, one dagger poised to throw and the other guarding the chest.
records.environment: A narrow moonlit manor exterior with a climbable stone wall and one dark window above
records.altText: A pale vampire familiar springs from a moonlit manor wall with two shadow-wreathed daggers and more blades concealed.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Acid, Necrotic, Piercing, Radiant, Slashing.
records.appearance: A small, unnaturally lean undead humanoid with wax-pale skin, dark-veined temples, sharp canine teeth, and hands ending in climbing claws. Once-fine clothing hangs travel-stained and torn, while the eyes hold a hungry red glint and the body remains taut with predatory speed rather than corpse-like decay.
records.silhouette: Compact crouched humanoid with a sharp profile, long clawed fingers, close-fitting ragged clothes, and no cloak or wings.
records.pose: Clinging sideways to a stone wall with one hand while turning to spring, lips drawn back just enough to reveal fangs.
records.environment: A narrow moonlit city ruin with high stone walls suited to supernatural climbing
records.altText: A pale vampire spawn clings to a moonlit stone wall, claws spread and fangs visible.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Desert, Forest, Grassland, Hill, Swamp.
records.appearance: A tiny alert viper with a triangular head, narrow neck, keeled olive scales, and dark zigzag markings along its flexible body. Two short folding fangs show inside the open mouth while the tail anchors a tight defensive coil.
records.silhouette: Compact coiled serpent rising into an S-shaped neck beneath a broad triangular head.
records.pose: Coiled on leaf litter with the front third raised and head drawn back a moment before striking.
records.environment: Dry leaf litter beside a sun-warmed woodland stone
records.altText: A small olive viper coils in woodland leaves with its triangular head raised and fangs visible.
