records.appearance: A waist-high violet mushroom with a thick pallid stalk, a bruised purple cap, and four long rootlike tendrils emerging around its base. The flexible tendrils end in wet dark tips and lift independently, while mottled fungal flesh and ragged gills keep the organism unmistakably plantlike.
records.silhouette: Broad mushroom cap above a stout central stalk, encircled by four long raised whip-like tendrils.
records.pose: Rooted in place with exactly four tendrils lashing outward at different heights beneath the tilted cap.
records.environment: A damp Underdark hollow with rotting wood and pale mineral deposits
records.altText: A violet mushroom creature lashes four long tendrils from its rooted base in a damp cavern.

sourceFacts: Attack damage types: Piercing, Poison, Thunder.
records.appearance: A towering vulture-like demon with a hunched humanoid torso, bald hooked-beak head, long taloned legs, clawed arms, and one pair of vast ragged feathered wings. Oily plumage gives way to scaled gray flesh around the chest, while a cloud of dark spores drifts from between the shoulder feathers.
records.silhouette: Large hunched avian fiend with hooked beak, broad ragged wings, long arms, backward-jointed legs, and heavy talons.
records.pose: Landing in a violent forward crouch with wings fully spread, beak open in a stunning screech, and spores shaken into the air.
records.environment: A blasted planar crag beneath a turbulent ochre sky with ash swirling at ground level
records.altText: A ragged-winged vrock lands on a blasted crag, shrieking as dark spores shake from its feathers.

records.appearance: A broad-winged scavenging vulture with dark layered plumage, a bare wrinkled head and neck, hooked pale beak, and heavy feet. Its long primary feathers spread like fingers while a rough feather ruff frames the naked skin.
records.silhouette: Large soaring bird with broad rectangular wings, small bare head, short tail, and dangling feet.
records.pose: Dropping onto a sunlit rock with wings raised high for balance and head tilted watchfully aside.
records.environment: A dry upland ridge with open sky and distant scrub
records.altText: A dark vulture lands on a dry ridge with broad wings raised around its bare gray-pink head.

records.appearance: A towering battle-trained horse with a deep chest, powerful hindquarters, long clean legs, and an alert high-carried head. Its dark coat shines beneath a reinforced military saddle and restrained leather-and-mail chamfron, leaving the muscular body readable and ready to charge.
records.silhouette: Large athletic horse with arched neck, strong legs, streaming mane, and compact protective tack around head and saddle.
records.pose: Launching into a charge with forelegs extended, neck driving forward and empty stirrups pulled back by motion.
records.environment: An open churned field under dramatic overcast light with distant shapes subdued
records.altText: A powerful black warhorse charges riderless across a field in a reinforced military saddle.

records.appearance: A complete animated horse skeleton with a long skull, deep rib cage, articulated spine, and four bony legs held together by faint necromantic force. Remnants of a cracked bridle and torn saddle straps cling to the bones, while cold light occupies the empty eye sockets.
records.silhouette: Large skeletal horse with long skull, exposed ribs, four thin jointed legs, and a vertebral tail trace.
records.pose: Galloping in a rigid powerful stride with forelegs extended and skull lowered as if charging.
records.environment: A ruined causeway at night with broken stones and low ground mist
records.altText: An animated warhorse skeleton gallops across a ruined causeway with cold light in its empty sockets.

records.appearance: A compact adult foot soldier in a layered leather jack with a simple iron cap and a tall practical shield strapped close to the body. A plain infantry spear is gripped at mid-shaft, and every buckle, wrap, and boot shows disciplined maintenance rather than wealth.
records.silhouette: Small armored adult in a square stance behind a tall shield, with spear point projecting above one shoulder.
records.pose: Locked into a close formation stance with shield edge forward and spear leveled beside an unseen companion.
records.environment: A churned field path with indistinct formation shapes kept far in the background
records.altText: A compact infantry warrior braces behind a tall wooden shield with a plain spear leveled.

records.appearance: A small-statured adult soldier marked by years of campaigning, with a steady stance, repaired mail, reinforced half-plate, and a face weathered by old scars rather than theatrical rage. A serviceable greatsword is gripped in both hands, while a heavy crossbow and compact bolt case ride across the back.
records.silhouette: A compact armored humanoid with scarred open helm, two-handed sword, layered shoulder protection, and heavy crossbow behind.
records.pose: Settling into a practiced low greatsword guard with weight centered and eyes calmly measuring distance.
records.environment: A churned field camp at dawn with low tents and palisade shapes kept distant
records.altText: A compact scarred warrior veteran stands in repaired armor with greatsword guarded and heavy crossbow on the back.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Coastal, Planar, Swamp, Underwater.
records.appearance: A towering mass of living water whose cresting torso, head, and two long arms emerge from a constantly folding wave. The transparent body carries bubbles, foam, and suspended sand through its currents, while the lower form pours into a broad moving pool instead of separating into legs.
records.silhouette: Broad wave-shaped upper body with two sweeping arms, a crestlike head, hollow eye depressions, and a wide flowing base.
records.pose: Curling over itself in a forward surge with both arms closing inward to whelm a target in the central wave.
records.environment: A storm-lashed rocky shoreline where a surge has climbed above the tide pools
records.altText: A towering water elemental curls like a breaking wave above a stormy rocky shore.

records.appearance: A tiny weasel with an exceptionally long flexible body, short legs, small rounded ears, bright eyes, and a narrow inquisitive muzzle. Sleek chestnut fur pales under the throat, and a slim tail follows the curve of its body.
records.silhouette: Long low tube-shaped mammal with tiny feet, narrow head, and a slender trailing tail.
records.pose: Rising briefly on its hind legs beside a root, forepaws tucked and nose lifted toward the air.
records.environment: A grassy forest edge with exposed roots and scattered autumn leaves
records.altText: A slender chestnut weasel rises beside a tree root with forepaws tucked and nose lifted.

records.appearance: A small but massively muscled lycanthrope in hybrid bear form, with a broad ursine head, rounded ears, thick fur, powerful humanoid arms, and short climbing claws. A leather harness supports several balanced handaxes, while the lower body combines an upright stance with heavy bear-like feet.
records.silhouette: Compact broad hybrid with a round bear head, deep shoulders, long muscular arms, heavy feet, and handaxe shapes at the belt.
records.pose: Rising from all fours into a powerful upright rend, one handaxe still gripped while the other claw sweeps forward.
records.environment: A cold forest hillside with scratched tree trunks and exposed stone ledges
records.altText: A compact werebear rises into a clawing attack on a cold forest slope with a handaxe in one fist.

records.appearance: A small, thickset lycanthrope in hybrid form, combining a humanoid torso and gripping hands with a bristled boar head, powerful neck, cloven lower legs, and upward-curving tusks. Rough travel clothes strain across the shoulders, and a bundle of balanced javelins rides across the back.
records.silhouette: Low heavy hybrid with a wedge-shaped boar head, prominent tusks, hunched shoulders, humanoid arms, and short cloven legs.
records.pose: Charging from a low crouch with tusks angled forward and one javelin drawn back for a close throw.
records.environment: A churned woodland track at the edge of a grassy hill under low storm light
records.altText: A bristled wereboar in hybrid form charges along a muddy woodland track with a javelin raised.

records.appearance: A small lycanthrope in hybrid form, combining a wiry humanoid torso and grasping hands with a narrow ratlike head, rounded ears, coarse gray-brown fur, digitigrade feet, and a long naked tail. A compact hand crossbow hangs ready beside patched urban clothing adapted around the altered limbs.
records.silhouette: A small hunched humanoid with pointed rat muzzle, round ears, long bare tail, clawed feet, and compact crossbow.
records.pose: Balanced on a cellar beam with hand crossbow aimed downward and the long tail curled around the timber.
mustAvoid: ordinary giant rat on four legs
records.environment: A brick-lined urban cellar with timber beams and a low pool of reflected lantern light
records.altText: A small gray-brown wererat crouches on a cellar beam with hand crossbow aimed and naked tail wrapped for balance.

records.appearance: A compact feline lycanthrope in hybrid form with a tiger-striped head, rounded ears, long whiskers, muscular digitigrade legs, and clawed humanoid hands. Light layered clothing leaves the limbs free, while a longbow, compact quiver, and long striped tail complete the agile hunter profile.
records.silhouette: Lean small-statured hybrid with a round feline head, long tail, arched legs, one clawed hand forward, and a bow across the back.
records.pose: Stepping silently through tall grass with shoulders low, claws extended, and head turned toward a distant sound.
records.environment: A sun-dappled grassland margin beside dense forest with open space around the figure
records.altText: A striped weretiger in agile hybrid form stalks through tall grass with a longbow on its back.

records.appearance: A small lycanthrope in hybrid form, with a lean humanoid torso, long wolf muzzle, high ears, coarse gray-brown fur, digitigrade legs, clawed hands, and a balancing tail. Torn but practical clothing remains around the waist and shoulders, and a longbow is slung where transformed hands can still reach it.
records.silhouette: A compact upright wolf-humanoid with pointed ears, long muzzle, clawed arms, bent canine legs, tail, and bow across the back.
records.pose: Dropping into a four-point fighting crouch with one claw forward, jaws open to bite and the bow secured behind.
records.environment: A moonlit forest hill with broken brush and open ground around the crouched form
records.altText: A compact gray werewolf crouches on a moonlit hill with claws forward and a longbow across its back.

sourceFacts: Movement modes: Burrow, Fly, Swim, Walk.
records.appearance: A young white dragon with four strong legs, two ragged-edged wings, a long tail, and a blunt predatory head crowned by backward-sweeping horn plates. Matte ivory scales blend with snow, blue shadows deepen between the plates, and crystalline frost crusts the nostrils and throat.
records.silhouette: A compact quadrupedal dragon with blunt horned head, high folded wings, strong shoulders, and long dragging tail.
records.pose: Scrambling over a wind-carved ice ridge with wings spread low and a cone of cold vapor forming before its jaws.
records.environment: A wind-scoured arctic ice ridge under a pale sky with blowing snow defining the body
records.altText: A white dragon wyrmling scrambles across an ice ridge as frost vapor gathers before its horned jaws.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Desert, Planar, Swamp, Underdark, Urban.
Attack damage types: Necrotic, Piercing, Slashing.
records.appearance: A disciplined undead warrior with desiccated gray skin, pale burning eyes, and remnants of dark martial armor fitted over a lean corpse. One hand holds a straight sword veined by necrotic cold, while a black-limbed bow and quiver remain ready at the shoulder.
records.silhouette: An upright armored corpse with narrow crown-like helm, long sword, recurved bow, ragged cloak, and gaunt face.
records.pose: Advancing from shade with necrotic sword held low and the empty free hand reaching to drain life.
records.environment: A shadowed barrow entrance at twilight with low stones and the last daylight behind the figure
records.altText: A pale-eyed wight emerges from a barrow in dark armor with necrotic sword drawn and bow on its shoulder.

records.appearance: A tiny airborne knot of undead light with a brilliant white-blue core surrounded by nested translucent veils and thin electrical filaments. The glow subtly compresses and trails as it moves, but contains no skull, face, body, lantern, or visible flame fuel.
records.silhouette: A small floating sphere with an irregular corona, a tapered light trail, and several fine curling filaments.
records.pose: Hovering just above black marsh water while recoiling into a sharp spark that sends one lightning filament outward.
records.environment: A night swamp above still dark water and low reeds, with the wisp as the sole strong light source
records.altText: A tiny blue-white will-o-wisp hovers above black marsh water, trailing mist and a sharp electrical filament.

records.appearance: An enormous supernatural wolf with a deep chest, long legs, broad snowshoe paws, and dense white fur shaded blue-gray along the back. Ice crystals rim its muzzle and guard hairs, and cold light gathers in the throat behind formidable canine teeth.
records.silhouette: A huge four-legged wolf with high shoulders, thick neck ruff, long muzzle, full tail, and broad paws planted in snow.
records.pose: Standing broadside in wind-driven snow with head turned forward as a concentrated blast of frost begins to form.
records.environment: A windswept arctic ridge with low visibility and dark rock breaking through snow
records.altText: A huge white winter wolf braces on an arctic ridge as cyan frost gathers inside its jaws.

records.appearance: A lean gray wolf with long legs, a deep narrow chest, erect ears, and a powerful muzzle framed by pale cheek fur. Its layered winter coat darkens along the back, and the full brush tail stays level as it moves with focused pack-hunter economy.
records.silhouette: Athletic canid with pointed ears, long muzzle, deep chest, straight legs, and a bushy level tail.
records.pose: Trotting in a low diagonal line with head level, one forepaw forward and eyes fixed beyond the viewer.
records.environment: A cool forest edge with sparse snow and dark conifers
records.altText: A lean gray wolf trots along a snowy forest edge with amber eyes fixed ahead.

sourceFacts: Listed environments: Forest, Grassland, Hill, Planar.
records.appearance: A horse-sized fey predator shaped like an immense, brutal wolf, with a broad heavy skull, coarse black-gray mane, long forelegs, and intelligent ember-brown eyes. Its powerful jaws hold uneven ivory teeth, while the thick brush tail and clawed paws preserve a recognizable canid build.
records.silhouette: Huge low wolf shape with oversized head, high mane, long legs, broad paws, and thick trailing tail.
records.pose: Prowling downhill in a low three-quarter stance, head level with shoulders and lips drawn back from the bite.
records.environment: A dark hill-country forest path beneath stormy evening light
records.altText: A horse-sized black-gray worg prowls down a forest path with a massive head and coarse mane low.

records.appearance: A small incorporeal undead figure wrapped in long, shredded remnants of a hooded shroud, with only a narrow skull-like suggestion and two cold points of light visible inside the darkness. Its arms taper into vaporous hands, and the lower body streams away as black mist veined by dim necrotic energy.
records.silhouette: Narrow hooded apparition with long reaching arms, ragged shoulder drapery, and a sharply tapering smoke trail instead of legs.
records.pose: Hovering in a fast forward glide with one hand extended to drain life and the shroud streaming into a twisting wake.
records.environment: A vast underworld passage of broken black stone with distant pale planar light
records.altText: A small hooded wraith glides through a black stone passage with one spectral hand reaching forward.

records.appearance: A lean two-legged dragon with a narrow horned head, a deep chest, one pair of vast leathery wings that serve as its forelimbs, and a long flexible tail ending in a heavy venomous stinger. Coarse overlapping scales and oversized climbing talons suit a mountain ambush predator rather than a noble true dragon.
records.silhouette: Bipedal draconic body with exactly two hind legs, two wing-forelimbs, long neck, angular wings, and a scorpionlike tail barb.
records.pose: Dropping from a cliffside bank with hind talons forward, wings flared for braking, and the stinger tail curling beneath the body.
records.environment: A steep mountain ravine with broken ledges and clouds far below
records.altText: A two-legged wyvern dives through a mountain ravine with wings spread and venomous tail stinger curled forward.

records.appearance: A squat three-legged elemental with a stone-plated, barrel-shaped body, three evenly spaced muscular arms, three crystal-bright eyes set around the upper torso, and a wide toothed mouth opening at the crown. Mineral fragments protrude like natural armor, and each hand has powerful claws made for moving through rock.
records.silhouette: Broad radial body on exactly three legs, with three arms spread between them and a large top-mounted mouth above three eyes.
records.pose: Emerging halfway through a cavern floor with all three arms reaching toward an exposed vein of glittering ore.
mustInclude: mouth at the top of the body
records.environment: A crystalline Underdark cavern with a freshly exposed seam of metal ore
records.altText: A three-armed, three-legged xorn rises through a crystal cavern floor toward a vein of ore.

records.appearance: A young swamp dragon with a lean four-legged body, skull-like narrow face, long forward-curving horns, sunken dark eyes, one pair of ragged-edged wings, and a whip tail built for swimming. Glossy black scales carry greenish reflections, while acid beads smoke along the jaw and chest plates.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a long skeletal head, two forward horns, high narrow wings, thin neck, and sinuous tail.
records.pose: Hauling itself from dark water onto a root platform, wings lifted and neck extended as a line of acid gathers behind the teeth.
records.environment: A drowned cypress swamp with acidic pools, hanging moss, and low green mist
records.altText: A young black dragon climbs from a swamp pool as smoking acid gathers along its skull-like jaws.

records.appearance: A young desert dragon with a compact four-legged frame, a long ridged head dominated by one heavy forward-pointing nasal horn, frilled ears, one pair of strong wings, and broad digging claws. Deep cobalt scales fade to sand-gray underneath, while branching electricity crawls from horn to teeth.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with one prominent forward horn, angular ear frills, tall wings, powerful foreclaws, and a long narrow tail.
records.pose: Rising from beneath a dune with foreclaws spread, wings driving sand outward, and the nasal horn aimed along a gathering lightning bolt.
records.environment: A moonlit desert basin of steep dunes with a fresh burrow collapse
records.altText: A young cobalt blue dragon rises from a dune as lightning branches around its great nasal horn.

records.appearance: A young desert dragon with a compact four-legged frame, broad swept facial plates, paired chin spines, one pair of sandy membrane wings, and a long tail adapted to rapid burrowing turns. Fine brass-colored scales shine warmly along the flanks and darken around the joints, while heat gathers behind the narrow teeth.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a wide shieldlike head, lateral facial horns, high folded wings, and a long sand-trailing tail.
records.pose: Bursting from a dune in a low running turn, all four feet visible, wings opening, and fire beginning to glow in the throat.
records.environment: A wind-carved desert basin with sandstone fins and a freshly collapsed burrow
records.altText: A young brass dragon bursts from a desert dune with broad wings opening and fire glowing in its throat.

records.appearance: A young coastal dragon with a strong four-legged body, beaklike ridged snout, paired swept-back horns, finlike cheek spines, one pair of broad wings, and a long swimming tail. Bronze scales carry sea-green patina around the face and wing joints, while blue-white lightning traces between the teeth.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a ridged beaklike head, long backward horns, broad wings, and a deep fin-edged swimming tail.
records.pose: Climbing from crashing surf onto a sea stack with all four feet visible, wings opening and lightning gathering in a straight line through the jaws.
records.environment: A stormy coast of black sea stacks and foaming water beneath low clouds
records.altText: A young bronze dragon climbs from stormy surf as blue-white lightning gathers between its jaws.

records.appearance: A young hill dragon with a supple four-legged frame, long wedge-shaped head, swept cheek horns, layered brow plates, one pair of broad wings, and a flexible tail suited to climbing. Bright copper scales are already beginning to weather green around the face and joints, while clear acid glistens between the teeth.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a long low head, backward cheek horns, broad climbing wings, nimble legs, and curling tail.
records.pose: Clinging sideways to a sandstone bluff with three feet while one claw reaches out and the wings balance a playful feint.
mustAvoid: comedic grin exaggerated into a cartoon
records.environment: A maze of red sandstone hills with narrow ledges and weathered arches
records.altText: A young copper dragon clings to a sandstone bluff, verdigris touching its bright scales.

records.appearance: A young noble dragon with a long serpentine four-legged body, elegant horned head, paired trailing barbels, one pair of broad sail-like wings, and a finned tail suited to swimming. Fine gold scales overlap like coins along the back and soften to warm cream below, while firelight glows through the throat plates.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a long flowing neck and body, elegant horn crown, trailing facial barbels, broad wings, and fin-edged tail.
records.pose: Landing lightly in tall grass with all four feet touching down in sequence, wings high and head turned as fire gathers with controlled restraint.
records.environment: A broad sunlit meadow beside an old forest with a clear river in the middle distance
records.altText: A young gold dragon lands in a meadow, its long body and barbels lit by fire gathering in its throat.

records.appearance: A young forest dragon with a long low four-legged frame, narrow hooked snout, a tall leaflike crest running from brow to neck, one pair of broad wings, and a supple swimming tail. Deep green scales break into barklike patterns along the flanks, while yellow-green poison mist seeps from the nostrils.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a long narrow head, high single dorsal crest, broad wings, lean legs, and winding tail.
records.pose: Coiled around a huge forest root with wings held like a canopy, head low and poison breath spreading in a controlled cloud.
records.environment: An ancient flooded forest beneath enormous roots with mist caught between the trunks
records.altText: A young green dragon coils among ancient roots while yellow-green poison mist drifts from its jaws.

records.appearance: A young volcanic dragon with a muscular four-legged body, wedge-shaped skull, long swept-back horns, ridged brow, one pair of dark leathery wings, and a heavy whip tail. Crimson scales deepen to near black along the spine, while ember light pulses between the armored throat plates.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a broad angular head, long backward horns, high powerful wings, deep shoulders, and heavy tail.
records.pose: Standing high on a broken basalt shelf with all four legs braced, wings spread in challenge, and smoke rolling from fire-bright jaws.
records.environment: A steep volcanic mountain shelf above a smoking caldera
records.altText: A young red dragon spreads its dark wings on a volcanic shelf as smoke pours from ember-lit jaws.

records.appearance: A young mountain dragon with a sturdy four-legged body, broad shield-shaped head, paired swept-back horns, layered silver cheek spines, one pair of pale wings, and a long balanced tail. Bright scales reflect the sky like brushed metal, and cold mist pools around the muzzle with a faint stilling shimmer beneath it.
records.silhouette: Large juvenile quadrupedal dragon with a wide shieldlike head, two long backward horns, layered cheek blades, high wings, and tapering tail.
records.pose: Perched on a narrow alpine tower with all four feet visible, wings held into the wind, and two intermingled layers of cold and paralyzing breath gathering.
records.environment: A high mountain settlement tower above clouds with windblown ice along the masonry
records.altText: A young silver dragon perches above mountain clouds as cold mist gathers around its broad horned head.

sourceFacts: Movement modes: Burrow, Fly, Swim, Walk.
records.appearance: A young arctic dragon with a compact muscular quadrupedal body, wedge-shaped head, backward-sweeping crown spines, hooked ice-climbing claws, one pair of broad pale wings, and a strong swimming tail. Dense white scales shade to blue-gray along the spine, with rime forming around the nostrils and teeth.
records.silhouette: Low powerful juvenile dragon on four legs with a sharply spined head, broad wings, deep chest, and thick tapering tail.
records.pose: Scrambling over a tilted ice shelf with all four claws engaged, wings spread for balance, and a cone of cold building in the open jaws.
records.environment: A fractured arctic glacier beneath blowing snow and a dim polar sky
records.altText: A young white dragon clings to a fractured glacier as frost gathers around its open jaws.

records.appearance: A reanimated adult humanoid with pallid desiccated skin, clouded eyes, slack posture, and torn ordinary clothing stiff with grave dirt. The body is visibly dead but kept non-graphic: bruised discoloration, rigid fingers, and an unnatural neck angle convey decay without exposed organs.
records.silhouette: Sagging upright humanoid with uneven shoulders, reaching hands, dragging step, and ragged clothing.
records.pose: Lurching forward with one arm reaching and one foot dragging, torso held at an impossible tired angle.
records.environment: An abandoned village lane at night with low mist and broken doors behind
records.altText: A pallid zombie in torn clothes lurches down an abandoned village lane with one rigid hand reaching.
